dorsey was last seen on august 17, 1974 in opelika, alabama. she visited the spring villa grocery between 16.30 and 17.00 and got gasoline for her car, a 1972 ford galaxy. dorsey told the gas station attendant that a relative had called her and she was going to pick the person up. one of dorsey's neighbors reported seeing her turn into her driveway at 18.00. she has not been seen since. she was reported missing after she failed to arrive at church the next day. when authorities went to dorsey's home on route 1 in opelika, they found the front door open and a side door unlocked. laundry was hanging on the outside clothesline, dorsey's bible and sunday school teaching materials were laid out on the table, and her bed did not appear to have been slept in. her three dogs were found in the bathroom. dorsey's car was found in downtown opelika near the first baptist church after her disappearance. the keys were in the ignition and her eyeglasses and purse were on the front seat. nothing appeared to be missing from the purse and it contained $11 in cash. there have been no withdrawals from dorsey's account since she disappeared.

a friend who went to her home that day – april 24 – to take her to the doctor found blood on two beds. a cigarette was found in the house, though sullivan didn't smoke. the freezer door was left open, and half of sullivan's dentures were in the house. bessemer police found no signs of forced entry and blood splatter patterns didn't indicate a struggle. sullivan's gun was on the bed. her purse and $500 also remained in the home. police and hundreds of volunteers combed the woods surrounding sullivan’s home and came out with nothing but theories.

dewayne blevins of dallas county, alabama has been missing since at least july 29, 2005. his father last spoke to him over the phone on july 22nd. eric had been staying at his cousin's home and left there on july 23rd. investigators have received information indicating that he was last seen leaving the travelers inn in selma on july 29th, after visiting another cousin. he was reportedly headed to visit friends in the merrimac area, traveling by foot. witnesses claim to have seen him in the merrimac area. he was unemployed at the time of his disappearance, taking odd jobs here and there. he had acquired an id and permit to attend truck driving school, which he was planning to do the following august. his father has received word of sightings of eric, but none were verified. foul play is possible.

barbara rushton left her home on old forest road in vestavia hills on august 29, 1984, to play cards with friends. her husband watched her drive away in her white 1980 volkswagen rabbit, and a short while later her friends called to say she hadn't arrived. her husband called police, and a search was launched for her and her car. neither has ever been found. authorities interviewed family, friends, and co-workers and dug deep into her life. she had resigned her job. co-workers told investigators they had seen her and her husband arguing the day before she disappeared. he daughter told investigators that her mother wasn't behaving normally before she left for her card game - she had a blank stare and was upset and crying. over the next days and weeks, authorities did ground and aerial searches. authorities flagged barbara rushton's social security number, but it has never again been used, nor have any of her credit cards. about $4,000 in her bank account also went untouched. because she was a type-one diabetic who didn't have her insulin when she left home, some think she might thought she might have wandered away in a diabetic amnesia. she was eventually declared dead.

lawson was abducted from her jasper, alabama home while responding to a telephone call from a woman who told lawson she was a nurse and someone in lawson's family was seriously ill in the hospital. a masked assailant managed to subdue and tie up her husband. karen mcpherson pleaded guilty to the kidnapping. mcpherson said she and her cousin, jerry bland, planned the kidnapping for $300,000 ransom. bland killed himself at his home three weeks after lawson disappeared. lawson's family payed the ransom and authorities found most of what they believe is the ransom money in the home of bland. despite numerous tips and a private investigator hired by lawson's family, her body has never been found. a court declared lawson dead in 1993. lawson is originally from cleveland, tennessee. she's a graduate of the alabama school of law.

it was 30 years ago that david martin left his home in west jasper to travel to nauvoo. david’s burned out dodge charger was found near a nauboo strip mine two days later, but he has never been seen. the young walker county man helped take care of his ill mother, and family says he would never have left the area willingly.

sanders was last seen leaving his residence in the 29000 block of county road 2 in hardaway, alabama on the evening of january 20, 2016. he has never been heard from again. after his disappearance, searchers found his nike sneakers in the woods. sanders never picked up his last paycheck from his employer, the macon county school board, and since his disappearance, there has been no activity on his cellular phone.

on 06-17-2023 at approximately 1130 hours, nolan flanagan was last seen by family members in the 400 block of east beach boulevard as he entered the gulf of mexico to go swimming. flanagan is a 54-year-old white male, 5'10", 189 lbs., blue eyes, with short brown/gray hair and a beard. there is a small cross tattoo on the left side of his chest. flanagan was last seen wearing a blue t-shirt, blue swimming shorts, and black swimming shoes.

missing person was last saw by a family member days before thanksgiving 2018. missing person was then taken to a residence on county road 3 in dekalb county, alabama. she left walking on county road 3 and has not been seen since.

came to fairbanks, alaska from anchorage, alaska. she had originally left from seattle, washington and knew someone in valdez, alaska. in march of 1990, a purse with her affects was found under the cushman street bridge (contents scattered about). whereabouts unknown.
avi keys was last seen in may 2004 in fairbanks, alaska.
erin was last seen at the girdwood forest fair on july 1, 1995.
david left home at approximately 5:00 p.m. to play at a sandbar area near the mile 83 parks highway near wasilla, alaska and has not been seen since.
scott and his sister amy (mp # 6049) were last seen at their trailer home. amy was wearing a sweater, a red and blue vest and striped jeans. scott was wearing a striped t-shirt and jeans.
last seen on 11/14/1972. suffering from a medical condition.
allison was last heard from on 01/20/1997 near mountain view, anchorage, alaska. the circumstances surrounding his disappearance are suspicious.

albert agathluk was observed leaving emmonak for alakanuk on november 16, 2006 driving his snow machine. the snow machine was recovered in the yukon river along with a pair of boots and a glove that the family confirmed belonged to albert.

magdalena (borkoski) perez was last seen on july 10, 1988 in anchorage, alaska. she had left her residence at 10 p.m. to pick up her four year old child at mcdonalds on 36th and old seward. an hour later, perez had failed to arrive and was reported as missing. her vehicle was located at the airport.
alex inga jr. and alex inga sr.'s empty skiff was found in amee bay.
monroe became separated from his hunting companions near mile 25 northeast of homer in the anchor river valley.
anthony was in a skiff and attempting to travel from halibut cove to homer on 08/09/1973. his skiff was found overturned in china poot bay on 08/09/1973. he is presumed to have drowned.

patrick is believed to have left port graham enroute to either english bay or seldovia in a borrowed skiff. the skiff was reported missing at the same time patrick was reported missing. he didn't arrive at either location and the skiff was the only means of transportation out of the village.
vehicle located abandoned at fancy moose parking lot. victim had several thousand dollars in cash on his person.

family reported fred howard had been at a cabin at dupont on august 9-10, 2009. family returned to the cabin to pick fred up, but he was gone. his pack, boots, and personal items were gone, and it looked like he had hiked out. some people around juneau reported seeing fred in the downtown area on august 10th, 2009.

christopher orcutt was last seen leaving a downtown party on august 25, 2016 at about 1030 in the evening. orcutt left several items of clothing at the party along with his cell phone. when orcutt did not return for his things, one of the party’s hosts contacted police on aug. 30th. orcutt had told people he was camping on thane road, but wasn’t registered at the thane campground. he also frequented the glory hole and foodland iga to eat, but has not been seen there. his mother and a relative in the downtown juneau area have also not heard from him since aug. 25th.
k'lynn love was aboard the "nannie d", a 32 ft boat which left seward, ak enroute to three hole bay, and has not been seen since. also missing is john corbett and newell noyes.

kevin was last seen leaving his residence in the area of birch road and o'malley road at 7:00 am on tuesday, september 22, 2015. kevin's family owns property at both lake louise and in seldovia, so there is a chance he may be in one of those areas.
missing from f/v hellion. also missing are walter laughead and ronald hoffman.
ole watson fell overboard while fishing for halibut with 2 companions near cape uganik. he made no attempt to reach flotation devices which were thrown to him.
leo demoski was last seen traveling via boat from nulato to ruby. also missing with him are emmett nollner, bertha demoski, claude demoski and harry pitka.
left anchorage for cantwell in a white with green and gold trim cessna 401b, n7984q, and never arrived. also missing on board are gerald dalrymple, jack dickey, donald gabbert, and john murphy.
noah was last seen parked on the yukon river bridge at 5 mile checkpoint in a pickup. the pickup was later found unoccupied with keys left inside.

lance brabham was reported missing monday, dec. 3, 2007, when the lifeguard helicopter he was flying was reported missing in prince william sound near whittier, ak. debris located across from whittier ferry terminal in passage canal. an extensive 7 day search found no survivors. also missing are cameron carter and gaye mcdowell.
missing and presumed drowned from overturned skiff near goose cove. skiff and debris located on shoreline of goose cove.

mason mcleod (mp35770), seth spradlin (mp43221), neal spradlin (mp43222), and marco alletto (mp43223) were reported missing after their plane failed to arrive from swikshak bay to brooks camp as expected on 08/21/2010. debris from the plane was located on 09/28/10.
gust was last seen on april 27, 2017 wearing a dark colored trousers and a dark blue columbia brand coat and large blue stereo head phones, walking towards dago creek.
missing after boat overturned 6 miles downriver on the yukon from beaver, ak.
victim was in a boating accident in seward resurrection bay and has never been located.

victim was floating the klutina river when the canoe overturned in the rapids near mile 10 (south of the richardson highway bridge). he was observed trying to hand onto a boulder in the current. he was not wearing a life jacket. search efforts were unsuccessful in locating him.

suspected homicide victim of michael silka. roger's body has never been located and may have been placed in the tanana river at mile 4.7 chena pump road. also missing is marshall klein, albert hagen and joyce hefnerklein.
left anchorage for cantwell in a white with green and gold trim cessna 401b, n7984q, and never arrived. also missing on board are gerald dalrymple, jack dickey, gordon newstrom and john murphy.
victim is missing from fishing vessel "lisa ann." he was not aboard the vessel in the morning and the skiff was still tied to the boat.
overdue flight from anchorage to grayling via rainy pass aboard a red/white cessna 180, n3424y. missing are kenneth fischer, robert hawk, larry larson and william tiedeman.

piper pa32 aircraft, tail number n8978, was located crashed on mount gerdine, west of anchorage, at approximately the 8,700 foot level. the aircraft was on a flight from anchorage to mcgrath with three people on board. occupants are christopher bailey, jerry melin and william newman. due to the terrain, the occupants were never recovered.
last seen on 09/19/18 at 12:43 hours when he fell off the kake city dock into the water.
missing from f/v clipper eric around 12:40 pm on 09/27/18 approximately 60 miles north of st. matthew island. search efforts were unsuccessful in locating him.
victim was last seen by the river in the village of tuluksak near the airfield and a boat launch.

valerie was camping at granite creek campground and was last seen by her boyfriend around midnight on 07-07-2012. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating her. she was last seen wearing a black dkny hood sweatshirt,navy blue sweatpants and black boots and she was wearing sunglasses on her head.

mp was given a ride into town saturday, july 5, 1975 by a friend and dropped off at the seward mini mall with plans to do shopping in the area. another friend saw the mp between 1:30 and 2:00 pm at the waterfall on lowell point road.

on 10/23/2012, theodore lynch, captain of the f/v darlin michelle, fell overboard in taiya inlet, approximately 1 mile west of the skagway harbor. lynch was wearing a pfd at the time he fell into the water, but it came off during rescue efforts by a crew member. air and water search efforts were not able to locate lynch's body.
duellmann was last seen on the morning of march 18, 1998, when she arrived in anchorage, alaska on united airlines.

mary was 37 when she disappeared from palmer, alaska on september 11th, 1977. she was on a hunting trip with companions in palmer in the granite creek area when she vanished. she fell off of her horse while crossing the river and was swept away in the current. her friends were unable to rescue her and she has never been found.

left home without conveying plans to his father, with whom he lives. had no money or transportation. has a history of not contacting family but only for a period of days. he was reported missing by his sister after no contact for three weeks.
homeless but regularly in contact with family until august, 1993. reports of his hat being seen in the gastineau chanel and that he went to ketchikan to work.

stephan is resident of sweden who was on a walking/snowshoeing and bicycling tour of alaska. he was last seen in the mccarthy area near mile post 27 fixing a flat tire. he was believed to be hiking the kennecott glacier. personal items found near the kennecott river.
carlos zabala and robert davis (mp 21139) are missing after the 93-foot fishing vessel, katmai, they were working on sank about 100 miles west of adak.
edward neely was last heard on 7-15-2011 at around 2000 hours when he called a relative to report he was lost near anderson by the nenana river.
presumed lost while hiking at 18,700 ft of mt. mckinley, in denali national park
douglas was last seen on foot in the area of 12th ave and c street in anchorage, alaska on november 9, 2002.
missing with aircraft 8648n in lake clark area with 3 passengers on board. also missing is scott blom, kaitlyn blom, and kyle longerbeam.

bradford broach was last seen on 8/2/16 at the alyeska resort hotel in girdwood, alaska. he was heading out for a hike on the winner creek trailhead near the base of the tram between 7:30 and 9:00pm. bradford's belongings and rental car were located in the hotel parking lot. he was reported missing after he failed to board his flight back to texas leaving alaska.
left anchorage for cantwell in a white with green and gold trim cessna 401b, n7984q, and never arrived. also missing on board are gerald dalrymple, donald gabbert, gordon newstrom and john murphy.
missing from 14' skiff while enroute from belkofski to king cove. last seen 3 miles from king cove.

francis was last seen leaving eek point in an 18 foot skiff and was going to travel to hydaburg. the skiff was located unoccupied on california island. several searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.
renee was canoeing across bear lake 6 miles north of seward and it overturned. also missing is philip fisher, namus mp #41349.

maryellen mcmillin was last seen at her residence on steel creek road in fairbanks on the evening of november 21, 1998. she is believed to have left her residence driving a dark green 1994 subaru loyale wagon.

john wipert was last contacted in mid-june 09 where he was working as a caretaker at the ptarmigan lake lodge near northway, alaska. two horses that were being stabled at that location are also missing. mr. wipert is unfamiliar with the area. he may have been attempting to ride the horses to beaver creek located 35 miles from the lodge. he was possibly last seen riding a dark colored horse pulling a brown horse near horse creek enroute lake laberge, a black horse with bridle was seen near the us/canada border.

marion gonangnan was reported missing on may 7, 2003 to the fairbanks police department. it is believed the last time marion had contact with her children or other family members was in march of 2003.

alexie is originally from fairbanks but traveled to anchorage to attend alaska career college. she had only been in anchorage for a short time. she has not been heard from since october 10th around 3 a.m. after speaking with friends over the phone. in that conversation, she mentioned that she was lost in the spenard area, in midtown anchorage, and hasn’t been heard from again. her disappearance is considered suspicious.
philip fisher was canoeing across bear lake 6 miles north of seward when the canoe overturned. also missing is renee wade, namus mp #41330.
victim's boat was located stranded on the big su river on 06/23/1996. the area was searched with negative results. he hasn't been seen or heard from since.
michael was employed as an engineer aboard the tug boat 'ensco giant.' he was last seen standing on the back deck and is believed to have fallen overboard.
victim and his snow machine fell into a crevasse on gakona glacier, 22 miles ne of summit lake, mile post 195 richardson highway.
missing from sailboat 'wind song' that was found aground on a beach just inside the mouth of deep bay. despite an extensive search, michael was never located.
missing and presumed drowned after jumping off the cruise ship, norwegian pearl, into funter bay. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating her.

missing aboard f/v destination when it sank approximately 4.4 nautical miles northwest of st. george island. also missing is jeffrey hathaway, charles jones, lawrence o'grady, kai hamik and raymond vincler.
overdue while traveling by boat from seward to driftwood bay. an extensive search was conducted but had negative results. also missing is carolyn davidson and john davidson.
joseph went missing after being lost overboard from the commercial fishing vessel southern seas 40 miles south of sitkinak island. search efforts were unsuccessful in locating him.
leonard was last seen on 06/16/1987. he was a crew member who went missing from the fishing vessel, miss universe, which sank between chignik and alitak bay. he is presumed deceased.

richard was last seen 09/9/1986 aboard the fishing vessel, normar ii, which sank in the bering sea, 70 miles northeast of the pribilof islands. he is missing with kenneth ridgley (mp #66794), fred halsworth (mp #67232), and annabelle moser (mp #66546).

steven and another crewman went missing from fishing vessel nagan which capsized. the vessel was found inverted at 60.19n x 145.74w on the copper river flats. the other crewman was located deceased. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

abraham was last seen traveling at a high rate of speed on a snow machine, upriver on 11/23/1992 around 5:30pm. snow machine tracks and footprints were found leading to open water where two hats and gloves were also found. a bottle of alcohol was also located near the open water hole.
david is presumed to be deceased from a boating accident at uyak bay near kodiak.
dpifanio was last seen on 07/05/1981 when he was swept downstream from the kenai-russian river confluence.
steven mencer was a crew member on the f/v alaska mist who fell overboard near the docks in unalaska.

nick was last seen on the holitna river traveling back to sleetmute. witnesses reported seeing his taillights disappear and he veered into the open water, falling into the ice. he is presumed to have drowned.

glenn was last seen on 10/03/1997. his aircraft, a blue pa-22 on floats (n8995d) was spotted by a pilot of an over flying aircraft partially submerged and upside down in skilak lake. the plane sank in approximately 140 feet of water. neither glenn or the plane were ever located.
dildar was a crew member who went missing from motor vessel seledang ayu when the vessel ran aground after engine failure off spray cape unalaska in dutch harbor.

paul was last seen on 05/28/1996 while boating on wilson lake, 50 miles east of ketchikan. he and three companions were staying in a forest service cabin near the south end of the lake. his companions found the empty skiff an eighth of a mile from the cabin. paul is presumed to have drowned in wilson lake.
randy was last seen on 05/06/1990 during a boating accident in the yakutat bay. he is missing with thomas dann (mp #67194). both are presumed to be deceased.

daniel and two others attempted to cross nikolai creek off chachatna river, south of tyonek in an argo which flipped over throwing all of them into the river. one person survived and called for help and another person was located deceased. daniel was never located and is presumed to have drowned.
douglas went missing and is presumed to have drowned. he was last seen near woronkofski island after his boat overturned.

john and 5 others were aboard a plane that crashed 50 yards off shore on the east side of skagway harbor taiya inlet. two people were rescued and 2 people were located deceased. john and joseph j. leblanc, jr mp66892 were never located.

daniel went missing after fishing vessel, nettie h, was lost at sea approximately 10 miles north of otter point on unimak island. missing with david soileau (mp66833), peter soileau (mp66930) and blake grinstein (mp66855),
gregory was overdue on 05/31/1987 from a boating trip on the yukon river between koyukuk and galena.

aboard fishing vessel "vestfjord" that sank about 30 miles south of the trinity islands just west of kodiak island with 6 crew members. two crew members were located deceased. also missing are richard kristovich mp60768, richard legary mp66948, and daniel mcdonald mp66777.

george was last seen on 02/10/1991 aboard the 98 foot steel crab fishing vessel, barbarossa, which was lost in the bering sea about 30 miles west of st. george island. the coast guard received a distress call from the boat around 1:00am but searches did not locate the boat or the crewmen. it is presumed that the boat capsized and sank. george is missing with five other crewmen including donald bright (mp #66651), dennis olberding (mp #66824), timothy schmitt (mp #67212), darrell gross (mp #66865), and brian mcpherson (mp #66996).

christopher was last seen swimming toward a boat that was drifting away from shore in the koozaata lagoon approximately 25 miles south of savoonga. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.
richard was last seen on 04/19/1988 during a boating accident near juneau, ak. he is presumed to be deceased.
gary went missing from fishing vessel big valley which sank 60 miles west of st. paul in the bering sea.

joseph went missing and is presumed to have drowned after falling overboard fishing vessel jeanoah approximately 45 miles southeast of old harbor. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.
john reportedly jumped from the fishing vessel corona infinity approximately 40 miles north of dutch harbor in the bering sea. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.
ted was last sen on 04/11/1986 during a boating accident, six miles northwest of st george island. he is presumed deceased.

norman was last seen on 07/18/1981. he was aboard an aircraft that was overdue from port walter to port lucy. he is missing with judy riddell (mp #66586), randall riddell (mp #66815), and rob mourant (mp #67097). all are presumed deceased.
michael was last seen on 1/29/2009 aboard the fishing vessel arctic fox when he jumped overboard in the priest rock area of amaknak island. he did not respond to rescue attempts by the crew members.

chad rawls and 3 other males left igiugig at approximately midnight on 07/28/2007 via skiff enroute to kakhanok. one person was rescued from the skiff on 07/30/2007 and another one was located deceased on 07/31/2007. also missing is clinton abarca.

samantha went missing with her two sisters, mp66478 katherine davis and mp66482 jesse davis, after the aircraft piloted by her father flew into lake clark into the ice. she was unable to get out of the aircraft before it sank. her mother and father survived the crash.

charles and erik kveum (mp66752) went missing and are presumed to be deceased after the skiff they were on was located upside down near yakutat. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.

michael went missing off of fishing vessel legend which sank near cape douglas. michael went missing with mp66674 james garner and mp66894 douglas cundiff. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.
alan is presumed to have drowned in an overturned canoe on six mile river near hope road.

david was last seen on 02/27/1990 when the boat he was on, sank. he is missing with mickey aus (mp #66796) and tracy hill (mp #67259). the vessel was traveling from blaine, wa to king cove, ak. search efforts were hampered by 60 knot winds and seas up to 27 feet. all that was found was a life raft, an epirb, and one survival suit. the raft was found 70 miles southeast of cordova near cape suckling. the three men are presumed to be deceased.

glenn cook was last seen on 05/06/1978 and is presumed to have drowned while boating from hydaburg to craig, ak. he went missing with verne edenshaw jr (mp #66955), victor (jay) burgess (mp #66676), delbert kelley (mp #66740), and william hamilton jr (mp #67265). they were last seen at waterfall resort approximately 15 mi from craig. one skiff was found submerged near cruz island in san alberto bay, and the other was found tied to a rock in canoe pass.

harry sheldon was traveling from kotzebue to noorvik in a wooden boat with 3 other subjects. the boat was recovered in the brush approximately 40 feet from shore on lockhart point. the 3 others were located deceased, but harry has never been found.

raymond and douglas sheldon (mp#66895) went seal hunting via snow machine in the kotzebue sound on the morning of 05-20-1999. they were reported overdue on 05-22-1999. an extensive search was conducted, and snow machine tracks were found going into an open lead of water. searches were unsuccessful in locating them.

rob was last seen on 07/18/1981. he was aboard an aircraft that was overdue from port walter to port lucy. he is missing with judy riddell (mp #66586), randall riddell (mp #66815), and norman riddell (mp #67073). all are presumed deceased.

william disappeared from a gold mine between marshall and russian mission the first week on june 1983. william was flown out to his gold mine and was supposed to be picked up by an individual on 7/18/83 and did not show up at the pick up site.
jerome was on a snow machine that broke through the sea ice.
john was last seen on 11/12/1980 during a boating accident near west point. he is presumed to be deceased.
william parsons jr. was last seen at his residence after a serious argument in approximately august 1965.
oscar is presumed to have drowned in the kuskowkim river between napakiak and napaskiak.
william is presumed to have drowned in a boating accident en route from ketchikan to metlakatla.
erwin is presumed to have drowned in a inflatable accident between pennock island and ketchikan, ak.
cathleen currie was last seen on 06/21/2012 walking up stream near the salmon river in hyder.
gary was last seen on 04/07/1980 while crossing the upper skilak landing to caribou island via snow machine, on thin ice. he is presumed to have drowned.
david was a hiker who went missing after falling into a crevasse in wrangell st. elias national park.
randall went missing and is presumed to have drowned after a tug boat may have rolled over and sank in the farragut bay in fredrick sound.

randall was last seen on 07/18/1981. he was aboard an aircraft that was overdue from port walter to port lucy. he is missing with judy riddell (mp #66586), norman riddell (mp #67073), and rob mourant (mp #67097).
allen and another person went through the ice on a snow machine on the kuskokwin river near the village of sleetmute. the body of the second person and the snow machine were recovered on 01/31/2001.
peter was last seen on 02/22/1981 when he was washed overboard from the fishing vessel, karin lyn, while setting crab pots in the bering sea. he is presumed deceased.
werner was last seen on 06/05/1990 in ketchikan, ak. he walks with a slight limp.
keith went overboard while setting crab pots on fishing vessel, seabrooke, approximately 5 miles southwest of amak island. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.
charles went missing from fishing vessel nicolle n while traveling from wa to sitka. charles is presumed to have gone overboard between cape muzon and cape addington.

marjorie moore's vehicle was located in a pull-out at mile 26 of the seward highway on 07-28-09. she was last heard from a month prior. the vehicle appeared to be abandoned and had the keys and clothing inside. a set of false teeth were located between the truck and trail river. the teeth were shattered and scattered along a wooden wall paralleling the river. no signs of foot prints leaving the area were located and there weren't any signs of a struggle near the vehicle or around the waters edge. despite multiple searches, marjorie was never located.
john was last seen on 05/06/1983. his destination was unknown.

dennis was last seen at the st. mary's airport. snow machine tracks led to the mouth of andreafski and yukon rivers. he is presumed to have drowned. he was riding a ski-doo mxz500 or 550 which was black in color with a rack on the rear. several searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating dennis.

robert was last seen on 03/22/1990 when the 162 foot fishing trawler, aleutian enterprise, capsized and sank in the bering sea with the crewmen aboard. he is missing with nelo marciel (mp #67109), joseph alaimo (mp #66746), matthew schneider (mp #66931), jeffrey houston (mp #66905), javier valenzuela (mp #66739), david jefferies (mp #66724), john dieterich (mp #67278), and robert mccord (mp #66701).
james was last seen on 08/05/1991 in a skiff of the fishing vessel, tiffy.

gerald went missing from metlakatla after a domestic dispute. his overturned canoe was recovered in the chester bay area of annette island. his campsite was also located but he was not in the area. air and ground searches were unsuccessful in locating him. he is presumed to be deceased.
robert was last seen on either 02/17 or 02/18/1991 with plans to travel from nome to solomon. his snowmachine was located on 05/21/1991 a 1/2 mile west of the bonanza creek bridge in norton sound.

david was last seen on 03/22/1990 when the 162 foot fishing trawler, aleutian enterprise, capsized and sank in the bering sea with the crewmen aboard. he is missing with nelo marciel (mp #67109), joseph alaimo (mp #66746), matthew schneider (mp #66931), jeffrey houston (mp #66905), javier valenzuela (mp #66739), john dieterich (mp #67278), robert mccord (mp #66701), and robert davis jr (mp #67158).
thomas was last seen on 01/10/1980 hiking from hollis yacc camp to karta lake by an unknown route. he is presumed to be deceased.

eugene was last seen on 01/12/1988 during a boating accident in the area of geese island near old harbor in kodiak. he was on board with two other crewmen who were located deceased. debris from the fishing vessel was located, but earches of the area were unsuccessful in locating eugene.

matthew was aboard the fishing vessel "pacesetter" which sank 60 miles southeast of st. george island. also missing is stanley eftestad mp67159, michael ericson mp67022, bryon koesterman mp66818, stephen mack mp66970, elias pena mp66770, and richard anderson mp66995.
fredrick is presumed to have drowned near sheldon point.

aboard fishing vessel camelot along with richard behmlander that departed the sitka harbor between 0900 and 1100 enroute to the fishing grounds located just outside salisbury sound. they were to return on 01/09/1986. after failing to show, a close friend of both individuals contacted the coast guard in sitka. they activated a search and rescue on 01/13/1986. the search was suspended on 01/17/1986 as a result of no leads.

timothy was last seen on 02/10/1991 aboard the 98 foot steel crab fishing vessel, barbarossa, which was lost in the bering sea about 30 miles west of st. george island. the coast guard received a distress call from the boat around 1:00am but searches did not locate the boat or the crewmen. it is presumed that the boat capsized and sank. timothy is missing with five other crewmen including donald bright (mp #66651), george brandenburg (mp #67271), dennis olberding (mp #66824), darrell gross (mp #66865), and brian mcpherson (mp #66996).
isaac went missing from fishing vessel jamie lynn which sank while being towed to dutch harbor from st. paul. also missing is christopher clark and anton kochergin.
reamy is missing and presumed deceased after his skiff was located near pelican island capsized. extensive searches revealed no leads.
gregory was the victim of a boating accident near yakutat, ak. he is presumed to be deceased.
david was last seen in seward and has not been seen or heard from since.

elias was aboard the fishing vessel "pacesetter" which sank 60 miles southeast of st. george island. also missing is stanley eftestad mp67159, michael ericson mp67022, bryon koesterman mp66818, stephen mack mp66970, richard anderson mp66995, and matthew pope mp67277.

rhody and another male left the kenai river on 06/27/1987 on a houseboat bound for iliamna bay. the other males body washed ashore at dry bay, iniskin peninsula on 06/29/1987. debris from the houseboat was also located. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating rhody.
eric went overboard on the f/v 'seeker' approximately 10 miles northwest of unimak island.
anthony went missing and is presumed to have drowned after a boating accident near kasaan bay.

andrew, lawrence gray, mp #67190, and larry sanders left hoonah headed to glacier bay in an open skiff. they were due back in juneau on 06-07-1998 but never arrived. search efforts were unsuccessful in locating them or the boat. on 06-27-1998, the body of larry sanders was located.
donald was last seen on 02/14/1991 when his boat, f/v thunderbird sank one mile north of cape ommaney. he is presumed to have drowned.
gordon went missing after an aircraft accident near gustavus along with 3 others. he is presumed to be deceased.

melvin was a crewman on a fishing vessel on 02/14/1985 when it was reported missing between uganik bay and alitak bay. he is missing with shawn heaney (mp #66821), ray basel (mp #67230), paul rowe (mp #67034), and sveinn adalsteinsson (mp #67238). no debris from the boat or bodies have been found.

fishing vessel scandies rose capsized and sank approximately 2.75 miles southeast of sutwik island near kodiak island. missing are david cobban, gary cobban, arthur ganacias, brock rainey and seth gano.
joseph and daylon tall, mp66779, are presumed to have drowned after their canoe overturned in the bering sea near hooper bay. search efforts were unsuccessful in locating them.
christopher went missing after an aircraft accident near gustavus along with 3 others. he is presumed to be deceased.
arans was last seen on 05/16/1991 when he fell overboard the fishing vessel prinsengracht near the katzhein river in the lynn canal. he is presumed to be deceased.
selin was last seen in anchorage, ak on 08/24/2006.
john was last seen on 08/13/1986 after he fell overboard f/v shadrach near the end of whale pass on fishing vessel, shadrach. he is presumed deceased.
tony was last seen at approximately 3pm traveling via 4-wheeler from iliamna to kokahnok. tony was never located despite several searches of the area.
robert was last seen on 08/29/1989 during a boating trip. his body has not been found.
william and richard condon, mp #66884, went missing after a boating accident 6 miles east of providenyia russia.

michael went missing from fishing vessel providence in the bering sea approximately 87 miles wnw of port moller. a crewman jumped into the water in an attempt to rescue him, but michael went under water before he could reach him. despite search efforts, michael was never located.
robert is missing and presumed to be deceased from fishing vessel evanick while in route to togiak from kodiak.
blaise was a crew member who went missing from motor vessel seledang ayu when the vessel ran aground after engine failure off spray cape unalaska in dutch harbor.
peter is a british tourist who is presumed to be deceased after going missing while hiking in the mountains near sitka, ak.

media reports that dwight florin (mp #67237) and kaino dixon were crewmen on the fishing vessel, cougar. they left the cougar in a 12' aluminum fishing skiff, dawn, late on thursday, 11/12/1981 to hunt on kodiak island. the men apparently were stranded by increasingly bad weather which churned up to 6-8' breakers near the beach. as night fell, they flashed an sos to the cougar and later fired a distress flare. then later, they fired a non-distress flare. crewmen from the fishing vessel tried to reach the island thursday night but were turned back by rough seas. when the crewmen finally reached shore on friday, 11/13/1981, they found no sign of the men or the skiff. both men are presumed deceased.

latroye went overboard from the f/v flying ocean near cape ikolik in the shelikof strait, southwest of karluk. the crew was deploying pots when williams' right ankle got caught in the coiled line and he was subsequently dragged overboard with the pot. they attempted to throw latroye a life ring as well as mark the spot with buoys, but williams disappeared under the water. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

james went missing off of fishing vessel legend which sank near cape douglas. james went missing with mp66874 michael barney and mp66894 douglas cundiff. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.
anton went missing from fishing vessel jamie lynn which sank while it was being towed to dutch harbor from st. paul. also missing is christopher clark and isaac zacharof.

colin was last seen 6/19/2012 when he went kayaking/hiking down the kikahe and stikine river and never returned. he last checked in on his spot gps locator on 06/22/2012 at 0800 hours. his pack and raft were recovered, and items belonging to colin were found in the upper portion of the west forks katete river area. colin is believed to have overturned in his raft. extensive searches were conducted, but were unsuccessful in locating him.

shakti was last seen on 09/17/1995 when she was swept downstream six miles above three forks on the lethe river. she had been attempting to ford the stream with two companions on a trek through the valley of 10,000 smokes. during searches, shakti's backpack was located. the two companions survived but shakti is presumed to have drowned.
robert has been missing since 03/12/1983 and is presumed to be deceased from a boating accident near alitak bay.
roger was traveling via snowmachine between elim and koyuk when we went through the ice. his snowmachine and his cell phone were located, but roger was not found.

theodore left kulukak bay for togiak in an open 19' skiff. his skiff was found overturned on a beach at rocky point on 07/07/1995. several searches of the area were conducted, but theodore was never located.
james was last seen on 07/05/1986 when he went missing during a rafting trip on the tiekel river.
samuel is presumed to be deceased after attempting to swim to shore when skiff ran out of gas 15 miles northeast of the northern end of shuyak island near kodiak.
ronald was last seen on 07/17/1986 when he was pulled overboard while setting crab pots. this occurred at 61* north and 177* west. he was in the fishing vessel, sprint of the north.
donald was a crew member who went missing from fishing vessel uyak which sunk 20 miles south of sitkalidak island near kodiak, ak.
kent was last known to be in fairbanks, ak. his last contact with family was via phone in the summer of 2006. he was a transient as was believed to be living in the woods somewhere.

robert was last seen on 03/22/1990 when the 162 foot fishing trawler, aleutian enterprise, capsized and sank in the bering sea with the crewmen aboard. he is missing with nelo marciel (mp #67109), joseph alaimo (mp #66746), matthew schneider (mp #66931), jeffrey houston (mp #66905), javier valenzuela (mp #66739), david jefferies (mp #66724), john dieterich (mp #67278), and robert davis jr (mp #67158).
timothy was last seen on 03/23/1986 during a boating accident near uyak bay in kodiak. he is presumed deceased.

john was last seen on 03/22/1990 when the 162 foot fishing trawler, aleutian enterprise, capsized and sank in the bering sea with the crewmen aboard. he is missing with nelo marciel (mp #67109), joseph alaimo (mp #66746), matthew schneider (mp #66931), jeffrey houston (mp #66905), javier valenzuela (mp #66739), david jefferies (mp #66724), robert mccord (mp #66701), and robert davis jr (mp #67158).
thomas was last seen on 02/14/1997. he is presumed to have drowned enroute from prince rupert in british columbia, canada to ketchikan, ak. parts of thomas' kayak and other property were located.
billy was last seen on 12/01/1980 when he went into lake aleknagik on a snowmobile.
lloyd went missing in an aircraft in the area of barnanof island near sitka, ak. aircraft pilot and four passengers are missing.

david was last seen on 02/22/1987 when he washed overboard from the fishing vessel, alliance, about 12.5 miles southeast of augustine island while setting crab pots. media reports that the first siting of david was when he was seen approximately 100 yards off the starboard stern of the vessel. all attempts to rescue him were unsuccessful.
fred was last seen on 04/13/1991 when he was lost in glacier bay national park during a canoe trip.
cory is presumed to have drowned off of a boat between protection point and cape constantine.
henry was last seen in fairbanks, ak on 06/01/1995.
colleen was last seen on 06/03/1984 when she went missing from a capsized canoe on the coleen river outside fort yukon.

fred was last seen 09/09/1986 aboard the fishing vessel, normar ii, which sank in the bering sea, 70 miles northeast of the pribilof islands. he is missing with kenneth ridgley (mp #66794), richard bennett (mp #66888), and annabelle moser (mp #66546).

james and patrick flanery (mp #66990) were last seen on 06/26/1991 when the boat, betty b, struck a rock and capsized off the coast of atka. search and rescue was performed by the coast guard but the men were not found.
bonifacio went missing from fishing vessel kimberly from the bering sea.

mitchell routinely sent letters to his family from nome, alaska after moving there around 1965. may have also been living in the fairbanks area. the letters stopped around 1973 and no one has heard from him since. date of last contact is approximate.

michael was aboard the fishing vessel "pacesetter" which sank 60 miles southeast of st. george island. also missing is stanley eftestad mp67159, richard anderson mp66995, bryon koesterman mp66818, stephen mack mp66970, elias pena mp66770, and matthew pope mp67277.

james was last seen on 03/14/1988 during a boating accident. he was a crew member on the fishing vessel, george w, which sunk between shelikof strait and the uyak bay area. two other crew members were located deceased in a life raft near chignik. no trace of the fishing vessel or james were ever found.
travis went missing while traveling from tuluksak to kalskag on a black honda 4-wheeler.
vernon is missing and presumed deceased after the fishing vessel transition was reported overdue on a trip between juneau and ketchikan. also missing is michael dunne mp 67129.
roy is presumed to have drowned after the skiff he was in capsized after losing propulsion in heavy surf off of the coast of gambell se of cape navareen.

dennis was last seen on 02/10/1991 aboard the 98 foot steel crab fishing vessel, barbarossa, which was lost in the bering sea about 30 miles west of st. george island. the coast guard received a distress call from the boat around 1:00am but searches did not locate the boat or the crewmen. it is presumed that the boat capsized and sank. dennis is missing with five other crewmen including donald bright (mp #66651), george brandenburg (mp #67271), timothy schmitt (mp #67212), darrell gross (mp #66865), and brian mcpherson (mp #66996).

patrick was last seen on 01/03/1994 in nenana, ak. he broke through the nenana river ice between roadway bridge and the railroad bridge on a snowmachine. search efforts were unsuccessful in locating him.
daniel is missing from a boating accident that occurred on 07/18/1974 on skilak lake near the mouth of the kenai river.

edward was last seen on 05/25/1991. he is presumed to have died in an aircraft accident in the waters outside of larsen bay. edward was flying a rockwell s-2r thrush commander that crashed one mile offshore and sank into 185 feet of water. at the time of the accident, the weather was an indefinite ceiling of 100 feet obscured, visibility one mile, and fog. witnesses stated that the airplane was flying low, close to the water, when the accident occurred.

boris was last seen departing kotzebue on a borrowed snow machine. he was traveling to sheshalik for a funeral via kotzebue sound but never arrived and never returned to kotzebue. at the time of his disappearance, open water and thin ice were reported in the area of the kotzebue sound and the trail leading to sheshalik.

kenneth was last seen sometime 09/09/1986 aboard the fishing vessel, normar ii, which sank in the bering sea, 70 miles northeast of the pribilof islands. he is missing with fred (aka alex) halsworth (mp #67232), richard bennett (mp #66888), and annabelle moser (mp #66546).
missing from a boat that was found by midway rock in peril straits on fire at 3:30 pm on 06/19/1989. also missing is rodney herman.

mark went missing from a 48' fishing vessel 'shenandoah' after it left homer en route to seward towing a 65' vessel 'mary j.' the coast guard received an eprib signal in the area of rocky bay and found a life raft from the 'shenandoah' in the area. the 'mary j' was located aground in windy bay. also missing is patrick demichele, mp #67013.. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.
daniel and tony myers (mp #66723) went missing and are presumed to have drowned after a skiff accident on the east end of gravina island. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.
gilbert fell from his boat in goodnews bay channel while fishing. he was never located despite search efforts.

javier was last seen on 03/22/1990 when the 162 foot fishing trawler, aleutian enterprise, capsized and sank in the bering sea with the crewmen aboard. he is missing with nelo marciel (mp #67109), joseph alaimo (mp #66746), matthew schneider (mp #66931), jeffrey houston (mp #66905), david jefferies (mp #66724), john dieterich (mp #67278), robert mccord (mp #66701), and robert davis jr (mp #67158).
john went missing from fishing vessel harvey g. which sank 100 miles north of cold bay.
carl was last seen on a snow machine from akiak to bethel.
edward was last seen operating a boat on the yukon river. he is presumed to have fallen overboard and drowned.
thomas was last seen on 12/12/1996. he is presumed to have drowned after the fishing vessel, oceanic, sank near veta bay, baker island.

don was traveling between kotzebue and deering in a converted 56 foot landing craft, the "seagull ii" carrying portable drill rig and pilings and never arrived. also missing is rodney howarth (mp#68186).

paul was a crewman on a fishing vessel on 02/14/1985 when it was reported missing between uganik bay and alitak bay. he is missing with shawn heaney (mp #66821), ray basel (mp #67230), melvin wick (mp #67035), and sveinn adalsteinsson (mp #67238). no debris from the boat or bodies have been found.
james was last in contact with family on 10/3/2016 via telephone and believed to be at his residence in fairbanks, ak. his clothing description and direction of travel are unknown.
kay was last seen walking into the woods with her two dogs near her home on 03/21/1995. both dogs returned home. despite search efforts, kay was never located.
charles was last seen in fairbanks, ak on 12/06/2011.
paul's boat, spell bound, was located going in circles unmanned in auke bay. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

aboard fishing vessel "vestfjord" that sank about 30 miles south of the trinity islands just west of kodiak island with 6 crew members. two crew members were located deceased. also missing are richard legary mp66948, daniel mcdonald mp66777, and kevin melnick mp67269.
paul was last seen at a cabin on the chatanika river when he left to talk to murphy dome and then to hitchhike to fairbanks. air and ground searches were unsuccessful in locating him.
left noorvik to hunt birds on a blue polaris 340 snowmachine and hasn't been seen or heard from since. search efforts resulted in negative results. also missing is alfred coffin.

missing aboard white fixed-wing twin engine cessna 421c tail #n800dd that departed juneau enroute king salmon. pilot reported right engine trouble and was going to attempt an emergency landing on middleton island in prince william sound. the airplane wreckage was located 09/29/1996, but the victims weren't located inside. also missing are allen gelin and mark pickar.
james and his wife were canoeing on the togiak river. she was located deceased and the canoe was found unoccupied. despite search efforts james was never located.
michael was reported missing on 04/22/1997 by his sister. she stated that she had received a birthday card on 11/23/1977 from michael, but hadn't had any contact from him since.

a friend reported that he last spoke to delbert on the afternoon of 08/20/1966 and they had planned a trip for the following morning. sometime that night, delbert left his trailer and the trailer was padlocked from the outside. his vehicles were still parked at his residence.

alvin was last seen at a hunting camp near the chitina river in glennallen, ak on 02/06/1977. he was flown to a cabin on the upper chitina river to attend to some horses. he was dropped off with horse feed and his belongings and food. when the owner of the horses flew out to check on him, alvin couldn't be located. ground and air searches met with negative results.
nathan was flown into carey lake in denali national park on 05/27/2020. he was supposed be arrange to be picked up on 09/15/2020, but hasn't been heard from.
janice left her home and hasn't been seen or heard from since.
jenae and david simmons (mp 76236) are missing after a landslide in haines, ak on 12-02-2020.

bernice, chad chadwick, neal gutleben, alexie nose, michael sharp, elizabeth wassillie and wilson wassillie were traveling by boat from quinhagak. their boat was last seen near the mouth of the eek river on 10/20/2020. numerous searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.
alexei was aboard a boat that capsized approximately 17 miles east of nome. search efforts were unsuccessful in locating him.
missing from a rafting accident near cape yakataga in the gulf of alaska. search efforts were met with negative results.

missing in a beechcraft v35a airplane with tail #n216jb. plane is white with red and blue trim. last heard from 10 miles east of gulkana. an 11-day search was conducted with negative results. also missing is richard johsnon.
victim fell out of a boat when it hit a rock approximately 9 to 10 miles up the kahiltna river from the mouth of the yetna river.

justina went missing after the f/v sea hawk capsized in inanudak bay, on umnak island, about 80 miles southwest of dutch harbor. she was a cook on the vessel. five other crew members were were rescued by the coast guard cutter boutwell. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating her.

missing in a beechcraft bonanza b-36 aircraft, tail #n6709q that was enroute from glennallen to ketchikan. final communication with the aircraft was approximately 18 miles inland of cape yakataga. wreckage was located at an elevation of about 5,100 feet in snow-covered mountains roughly 17 miles northwest of cape yakataga. also missing is melissa mcmartin, mp #108211.
noah's last known contact was with his wife 1 hour prior to flight departure from anchorage to seattle.
carl and 2 others were boating on the kuskokwin river in bethel and were reported overdue. extensive searches of the area located the other 2 persons onboard deceased.

mary wilson was reported missing on 07-14-2022 at 0130 hours, when her vehicle was located stuck at approximately 6.8 mile of the stampede trail near healy. inside the vehicle was an approximately two-year-old girl who mary had agreed to watch for several days. mary was last seen the morning of 07-12-2022 at a residence near healy where she stayed the night with friends. personal items belonging to mary were located at approximately 7.8 mile of the stampede trail. extensive searches of the area have been unsuccessful in locating her.

brian was last seen at approximately 1600 hours leaving the village of healy lake on a green open cab polaris ranger side-by-side. he didn't show up to meet a friend around 1800 hours. searches of the area have been unsuccessful in locating him.

missing after a piper pa-18-150 aircraft, n4481z, was destroyed when it was involved in an accident about 60 miles northwest of skwentna. wreckage was located at the bottom of an estimated 500 to 600 ft ravine of the west fork of the yentna river, also known as shellabarger pass in denali national park and preserve. missing with jason tucker, mp #107643.
dean walked away from his residence after a verbal argument. he has been spotted numerous times at wonderland park on 05-15-2022 and off horizon drive on 9-19-2022 .
jaiman was last seen at the rescue mission in anchorage on 08/04/2021. he moved to alaska from las vegas. attempts to contact him at both known phone numbers have been unsuccessful.
pauline was last seen in anchorage in december 2019.
dearow drove away from a residence in a 2009 nissan rouge with an unknown plate number.
nafiun and eli michel (mp104177) are both missing after they attempted to summit the west ridge of moose's tooth in denali national park. searches of the area have been unsuccessful in finding them.

shima and her mother, yoshiko funakoshi mp #98457, were aboard a 406 caravan airplane with tail number n6591l that left barrow heading for wainwright when it crashed. debris and oil slick were found 10 miles northeast of wainwright in an area of the ocean with a depth of 75 feet. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.

carter and lane smyth (mp #99537) went missing after attempting to beach their small boat when it swamped in narrow cape south of kodiak island. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.
tracey made arrangements to pick up medication at sister's residence a week prior to reporting his disappearance but never showed.

witold was reported missing on 07-12-2022 at approximately 1301 hours. he purchased some property near homer and took a maritime aviation helicopter in to build a cabin on the property either the last week of june or the first week of july 2022. since he was dropped off, he has not been seen or heard from since.
glenn left his brother's residence and hasn't been seen or heard from since.
missing aboard a 1948 silver beechcraft bonanza a35 aircraft with tail number n410b that left gustavus enroute to yakutat. also missing is hans munich (mp 128304) and samuel wright (mp 128305).
devon was last seen jumping into the chena river at the cushman bridge. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.
victor was last in contact with a family member on 09-08-2024. he recently moved to anchorage from miami for work and has been in anchorage since 08-26-2024.

the united states coast guard (uscg) received an emergency position indicating radiobeacon (epirb) alarm activation in the area north of thorne bay coming from the fishing vessel david owns, canis majoris. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating david or his vessel.
arjorie has not been in contact with family since 07-31-2024. she is currently unhoused.
john has not been in contact with family since 01-20-2025.
eric has not been in contact with out of state family since may 2024. he did update his ol photo at the dmv on 12-24-2024.

christopher hasn't been in contact with family for quite some time. an out of state family member reported him missing on 09-14-2024. he traveled from ohio to alaska in may of 2024. on 10-19-2024, christopher was contacted by vpso's from eagle and tok at mile 96.5 of the taylor highway. he was escorted to tok but there has been no communication since.
kimberly was last heard from on 07-28-2025 via text message.

craig was last seen walking on front street in tanana on the evening of 08-02-2025. he told a friend that he might go swimming and never showed up for work on 08-04-2025. searches of the area have been unsuccessful in locating him.
missing after typhoon halong swept across kwigillingok. also missing is chester kashatok, mp151773.
antonio left his assisted living home and never returned.
devin has not been in contact with family members since may 2025. he was planning on coming to alaska to work for a fish processing plant in dutch harbor.
alison has not been in contact with family members since december 2024.
hazel left her residence on the evening of 11-12-2025 and never returned.
bruce was last heard from via phone on 10-10-2025 around 1300 hours.
alfreda has not been in contact with family members since 02-04-2026. she is currently experiencing homelessness in anchorage.

megan was last seen on july 7, 1973. megan's front teeth protrude. she was last known to be wearing blue jeans, a white long sleeve checkered shirt, a brown short sleeve sweatshirt, and suede ski boots.
stella was last seen at home on august 26, 1996. stella may still be in the local area or she may be in the anchorage, alaska area.

damon bonds was last seen by friends on saturday, march 27, 2004. his truck was found in the parking lot at delong lake on march 31. his dog was in the bed of the truck under a canopy, the doors were unlocked and his cell phone was on the front seat, but there was no sign of damon. the apd auxiliary search team, assisted by a dog trained to find cadavers, hunted for bonds in the area around his truck but found no signs of him. damon's friends and family insist that he never would have left his dog and are convinced he met with foul play.
steven was last seen in the vicinity of mile 298 parks hwy in nenana, ak.

the child, his parents and a family friend left to go fishing on a boat out of homer harbor to the area of flat island in the lower cook inlet. it is believed the boat capsized due to rough water conditions. the parents' bodies were recovered; however, the child and the family friend's (roger hanson, namus mp #57515) whereabouts are unknown.

phuong tran was last seen dropping off two fishermen at the spit dock in dutch harbor on 01-10-2003 at approximately 1:00 or 2:00 am. tran was driving a 1993 ford truck from b.c. rentals. the vehicle was found on 01-12-2003, parked at the small boat launch by alyeska seafoods. tran was working on the f/v retriever which was also docked at the alyeska dock.
alfred kochendorfer was last seen at a gas station in the butte area outside of palmer, alaska on october 27, 2000. his 4 wheeler was found 1 mile from his residence at jims creek in palmer.

wallace dunn was last seen in anchorage, alaska on 7/11/13 heading to his cabin in big lake, alaska. he was driving a 1998 ford truck which was later located near his cabin. his clothing description is unknown.
dashawn was last seen on april 1, 2013.
archie henry was last seen at a relative's home on the day he went missing.

nathan oney is presumed to have drowned while enroute mountain village to pitkas point via yukon river when the boat he was in struck a sandbar and he was thrown overboard. his friend threw a life jacket but nathan was unable to reach it.
suspected homicide victim, no body found.
jael was last seen on 10/12/2014 in anchorage, alaska.

joseph giamanco was last seen at a residence on brian street in soldotna, alaska. witnesses at the residence advised giamanco had become involved in an altercation and was last seen running into the woods. an extensive search failed to locate him.
samantha was last seen november 1, 1993. she was reported missing by her landlord. she was a dancer at pj's. suspicious circumstances surround her disappearance.

missing aircraft, white and orange cessna n1812h overdue from anchorage to juneau. last known position in area of malaspina glacier in the wrangell-st. elias mountains. also missing are thomas boggs sr, russel brown and don jones. searches were unsuccessful in locating them.
mp last seen at his homestead near donkey lake, located west of mount yenlo.

michael lemaitre disappeared during the mount marathon race on 07/04/2012. he was last seen about 200 feet from mount marathon's summit. extensive searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

missing aircraft, white and orange cessna n1812n overdue from anchorage to juneau. last known position in area of malaspina glacier in the wrangell-st. elias mountains. also missing are nicholas begich, thomas boggs sr, and don jones.

thomas was last seen aboard an airplane that departed anchorage, alaska en route to juneau, alaska on october 16, 1972. during a campaign fundraising tour, thomas hale boggs sr. and fellow congressman, nicholas begich boarded a twin-engine cessna 310 airplane. last known position in area of malaspina glacier in the wrangell-st. elias mountains. also aboard the plane were the pilot, don edgar jonz and congressman begich’s aide, russell l. brown.
emmett nollner was last seen traveling via boat from nulato to ruby. also missing with him are claude demoski, bertha demoski, leo demoski and harry pitka.
victim of kodiak western airlines gumman goose plane crash in water near cape chiniak, off kodiak island. also missing are robert hall, frank rodman and alex inga, sr.
ralph last had contact with family in 1981. he has not been seen or heard from since.
victim fell overboard from f/v "yukon" near rugged island, resurrection bay.

valeriano flores-mata was last seen onboard or near the f/v deep pacific as it prepared to leave st. paul harbor on july 24, 2004 at 9:15 p.m. a few hours out to sea, crewmembers were unable to locate flores-mata. search efforts by the u.s.c.g and st. paul police department were unsuccessful both on land and at sea.

fredrick e. bock was last seen on 7-26-2017 at approximately 2240 hours while fishing near pilot point, ak. he was aboard the f/v lady kolean and is presumed to have fallen overboard. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.
michael was last seen on 06/24/1998 aboard the motor vessel, tustemena. it is presumed that he fell overboard and drowned.
richard went missing and is presumed to be deceased after a boating accident near kake.
harold was last seen on 05/10/1991 when he went missing from a skiff in the sea otter sound area. he is presumed to be deceased.
daylon and joseph tomaganuk, mp66582, are presumed to have drowned after their canoe overturned in the bering sea near hooper bay. search efforts were unsuccessful in locating them.

nathan left russian mission on a snow machine enroute to marshall around 0500 hours on 03-13-2001. snow machine tracks were found going into an open lead of water 20 miles down the yukon river from russian mission. his snow machine, rifle and shotgun were located from the open lead, but nathan was never located.
josias went missing from fishing vessel big valley which sank 60 miles west of st. paul in the bering sea.
kenneth went missing from fishing vessel harvey g which sank 100 miles north of cold bay.
michael left his home injured due to a self-inflicted knife wound and has not been seen since.
keith was last seen on 06/26/1977. he did not return from a canoe trip on kenai lake in seward, ak. he is presumed to have drowned. also missing is richard erchinger.
laura was last seen on a fishing vessel which capsized along with skiff 10 miles southeast of chisik island in the cook inlet.
manuel fell overboard at approximately 3.5 miles south of whale bone cape off unalaska.
robert was last seen on 08/23/1980. his boat was found aground in a slough north of emmonak on the yukon river. he is presumed to have drowned.

blaine was last seen in kotzebue, ak on 10/01/1998. he was enroute to buckland with walter thomas when their skiff disappeared. debris was found washed up on the shore between cape blossom and riley wreck.
george went missing from fishing vessel arctic rose which sank 205 miles northwest of st. paul island.

shawn was a crewman on a fishing vessel on 02/14/1985 when it was reported missing between uganik bay and alitak bay. he is missing with ray basel (mp #67230), melvin wick (mp #67035), paul rowe (mp #67034), and sveinn adalsteinsson (mp #67238). no debris from the boat or bodies have been found.
jamie was a crew member who went missing from fishing vessel uyak ii, which sank 20 miles south of sitkalidak island near kodiak. he is presumed to be deceased.
leslie was last seen on 06/13/1984 when her boat capsized in new halen river.
joseph was last seen on 07/12/1981. the vehicle driven by the victim was found overturned in the lowe river.

harry went missing after he was reported overdue on a boating trip across wrangell narrows. searchers located his boat on the northeast side of sasby island adrift with its motor in the upward position. a life jacket was found onboard. he is presumed to be deceased.
steven went missing from bird creek. he was swept into the inlet.

edgar was last seen on 08/12/1989. he was one of four onboard an overdue cessna n1211v coming from the caribou creek, king mountain area. wreckage from the crash was found on 08/16/1990 in a ravine approximately one mile southwest of hicks lake. he is missing with james slaybaugh (mp #67069), robert horn (mp #67216), and richard floyd (mp #66863).
jason went missing while whale hunting after the boat he was on capsized in the bering sea 5-7 miles offshore west of gambell. he is presumed to have drowned.
relu went overboard from a container ship 'new york express' sailing from the bering sea to the pacific ocean via unimak pass.
ronald was last seen in soldotna, ak on 07/18/1979. he jumped overboard when a fishing vessel caught fire.
emery went missing after a boating accident from wales to diomede with 4 other adults and 1 child. extensive search was unsuccessful.

sean was last seen on 12/12/1992. he, and three others, went missing from bucareli bay after the fishing vessel, sea castle, overturned. the four missing individuals were not wearing life vests or survival suits at the time of the accident. four additional people survived the accident. searches by the coast guard found pieces of wood, some styrofoam, and a jacket belonging to one of the missing children. sean is presumed to have died from hypothermia and washed off the boat by waves along with barry ritter (mp #66707), seth wade (mp #66484), and aaron castle (mp #66476).

jeffrey was last seen on 05/03/1992 in a twin-engine cessna 340, tail number n69469. he was on a trip from yakutat to anchorage. the last report to the faa air-traffic controllers was that the plane was at 12,000 feet and heading on instruments to anchorage. he is missing with timothy thornton (mp #67047), kent roth (mp #66733), brian barber (mp #66725), and scott roth (mp #66846).
louis was last seen on 07/31/1986 when he disappeared from a sport fishing boat on lake clark. the boat was found adrift with evidence indicating louis may have fallen overboard.
raymond was last seen on 12/03/1984 when he went overboard from a fishing vessel.

joseph and 5 others were aboard a plane that crashed 50 yards off shore on the east side of skagway harbor taiya inlet. two people were rescued and 2 people were located deceased. joseph and john l. blanda mp67249 were never located.
william is presumed to have drowned after the fishing vessel tamra dawn was reported to be sinking near clarence strait 2 mi from pt mccarty and south of ketchikan.
kenneth was last seen on 10/14/1988 in fairbanks, ak. he is presumed to be deceased.

scott and david mckenzie went missing from an airplane trip from haines to juneau. they were aboard a red and white pa-24 comanche with tail # n8694p. the last position reported was between point bridget and mab island, approximately 40 miles north of juneau. searches in the area were unsuccessful in locating them.

edward departed tuluksak enroute to his fish camp via the kuskokwim river. his unoccupied skiff was located stuck in ice approximately 10 miles north of tuluksak. he is presumed to have attempted to walk on the ice, fell through and drowned.
douglas is presumed to have drowned in kenai lake following a boating accident.
nichol and william cork, mp #67268 are missing in a plane that departed anderson bay at 1610 hours on a 20-minute flight to dutch harbor. part of plane was found on the beach in constantine bay.
larry was a passenger aboard an aircraft near the airstrip at bernard glacier and the aircraft did not return to jakes bar airstrip for a passenger.
missing in an avalanche on mount huntington in denali national park.

bethany was kayaking with her boyfriend when it overturned near casey island. they made it to shore and attempted to climb the rock ledge to safety. bethany became resistant and fell asleep on shore, she was pulled out to sea during the night.

john was last seen on 11/20/1990 when he fell overboard from the 100-foot fishing vessel, surland, about 90 miles northwest of the entrance to point moeller. he was pulled overboard when he became tangled with a crab line. extensive searches were conducted, but john was never located.
edward went missing from fishing vessel arctic rose which sank 205 miles northwest of st. paul island.

scott was last seen on 05/03/1992 in a twin-engine cessna 340, tail number n69469. he was on a trip from yakutat to anchorage. the last report to the faa air-traffic controllers was that the plane was at 12,000 feet and heading on instruments to anchorage. he is missing with jeffrey roth (mp #66877), timothy thornton (mp #67047), kent roth (mp #66733), and brian barber (mp #66725).
chris is presumed to be deceased when f/v western sea sunk in marmot bay between kodiak and afognak, ak.
wayne was last seen on 09/08/1982 near the yukon river bridge. he is presumed to have drowned.
christopher is presumed deceased when f/v western sea sunk in marmot bay between kodiak and afognak, ak.

david went missing after fishing vessel, nettie h, was lost at sea approximately 10 miles north of otter point on unimak island. missing with daniel soileau (mp67285), peter soileau (mp66930) and blake grinstein (mp66855).

allan was a crew member aboard the f/v swift that was operated by his uncle. allan is missing and presumed deceased after trying to swim to shore near excursion inlet. several searches of the area were conducted, but allan was never located.
thomas went missing from sheldon point, he is presumed to have drowned.

gregory smith was reported missing on 11-07-2019 at 1053 hours. he was last seen 10-22-2019 at 2027 hours by the georgeson botanical garden on the university of alaska fairbanks campus. he told an officer that he was on his way to murphy dome road and then left on foot towards sheep creek.

douglas went missing off of fishing vessel legend which sank near cape douglas. douglas went missing mp66674 james garner and mp66874 michael barney. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.

patrick and james weber (mp #67116) were last seen on 06/26/1991 when the boat, betty b, struck a rock and capsized off the coast of atka. search and rescue was performed by the coast guard but the men were not found.
jack is presumed to be deceased from a boating accident on fishing vessel ocean hope ii in shelikof straits. also missing is dennis frye, daniel tullar and michael wheeler.
johnny was last seen by his mother in the early summer of 2000. at that time, he said he was moving to soldotna.
bernabe was last seen in anchorage, ak.

james was reported missing after he was overdue from a fishing trip. his boat and dog were located on the north end of heceta island, between port alice and camp island. extensive searches were unable to locate him.

melvin possibly drowned in kachemak bay in homer, ak. reported overdue from canoeing. also missing are robert gershbein (mp #67213) and daniel orbik (mp #66820). searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.
john lomack went missing from a hunting trip on the hoholitna river at mile 25. he was last seen at the hunter checkpoint on a gravel bar near deep water.

robert possibly drowned in kachemak bay in homer, ak. reported overdue from canoeing. also missing are melvin mestre (mp #67205) and daniel orbik (mp #66820). searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.
aboard tug boat "roughneck" when it sank in serigus narrows near sitka. also missing is fred davis. search efforts were unsuccessful in locating them.
missing in civil air patrol (cap) cessna 180 on floats between yakutat and sitka. also missing is robert herman. despite search efforts, the plane nor the occupants were ever located.
wilma went missing and is presumed to be deceased near middle bay.
chase was last seen on 04/04/1988 at reflections in fairbanks, ak.
curtis ayuluk was last seen at his grandfather's residence on 12/15/2019.

matthew and ricky nebert (mp67275) went missing and are presumed to be deceased after their fishing vessel slayer went down near point gardner. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.
andrew was last seen on 07/30/1986. he is presumed to have drowned in the kuskokwim river.

daniel left a hunting camp located in the upper cheshnina river at approximately 1100 on august 13, 1985. he was riding one horse and leading a pack horse. on august 14th, hunters in the upper kotsina river valley found two horses and a dog alive on the south side of the kotsina river. the saddle horse was cut and bruised and the saddle was damaged from rolling in the river. a boot belonging to daniel was found near the lower kotsina river drainage. despite numerous searches of the area, daniel was never located.
francisco is presumed to be deceased. missing from fishing vessel morning star which sank near chief point in uyak bay.
paul was last known to be traveling to wainwright from barrow on a snow machine.
gary's skiff was found drifting upside down. gary was not located.
joseph went missing in an aircraft in the area of barnanof island near sitka, ak. aircraft pilot and four passengers are missing.
aaron went missing after falling into a crevasse at the 16,000 ft. level.
ralph was last seen walking from the village of tanana on alakakit trail to tozia river to visit a friend but he never arrived.

geoffrey was last seen on 09/30/1984 during a boating accident off of the southeast tip of atkins island near koniuju island. he is missing with philip odonoghue (mp #67153) and david miller jr (mp #66959). all three are presumed deceased.
ricky and matthew young (mp66627) went missing and are presumed to be deceased after their fishing vessel slayer went down near point gardner. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.
johnson was last seen riding a polaris 500 snogo.
brian fell overboard from crab boat gulf wind after he was entangled in the crab pot or line.

missing aboard white fixed-wing twin engine cessna 421c tail #n800dd that departed juneau enroute king salmon. pilot reported right engine trouble and was going to attempt an emergency landing on middleton island in prince william sound. the airplane wreckage was located 09/29/1996, but the victims weren't located inside. also missing are richard lindner and allen gelin.
richard and his companion, michael sattleen (mp #61317), were last seen in dillingham, ak on 08/22/1984. kenneth hunter was convicted of their murder.
anthony went missing on the kuskokwin river near akiak when his car fell through the ice. his vehicle was located by searchers upside down in open water.

missing from skiff that capsized near eastern channel in aleutkina bay. one person was able to swim to a rock off boidarkin island and was picked up by a passing boat. also missing is timothy moffitt.
richard went missing from camp in the denali park area.
gerald went missing in an aircraft in the area of barnanof island near sitka, ak. aircraft pilot and four passengers are missing.

barry was attempting to cross o'brien creek near the copper river in an argo when it was swept away. he jumped off the argo in an attempt to swim for shore, but never made it. search efforts were met with negative results.
scott went missing and is presumed to have drowned when fishing vessel northern dawn sank near volcano bay, unalaska island.
alfaz fell into the tanana river near the confluence of the chena river near the fairbanks international airport. he was last seen approximately 50 yards from shore prior to going under the water.

rob and paul todesco (mp #67014) went missing after a boating accident on kenai lake near porcupine island. the boat, motor and a backpack were located. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.

myron was skipper of his own boat, the cory b, when he was reported missing after high seas in the naknek area of bristol bay, alaska. he was last known heading north from cape craig. coast guard and land searches found some debris from his boat but no sign of myron.
kristopher was attempting to cross open water on a snowmachine on the kuskokwim river at sleetmute.
overdue plane missing between point hope and lisburne afs. hole in ice found 3 miles off shore north of kivalina large enough for an airplane.
william was last seen at the fairbanks rendevous club.
roy was last seen at bethel high school, reported to be walking to napakiak.
missing with aircraft 8648n in lake clark area with 3 passengers on board. also missing is kaitlyn blom, zachary blom, and scott blom.
