samuel left coffman cove in his boat driving erratically after a party. the boat was found submerged between bushy island and zarembo island in snow passage. search efforts were unsuccessful in locating him.
left anchorage enroute to mcgrath in an orange/brown/white cessna 170b, tail number n4640c.
claude demoski was last seen traveling via boat from nulato to ruby. also missing with him are bertha demoski, leo demoski, harry pitka and emmett nollner.

five individuals left talkeetna, alaska on a sight-seeing tour and the plane crashed and came to rest in a crevasse at almost 11,000 feet altitude, high on a knife-edge ridge of thunder mountain about 14 miles from denali's summit. victims are janusz intek, kazimierz miernik, maria libacka, robert sieniawski (all polish visitors) and craig layson from michigan. all victims have been confirmed deceased, but have not been recovered from the wreckage.

missing from f/v fierce competitor enroute from warrenton, or to king cove, ak. also missing are larry jones (#mp42381), gordon young (mp50287), vicki rowe-simonsen (#mp50289) and robert simonsen (#mp50288).
overdue from climbing the north face of mendenhall towers near juneau. also missing is marc andre leclerc, mp #42607.

arthur and charlene johnson were overdue from a hunting trip. debris was found 1/2 mile from the dillingham boat harbor and the boat was found upside down on a sandbar approximately 5.5 miles from the boat harbor.
bertha demoski was last seen traveling via boat from nulato to ruby. also missing with her are claude demoski, emmett nollner, leo demoski and harry pitka.

missing from f/v fierce competitor enroute from warrenton, or to king cove, ak. also missing are keithly young (#mp41723), larry jones (#mp42381), vicki rowe-simonsen (#mp50289) and robert simonsen (#mp50288).

gary love and virginia sacco departed the east river at dry bay in a cessna 170, n8190a. they were going to fly to yakutat for supplies and return to the east river. they did not return and were reported overdue on 07/31/93. a search of the flight route and area turned up a landing gear and wheel assembly from aircraft, which was located approximately 4 miles offshore near dry bay. a survival pack and shaving kit from the aircraft was located along the beach.

victim fell into copper river below o'brian creek while dip net fishing. he was seen calling for help but could not stay above water and did not resurface. a search using a helicopter was conducted, but the victim was not located.

louis was last seen on the evening of 05/29/1989 in his skiff in the klawock area. his skiff was found damaged and the gas tank empty on peratrovich island. an extensive search was conducted in the area on land, in the water as well as from the air, but he was never located.
missing from fish processor 'yardarm knot' 80 miles west of port moeller in the bering sea.
nancy was last seen on 03/27/1994. she may be with harold enzler (namus mp#61367).
william was boating between point baker and la boucher bay. his boat was found floating and overturned in the area.
hans has not been seen since 09/06/2003 when he was seen by his neighbors. his bicycle was found on indian creek trail on 10/12/2003.

dianna and her daughter christine (mp #61357) were aboard a vessel which caught fire and sank 30 miles nw of sitka near sinitsin island in approximately 450 feet of water. a dive of the area and a ground search of the surrounding beaches failed to find any trace of them. they are presumed deceased and robert j. meyer was convicted of their murder.
raymond failed to return from a commercial fishing trip. his swamped wooden skiff was found near cape etolin, about a mile offshore, but searches found no signs of him.

nick was last seen leaving bethel around 8pm in his 24-ft. boat enroute to tuntutuliak. the boat was later discovered adrift near helmick point on the kuskokwim river. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.
susan was dip net fishing along a steep bank of the copper river when she fell in the water approximately 2 miles south of o'brien creek.
shanna was last seen in the area of pleasant valley and chena hot springs road.

crew member missing aboard the f/v "st. george" which sank 152 nautical miles north of unimak pass. also missing is kevin clark, george dahl, sean mcwethy, david parkes and brian schouten. neither the vessel or the crew members were ever located despite numerous search efforts. the empty life raft was located 01/05/1992.

crew member missing aboard the f/v "st. george" which sank 152 nautical miles north of unimak pass. also missing is kevin clark, george dahl, terry james, sean mcwethy, and brian schouten. neither the vessel or the crew members were ever located despite numerous search efforts. the empty life raft was located 01/05/1992.

david was last seen on 09/30/1984 during a boating accident off of the southeast tip of atkins island near koniuju island. he is missing with geoffrey odonoghue (mp #67152) and philip odonoghue (mp #67153). all three are presumed deceased.
ulrich was last seen on 08/08/1989 when he was swept away in the leth river while trying to cross it. he wasn't seen again.

jurgen was last seen on 06/2/1996 when he went missing, while climbing mt. mckinley (denali). jurgen was climbing at denali pass in high winds and blowing snow when he became separated from his climbing partner.

sonja and 3 other children were playing on the ice in front of the village of diomede when she broke through the ice and fell into the water. her boots were recovered, but extensive searches failed to locate her.

paul and rob garrett (mp #67234) went missing after a boating accident on kenai lake near porcupine island. the boat, motor and a backpack were located. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.
michael possibly drowned. he was last seen after being dropped off by the cab company on 10/14/2000 at the mill.
john was last seen on 01/14/1985 after fishing vessel k-joe sank off pillar cape in marmot bay. he is presumed deceased.
michael fell overboard while fishing 90 miles northwest of port moller.
tony and daniel schalles (mp #66921) went missing and are presumed to have drowned after a skiff accident on the east end of gravina island. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.

matthew was last seen on 03/22/1990 when the 162 foot fishing trawler, aleutian enterprise, capsized and sank in the bering sea with the crewmen aboard. he is missing with nelo marciel (mp #67109), joseph alaimo (mp #66746), jeffrey houston (mp #66905), javier valenzuela (mp #66739), david jefferies (mp #66724), john dieterich (mp #67278), robert mccord (mp #66701), and robert davis jr (mp #67158).

blake went missing after his fishing vessel, nettie h, was lost at sea approximately 10 miles north of otter point on unimak island. missing with daniel soileau (mp67285), david soileau (mp66833), and peter soileau (mp66930).
gerald went missing after a boating accident on the yukon river 4 miles down river from stevens village. gerald is presumed to have drowned.
crew member aboard the f/v "northwest mariner" that capsized in the bering sea. also missing is james foster, lawrence johnston, and robert olson.

eugene was last seen on 08/10/1990. he was a passenger in a plane that was found overturned in nishlik lake, 75 miles south of aniak, ak. the other passenger was found deceased. eugene is presumed to have drowned.

joseph was last seen on 03/22/1990 when the 162 foot fishing trawler, aleutian enterprise, capsized and sank in the bering sea with the crewmen aboard. he is missing with nelo marciel (mp #67109), matthew schneider (mp #66931), jeffrey houston (mp #66905), javier valenzuela (mp #66739), david jefferies (mp #66724), john dieterich (mp #67278), robert mccord (mp #66701), and robert davis jr (mp #67158).
shawn went missing from fishing vessel arctic rose which sank 205 miles northwest of st. paul island.

ronald ramey and two others were attempting to cross lake aleknagik in a canoe when it capsized. one person was rescued and the other was found deceased 11 hours later. ronald has never been located despite numerous searches.
john and michael lami (mp #66953) were on board the fishing vessel, berta j, when it sank about 50 nautical miles south of yakutat.
calvin was knocked overboard by a wave from a fishing vessel northern orion 38 mi southwest of st paul island. a life ring was thrown but he made no attempts to grab it.

clinton abarca and 3 other males left igiugig at approximately midnight on 07/28/2007 via skiff enroute to kakhanok. one person was rescued from the skiff on 07/30/2007 and another one was located deceased on 07/31/2007. also missing is chad rawls.

on 07/27/1990, isaac and laura kuckes (mp #66532) left barrow on an outing that was to have lasted about 10 days. they were visited at their camp on 08/04/1990 by barrow residents seeking directions to a fishing camp on the chipp river. this was the last time they were seen. on 08/08/1990, searchers found the pair's 18 foot skiff overturned and stuck on a sandbar in admiralty bay, about 45 miles southeast of barrow, the northernmost community in the united states. a sleeping bag and laura's dog, which had drowned, were found as well. searchers later found canvas bags containing camping gear and medication owned by the pair. it is presumed that isaac and laura were headed back to barrow when their skiff capsized.

aaron was last seen on 12/12/1992. he, and three others, went missing from bucareli bay after the fishing vessel, sea castle, overturned. the four missing individuals were not wearing life vests or survival suits at the time of the accident. four additional people survived the accident. searches by the coast guard found pieces of wood, some styrofoam, and a jacket belonging to one of the missing children. aaron is presumed to have died from hypothermia and washed off the boat by waves along with barry ritter (mp #66707), seth wade (mp #66484), and sean castle (mp #66474).

shawn was last seen on 06/14/1990 when he went overboard off of a tug boat in resurrection bay in seward, ak. per media, shawn disappeared at about 6pm from a tug boat he was playing on or fishing from with a friend. he was on one of two large tugs tied together and anchored at the entrance to resurrection bay just before he disappeared. shawn originally had his life vest on but, for some reason, he had taken it off right before he disappeared. no one actually saw him go into the water but shawn is presumed to have drowned.
frank went missing after the skiff he was in was found floating on 10/06/1998. he was not wearing a life jacket.
douglas and 4 other crewmen were aboard the f/v "amber dawn" when it sank 6 miles north of atka in the bering sea. three men were rescued, but douglas and roman telak, mp #67274, were not located.
rodney was last seen on 05/30/1988. the fishing vessel he was in, golden venture, capsized about 13.2 miles west-northwest of st george island. rodney was not wearing any survival gear.

timothy was last seen on 05/03/1992 in a twin-engine cessna 340, tail number n69469. he was on a trip from yakutat to anchorage. the last report to the faa air-traffic controllers was that the plane was at 12,000 feet and heading on instruments to anchorage. he is missing with jeffrey roth (mp #66877), kent roth (mp #66733), brian barber (mp #66725), and scott roth (mp #66846).
crew member aboard the f/v "northwest mariner" that capsized in the bering sea. also missing is bruce forde, james foster, and lawrence johnston.
shawn went missing from fishing vessel harvey g. which sank 100 miles north of cold bay.
roger was last seen dropped off near a residence by chignik bay school. he was later reported to be on the fishing vessel captain g.
michael was last heard from on 08/09/1979 prepping for a 20 day excursion in glacier bay. his overturned canoe and personal items were found on the beach at entrance island in swanson harbor.

william and two other people were attempting to cross the yukon river slough in a canoe. during the crossing, the canoe flipped and all three occupants went into the water. two of the occupants were able to be pulled from the water, but william was not located.
stephen went missing on a training flight from juneau to young bay. the aircraft was never located.
william went missing from excursion inlet cannery. he was not found after an extensive search.

ronald and a passenger were riding a snow machine and are believed to have gone into an open lead of water. a single set of snow machine tracks were observed to terminate in open water at the confluence of the andreafski and yukon rivers between st. mary's and pitkas point. no tracks of any type came out of the water. searches of the area didn't locate ronald. the passenger was located deceased and positively identified on 07/31/2010.
thomas was last seen on 06/29/1987 when he did not return from a jet ski trip on auke lake near juneau. he is presumed to be deceased.

leslie was aboard the tug boat gail s, which sank 130 miles north of cold bay. he jumped into the water and was located deceased by another crew member. the crew member was unable to hold onto leslie and he was last seen floating in eight foot seas. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

richard was aboard the fishing vessel "pacesetter" which sank 60 miles southeast of st. george island. also missing is stanley eftestad mp67159, michael ericson mp67022, bryon koesterman mp66818, stephen mack mp66970, elias pena mp66770, and matthew pope mp67277.

brian was last seen on 02/10/1991 aboard the 98 foot steel crab fishing vessel, barbarossa, which was lost in the bering sea about 30 miles west of st. george island. the coast guard received a distress call from the boat around 1:00am but searches did not locate the boat or the crewmen. it is presumed that the boat capsized and sank. brian is missing with five other crewmen including donald bright (mp #66651), george brandenburg (mp #67271), dennis olberding (mp #66824), timothy schmitt (mp #67212), and darrell gross (mp #66865).

jaden and his 4 year old sister katya were last seen playing near the kuskokwim river in the village of napaskiak. searches of the area were conducted for several days. katya was located deceased on 05/08/2002. jaden has never been located.
mary was last seen boating wales to diomede. she was traveling with 4 adults and 1 child.

scott went overboard from fishing vessel sunset bay approximately 280 miles southeast of kodiak. scott was not wearing any survival or flotation gear. search efforts were unsuccessful in locating him.
michael was last seen on 10/04/1974 aboard an aluminum boat which capsized in hidden lake. he is presumed to have drowned. also missing is charles wellner.

terrance "sam" batchelder and john slagill (mp #66749) were last seen on 11/28/1990 when they departed in a skiff from the fishing vessel, red jacket, to seguam island for fresh water but failed to return. no traces of them have been found.
manu was a crew member aboard the f/v sultan when we fell overboard into the bering sea, approximately 150 miles northwest of st. paul island. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.
stephen was last seen on 12/27/1986 during a boating accident in sharatin bay near kodiak island. he is missing with timothy stauffer (mp #67262). they are both presumed to be deceased.
glenda was last seen on a snow machine headed towards andreafski and yukon rivers. she is presumed to have drowned.
steven was aboard the f/v ocean challenger when it capsized 85 miles southeast of cold bay. one person survived and two others were located deceased. search efforts failed to locate steven.

lawrence, andrew jackson, mp #67057, and larry sanders left hoonah headed to glacier bay in an open skiff. they were due back in juneau on 06-07-1998 but never arrived. search efforts were unsuccessful in locating them or the boat. on 06-27-1998, the body of larry sanders was located.
john went missing from a climbing expedition on the devil's thumb outside of petersburg, ak. he is presumed to be deceased.
danny was last seen on 12/30/1990 walking on the boat ramp at thomas basin in ketchikan, ak.
harold went missing after his skiff capsized in the chilkat river near klukwan. he is presumed to have drowned.

john slagill and terrance "sam" batchelder were last seen on 11/28/1990 when they departed in a skiff from the fishing vessel, red jacket, to seguam island for fresh water but failed to return. no traces of them have been found.

carrie and two other individuals fell through the ice while crossing the nazuruk channel of the kobuk river 1 mile up river from noorvik. the other two individuals were located deceased. numerous searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating carrie.
carlos was a crew member who went missing from motor vessel seledang ayu when the vessel ran aground after engine failure off spray cape unalaska in dutch harbor.
adrien is presumed to have drowned while boating from protection point around cape constantine on 09/11/1987. missing with lamont olsen (mp66870).

william hamilton jr was last seen on 05/06/1978 and is presumed to have drowned while boating from hydaburg to craig, ak. he went missing with verne edenshaw jr (mp #66955), glenn cook (mp #66786), delbert kelley (mp #66740), and victor (jay) burgess (mp #66676). they were last seen at waterfall resort approximately 15 mi from craig. one skiff was found submerged near cruz island in san alberto bay, and the other was found tied to a rock in canoe pass.

peter germain was last heard from on 02/25/20 via a text message on his in-reach device from his remote property approximately 40 miles west of trapper creek. a check on his remote cabin, buildings, and surrounding area failed to locate peter. a backpack containing peter's wallet, clothing, ski goggles and other miscellaneous items were found with his snowmachine on 05-26-2020.

rodney was traveling between kotzebue and deering in a converted 56 foot landing craft, the "seagull ii" carrying portable drill rig and pilings and never arrived. also missing is don hammond (mp#67197).

charles palmer had been snowmobiling during the day with friends and family west of mastadon road near bald mountain. the group was headed back to a cabin for the night when palmer got lost from the group. it was later discovered that palmer snowmobiled off the well-defined trail. when troopers arrive, they located the snowmobile, but there were no signs of palmer.
kellogg was last seen in anchorage, ak on 1/19/88. possibly drug related homicide.
missing after riding a snowmachine through the ice on a river about 3-4 miles south of koliganek. the snowmachine was recovered on 08/26/19.
boat capsized in the copper river near haley creek with six people on board. three people survived. also missing are loren kosa and harry rocheleau.
last seen snow machining in atqasuk.

russell left his father's tent at space #88 in valdez campground and said nothing as to where he was going. his father thinks russell may have gone climbing in the area but he had no climbing equipment or food with him. searches of the area had negative results.
missing from f/v hellion. also missing are walter laughead and aaron goin.
owner/operator of f/v 'days end' that was located capsized on the northwest end of montegue island. he was never located despite several searches of the area.
susan did not show up for work and the apartment she was renting had burnt down. she had cashed out a months worth of vacation from work.
overdue from a canoe trip from 6 mile creek. canoe was found floating upright and unoccupied near miller's creek east of cook inlet. also missing is joseph galbo.

missing aboard f/v destination when it sank approximately 4.4 nautical miles northwest of st. george island. also missing is jeffrey hathaway, charles jones, lawrence o'grady, darrik seibold and kai hamik.

eric bealer and pamela bealer were both reported missing on 10-05-18 and have not been seen since 09-12-18 when they were going to their cabin at green top, which is a rural residence located near pelican bay.

vladimir kostenko was last known to be living in a remote cabin in the hatcher pass area. his friend, who last had contact with vladimir approximately 60 days prior, requested a welfare check for him on 12/22/2018. a check of the cabin showed it was empty and boarded up.
missing and presumed drowned after being involved in a boating accident in dry bay in the cook inlet.
missing in cessna 206, tail #n9975, on flight from nondalton to kenai. plane or occupants have never been located. also missing are sheila cella, john cushman and hunter wells.

charles gay was last seen at a skagway hostel on 09/26/2000. gay, who is a geologist, told the hostel manager he was heading to upper dewey lakes to look for rocks. he was not believed to have had overnight gear with him. extensive searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.
james was last known to be kayaking south of mitkof island. his kayak was later found on the beach at wilson island on 02/07/2010 but search efforts found no sign of him.
travis was last seen at his cabin on telemark trail in two rivers on 05/13/2011 around 1900 hours. the area around his cabin was searched, but he was never located.

wilson, chad chadwick, neal gutleben, alexie nose, michael sharp, bernice waska and elizabeth wassillie were traveling by boat from quinhagak. their boat was last seen near the mouth of the eek river on 10/20/2020. numerous searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.

chad, neal gutleben, alexie nose, michael sharp, bernice waska, elizabeth wassillie and wilson wassillie were traveling by boat from quinhagak. their boat was last seen near the mouth of the eek river on 10/20/2020. numerous searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.

william's air boat was found down river from his cabin on the chatanika river caught in a sweeper. he was supposed to meet his son at the landing at chatanika river and old murphy dome road but never arrived. several searches of the area were met with negative results.
john was last seen in the north pole area. he did not show up for work for a few days and missed a check in with his parole officer which is unlike him.
debbie was last seen at her residence in fairbanks.

sean was flying a cessna 170 with tail # n9114a from ketchikan to lake havasu, az. he broadcasted a mayday call around 1640 saying he was going down in the waters near port angeles, washington. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him or the plane.

steven was reported missing from anchorage on 08/08/2021. a plane that he had access to was missing and it is suspected that he had taken it. the plane was later located just across the canada border.
george was last seen at calvary bible baptist church. he said he was going to walk to kaktovik. he hasn't been seen or heard from since. searches of the area have been unsuccessful in locating him.

gary fisk has been missing since 09-21-2021 when he left to start hiking the crow pass trail in girdwood. he was planning to arrive at the eagle river nature center two days later but never arrived. several searches of the area have been unsuccessful in locating him.

police are asking for the public’s help in locating 68-year-old david perez. out-of-state family contacted the anchorage police department regarding perez. they stated they had last spoken to perez over the phone on 03/09/21, and had not heard from him since which is unusual. officers responded to perez’s home; they made observations indicating perez had not been in the house for several days. efforts to locate perez have been unsuccessful. on 03/18/21, perez's vehicle was located abandoned on the kenai spur extension near captain cook state park. searches of the area with dogs were unsuccessful in locating him.
myles fell off the back of a boat in big lake. he was not wearing a life vest. several searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

andrew was flying a blue and white robinson r66 helicopter with tail number n1767 from anchorage to kodiak. he was reported overdue when he didn't arrive in kodiak. the last radar hit was over the water near the barren islands. the united states coast guard conducted several searches and located a debris field in the gulf of alaska, about 65 miles northeast of kodiak, however andrew was never located.
jeramy was last seen in anchorage and has not been heard from since.
jason was last seen walking on west beach in gambell. his last cell phone activity was on 09-15-2022 at 1731 hours. searches of the area have been unsuccessful in locating him.

anchorage police are requesting the public’s help in locating 25-year-old roseanna rookok. police were recently notified that roseanna was last seen in early july 2022 on the 300-block of fireweed lane; efforts to locate her have been unsuccessful.
tevon left his residence on a blue mountain bike without saying where he was going and has not been answering call or text messages.
jessie was last seen on security camera leaving her uncles residence around 0530 hours.

paul was last seen at his residence near 11th avenue and gambell street. out-of-state family have not heard from him since about the same time. while it is not uncommon for paul to be away from his residence for several days at a time, he generally leaves a note letting people know when he'll be back. he does not have his own vehicle and often utilizes transport services to get around.
sandro was last contacted on 6/14/21 when he checked out of his hotel.
timothy went missing after a boating trip to go fishing at pup island. his boat was located but searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.
blanca was last seen at the hacienda restaurant in anchorage.
jedidiah kowchee was last seen leaving the ac lakeside grocery store shopping center in sitka on 12-13-2023 at approximately 1607 hours.
myra was last seen between 1030 hours and 1300 hours between hughes circle and the intersections of clark and wolverine in palmer.
missing after skiff overturned in khaz point area 40 miles north of sitka. also missing is darren borbridge - mp114711. unable to recover due to weather conditions. vessel later washed up on beach.

florence was supposed to fly from anchorage to anchor point to homer on 09-04-2023 via charter plane. they exchanged text messages on 09-03-2023 and was sent money by a friend to stay in a hotel. multiple messages sent with no response.
rashad has not been in contact with his family out of state since 03-17-2023. he last updated his alaska identification on 06-03-2024.

missing from fishing boat uf 22 near kodiak island. remains of the 34-foot boat were found by the fishing vessel columbia near the south end of kodiak island on aiaktalik beach on march 2, 1978. also missing is r l taylor, mp #134266.
reuben was last seen at his residence on barley way in delta junction on the evening of 07-03-2024.
haowan was last seen in anchorage on 07-31-2024. he was a chinese student here on a visa.
individual left her home in bartlett cove for a walk and never returned. husband was the individual who reported her missing, searches began the following day and were called off after 3 days.
missing aboard a 1948 silver beechcraft bonanza a35 aircraft with tail number n410b that left gustavus enroute to yakutat. also missing is tanya hutchins (mp 128301) and samuel wright (mp 128305).
missing after vessel overturned in aialik bay. also missing is melanie porter (mp #123060).
missing after being caught in an avalanche while skiing near the west fork of 20-mile river near girdwood. also missing is charles eppard, mp141793.
terrence was last contacted in anchorage on 06-07-2024.
frank left his group home on 07-06-2025 and never returned.
bergman was last seen falling into the ice on his snowmachine while attempting to recover another individual north of kotzebue around lockhart point.
ruth left a family member's residence and never returned. she usually lives a homeless lifestyle.

mary was last seen checking into the caribou hotel in glennallen on the evening of 11-11-2025. the hotel completely burned down on the morning of 11-12-2025. her car was found badly burned in the parking lot of the hotel. k-9's assisted in the search, but no human remains were located.
jackilyne was last in contact with a family member on 11-01-2025.
family members have not heard from david since march 2023.

last seen leaving his residence on may 16, 2004 with his 17 yr old son, kristopher kelly, mp #2937. on may 29, 2004 the victim's oldest son, robert kelly jr. found the residence unlocked and his father's dog unattended. on june 1, 2004, the victim's vehicle was found parked at the bentley mall in fairbanks, alaska.
robert davis and carlos zabala (mp 21140) are missing after the 93-foot fishing vessel, katmai, they were working on sank about 100 miles west of adak.
kevin o'keefe was last known to be camping and hiking in glacier bay national park. he was scheduled to be picked up on 10/10/1985 at noon by a float plane, but didn't show up.

lael was last seen in the early morning of october 15th, 2012. her car was located on october 20th, 2012 at the end of the road on nelson logging road in sitka, alaska. sitka is an island with only 14 miles of road. the only way to travel off of the island is by ferry or plane. lael did not have a valid identification in order to travel out of town.
charles was last seen on 10/04/1974 aboard an aluminum boat which capsized in hidden lake. he is presumed to have drowned. also missing is michael pomeroy.
missing person was last seen leaving the executive success programs in anchorage. her vehicle was recovered on 02/07/03 at miller's landing in seward, alaska.
marjorie was last seen in downtown fairbanks.
jackie letney was reported missing in 1986. his last known location was fairbanks, alaska.
george tonsgard disappeared while scuba diving in the gastineau channel.
katherine winslow was last seen in october 1997 in ketchikan at the air marine harbor.
fell overboard off a boat near mab island, north of juneau.

sheila mcbroom left her residence the morning of 10/27/08 to go to work. she was stopped by an alaska state trooper at mile 106 of the seward hwy at approx. 0830. her husband reported her missing on 10/28/08. her vehicle was found at mile 106 seward hwy on 10/31/08.
gabriel demmert walked away from the apartment he shared with sister in gruening park in the lemon creek area on march 18, 2008. he has not been seen by family since that date.

michael was last seen riding his bicycle on his way home on the evening of june 4, 1999. michael's bicycle has since been found but he has not been seen or heard from since. he was last seen wearing a black "marlboro" jacket with red stripes, a tee shirt, and blue jeans.
donald venes fell overboard into the kuskokwin river at the mouth of the bering sea.

keith stompro was last seen on 12/14/13 at pike’s waterfont lodge in fairbanks, alaska. stompro’s belongings were left in his hotel room past the day of his scheduled check out, including valuables. stompro first arrived in alaska in early november, and rented a car in anchorage. he was involved in a car accident on 12/10/2013 on his way to fairbanks. stompro apparently caught a ride into fairbanks and checked into the hotel that same day and only planned to stay for a few days.

dalton walked away from a hunting camp around mile 9 of dalton highway in fairbanks on 9/09/2015, and has not been seen or heard from since. dalton was not dressed for the weather and was reported to not have any survival gear with him. a search for dalton started on 9/10/2015 and ended on 9/18/2015. dalton was never located and his whereabouts are unknown.
ida jacomet was last seen at circle m bar, mile 6.5 old richardson highway. her purse was located in the parking lot of the bar.
last seen in soldotna. believed to have left alaska.
saccheus was last seen leaving the polaris hotel in nome, alaska. he was reported missing on september 23, 1987. he has never been heard from again. few details are available in his case.

immergan was last seen by his family in savoonga, ak. he was planning to travel to nome, ak. savoonga is on an island and immergan would have had to travel to nome by plane. he has never been heard from again.
kevin is believed to have fallen overboard from his 18-ft. boat while bringing it from the angoon ferry terminal to the boat harbor. his skiff was located beached and unoccupied.
cordell was last seen by his family in the muldoon area of anchorage, ak in the summer of 2012. family stated he has health problems and was not taking his medication regularly.
fishing vessel cape chacon sank in heavy seas off middleton island, alaska.

suspected homicide victim of michael silka. joyce's body has never been located and may have been placed in the tanana river at manley hot springs. also missing is marshall klein, roger culp, and albert hagen.
dennis was last seen boating near emmonak when the boat hit a submerged log. he was not wearing a life vest. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

missing from f/v fierce competitor enroute from warrenton, or to king cove, ak. also missing are keithly young (#mp41723), gordon young (#mp50287), vicki rowe-simonsen (#mp50289) and larry jones (#mp42381).

suspected homicide victim of michael silka. albert's body has never been located and may have been placed in the tanana river at manley hot springs. also missing is marshall klein, roger culp and joyce hefnerklein.

departed merrill field in anchorage aboard a yellow/white cessna 182, n3186u. last known location was in denali national park. no sign of plane has been located. also aboard were: donald johnston, mp #42586 linda parrish, mp #42589 monte parrish, mp #42590
missing with aircraft 8648n in lake clark area with 3 passengers on board. also missing is kaitlyn blom, zachary blom, and kyle longerbeam.

sheridan stringer fell overboard in a boat in the gastineau channel. he was a passenger in a small boat that overturned in the water, near the breakwater of aurora harbor. there were five passengers in the boat when it overturned. three of the passengers made it to shore safely. uscg conducted a search and rescue of the water for sheridan and another passenger, james cole, but they were not located. the partial remains of james cole were located in 2020, near whale park in juneau.
pilot of aircraft that went down by seal river in yakutat, ak. passenger was located deceased on 08/21/11 near the accident site.
anthony was last heard from at approximately 1630 hours on 02/06/18.
casey's ski doo summit snowmachine was located in an open lead of water on the main channel of the kuskokwim river.

departed merrill field in anchorage aboard a yellow/white cessna 182, n3186u. last known location was in denali national park. no sign of plane has been located. also aboard were: karen johnston, mp #42587 linda parrish, mp #42589 monte parrish, mp #42590

missing in an overdue aircraft from wolf lake in palmer, ak enroute to whitehorse, canada. aircraft was a red/white/gold v tail bonanza aircraft, n7062n. last seen on radar at middleton island, another pilot saw the aircraft heading ne through nizina valley. also aboard the aircraft is the missing person's husband, gerhard patigler, namus mp #42491.
presumed drowned in cook inlet near ninilchik from a boating accident.

missing in a beechcraft v35a airplane with tail #n216jb. plane is white with red and blue trim. last heard from 10 miles east of gulkana. an 11-day search was conducted with negative results. also missing is franklin roth.

missing aboard f/v destination when it sank approximately 4.4 nautical miles northwest of st. george island. also missing is jeffrey hathaway, kai hamik, lawrence o'grady, darrik seibold and raymond vincler.
family hasn't had any contact with missing person since 1981.
victim was the sole occupant of the gill netter f/v "pearl" when is capsized near grass island bar out of cordova. a search of the area was conducted with negative results.
presumed drowned when f/v sequel capsized and sank 2-3 miles north of story island in prince william sound. also missing are kristen hvatum and sandra hvatum.

victim fell into a moulin on matanuska glacier near 2300 foot level when he went to get water from a stream. a fiber optic camera was dropped 250 feet into the moulin and there was no end to the tunnel in sight.
presumed drowned when f/v sequel capsized and sank 2-3 miles north of story island in prince william sound. also missing are sandra hvatum and russell farrell.
presumed drowned when f/v sequel capsized and sank 2-3 miles north of story island in prince william sound. also missing are kristen hvatum and russell farrell.

alan was flying his plane, a blue and white pa-32 with tail number n3705w, from yakutat to anchorage and never arrived. search efforts were all met with negative results. last known position 45 miles west of yakutat at 1100 ft level near malaspina glacier
missing in cessna 206, tail #n9975, on flight from nondalton to kenai. plane or occupants have never been located. also missing are sheila cella, dewey baily, and hunter wells.
aboard tug boat "roughneck" when it sank in serigus narrows near sitka. also missing is clyde watson, sr. search efforts were unsuccessful in locating them.

james and albert novak (mp #66965) went missing after a plane crash in the cook inlet. they left hallo bay for homer in a cessna 180 with registration number n91303 , but never arrived. extensive searches of the area were conducted. a debris field was found, but they were never located.
michiel was last seen on 05/24/1998 when he fell and disappeared on mt. mckinley while attempting to rescue another climber. several searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

james went missing and is presumed to have drowned after a boating accident near horse and colt islands near juneau, ak. also missing is nicholas arthur mayer mp #66778. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.
elmer went missing from fishing vessel andronica 150 miles south west of st. matthew island, possibly fell overboard. he was never located during any of the searches.
raymond was last seen on 05/22/1991. it is believed that he fell overboard in the area of keys point.
jimmie went missing from fishing vessel arctic rose which sank 205 miles northwest of st. paul island.
brian was aboard f/v lady c which sank 5-6 miles south of perl island, debris located nearby.
michael was last seen on 03/25/1987 before falling overboard f/v nova approximately 41 miles east of marmot island in kodiak. he is presumed to be deceased.
missing in civil air patrol (cap) cessna 180 on floats between yakutat and sitka. also missing is robert lohman. despite search efforts, the plane nor the occupants were ever located.
missing and presumed drowned after not returning from a kayak trip.
miguel was last seen on 06/22/1994 when he went missing from an aircraft accident in the taku inlet. he is presumed to be deceased.
fred went missing after his snow machine was found on the bank of the nushagak river near snag point. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

jesse went missing with her two sisters, mp66478 katherine davis and mp66487 samantha davis, after the aircraft piloted by her father flew into lake clark into the ice. she was unable to get out of the aircraft before it sank. her mother and father survived the crash.
richard was last seen on 03/31/1981 during a boating accident where he was swept overboard into the bering sea from his fishing vessel, discovery. he is presumed deceased.
jay went missing and is presumed to have drowned after a tug boat rolled over and sank in the farragut bay in fredrick sound.
james is presumed deceased after being washed overboard the fishing vessel express near the pribilof islands.

norman went missing from f/v 'calico dog' near priest rock about 12 miles east of dutch harbor. he was onboard with another person when a series of waves pounded the vessel causing it to roll over. the other person was able to crawl onto the overturned hull and was rescued. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating norman.

kurt and nghia nguyen (mp #66596) went missing from fishing vessel louise. they departed dutch harbor on october 28, 1991 and were due to return 5 days later. searches of the area did not locate the vessel or the crewmen.
gene was last seen boating wales to diomede. he was traveling with 4 adults and 1 child.
randall went missing after going overboard from his tug near st. michael.

crew member missing aboard the f/v "st. george" which sank 152 nautical miles north of unimak pass. also missing is kevin clark, terry james, sean mcwethy, david parkes and brian schouten. neither the vessel or the crew members were ever located despite numerous search efforts. the empty life raft was located 01/05/1992.
aaron went missing from fishing vessel crabber lin j, 8 miles northwest of st. paul island. he is believed to have drowned. the boat sank due to heavy sea icing.
carl was last seen on 10/15/1986 on the qweek river near kwethluk. he is presumed to have drowned.
leonard went missing while whale hunting after the boat he was on capsized in the bering sea 5-7 miles offshore west of gambell. he is presumed to have drowned.

michael went missing from a boat that swamped on the tanana river near the mouth of the kantishna river. he was last seen floating downstream clinging to a gas can. several searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him. he is presumed to have drowned.
william was a pilot in an aircraft overdue between melozi hot springs and fairbanks. missing with passengers kenneth erlewine (mp#66715) and susan edmondson (mp#66547).
susan was a passenger in an aircraft overdue between melozi hot springs and fairbanks. missing with pilot william robideau and second passenger kenneth erlewine (mp#66715).

albert and james hawthorne (mp #66847) went missing after a plane crash in the cook inlet. they left hallo bay for homer in a cessna 180 with registration number n91303 , but never arrived. extensive searches of the area were conducted. a debris field was found, but they were never located.

glenn was last seen on 03/10/1993 when the fishing vessel, lady of good voyage, along with her crew members went missing. glenn is missing with jeremy hunter (mp #67019) and gregory schwindt (mp #67020).
kris was last seen on 08/19/1996 between cape menshikoff and south spit at ugashik bay.
daniel was last seen on 05/05/1998 after his skiff capsized on a trip from skagway to haines. the bodies of two others were recovered. daniel is presumed to have drowned.
john courage was last seen on the night of december 29th/30th at the unisea harbor view bar in unalaska, but did not return to the fishing vessel he was employed with, f/v-alaska trojan.
bob fell overboard approximately 70 miles north of cold bay. he did not have any flotation gear on.
alvin was last seen travelling on red polaris snow machine from grayling to anvik. the snow machine was found in open water on the yukon river.
michael and darlene hall, mp #66552, went missing after an aircraft crashed on knik glacier.
wesley was last seen on 01/07/1974 riding a snow machine on tustumena lake when he went through the ice. he is presumed to have drowned.
yolanda went missing while whale hunting after the boat she was on capsized in the bering sea 5-7 miles offshore west of gambell. she is presumed to have drowned.
henry is presumed to have drowned in a boating accident on the koyukuk river.

jim was last heard from by family on 10/22/2013 reporting that he was fine and expecting to be in tuntutuliak by the next day. he was traveling by small boat from tuluksak to tuntuntuliak but he never arrived to his destination.
estrella went missing from anchorage, ak on 02/08/2012.
mary was last seen on 07/15/1986 while traveling via boat through stevens village to beaver. she is missing with christopher winer (mp #66489).

richard and two others were floating down the skagway river on inner tubes. they hit a bridge piling and overturned. the others made it to shore, but richard was never located during any of the searches of the area.

tracy was last seen on 02/27/1990 when the boat he was on, sank. he is missing with mickey aus (mp #66796) and david strom (mp #66868). the vessel was traveling from blaine, wa to king cove, ak. search efforts were hampered by 60 knot winds and seas up to 27 feet. all that was found was a life raft, an epirb, and one survival suit. the raft was found 70 miles southeast of cordova near cape suckling. the three men are presumed to be deceased.
robert was last seen on 10/08/1987 at the brass buckle disco in bethel, ak.

john is missing and presumed drowned off a houseboat in tongass narrows. his houseboat was located adrift near the breakwater in front of safeway. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.
emanual is presumed drowned while enroute kodiak to ouzinkie via skiff. also missing is philip balluta (mp #66849) and robin squartsoff (mp # 66729)
greg was a victim of a boating accident near yakutat, ak. he is presumed to be deceased.
frederick is missing and presumed deceased after his skiff sunk off cape ommaney. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.
kenneth was riding a snowmachine that went through the ice on the big su river approximately 7 air miles down river from deshka landing.
alan is missing and presumed deceased after a boating accident near lincoln island near juneau, alaska. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

william and steven scott austin, mp#67224, were aboard the private vessel loose goose too. they purchased fuel in seldovia on the afternoon of 10-21-1997. the uscg searched all of kachemak bay and the lower cook inlet, but no trace of the vessel or the two men were ever found.
steven went missing and is presumed to have drowned after a boating accident in traitors cove near ketchikan, ak.
max was last seen intoxicated and walking on the docks in dillingham, ak.
matthew was last seen in a bunk aboard fishing tug bering prowler which was docked at osi captains bay in unalaska, ak.
daniel was last seen on 06/28/1986 when his boat capsized near the tank farm at platinum just offshore from standard oil in bethel, ak.

alex was aboard an overdue airboat with known mechanical issues from pate lodge on buchatna creek to rig tenders dock on the east forelands. boat possibly seen going in circles before heading se towards ninilchik.
frank was last seen on 09/19/1985 when he was traveling via boat to bethel. his boat was found tied to the sea wall in front of bethel. all searches failed to locate him.

barry was last seen on 12/12/1992. he, and three children, went missing from bucareli bay after the fishing vessel, sea castle, overturned. the four missing individuals were not wearing life vests or survival suits at the time of the accident. four additional people survived the accident. searches by the coast guard found pieces of wood, some styrofoam, and a jacket belonging to one of the missing children. barry is presumed to have died from hypothermia and washed off the boat by waves along with seth wade (mp #66484), aaron castle (mp #66476), and sean castle (mp #66474).
phillip is presumed drowned while enroute kodiak to ouzinkie via skiff. also missing is robin squartsoff (mp #66729) and emanual charliaga (mp # 66583)

brendan was last seen at the soldotna airport, possibly enroute to wasilla in a green, white and red pa18 piper super cub with tail number n444lz. his radar track on his airplane ended in the middle of the inlet at about 0230 hours on 10-13-2012. on 10-30-2013 ntsb confirmed that a airplane tire that washed up on shore in kodiak was from brendan's airplane.
george's snowmachine broke through the ice on the ugalikthluk river while hunting near togiak, ak. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

on 12/06/1989, vasily was last seen on the fishing vessel, angara, when it overturned and sank near shuyak island in the shelikof strait (ten miles west of eagle cape). he is presumed to have drowned. the body of ignaty andreef was recovered. vasily was never located during any of the search efforts.
mitchell was last seen on 04/23/1990 when he was attempting to climb aboard a vessel. he fell into the water and drifted away from the vessel and sank.
frederick is missing from a boating accident that occurred on 07/18/1974 at skilak lake near the mouth of the river.
jason is presumed to have drowned in a boating accident near uganik bay.
allen was last seen operating a boat which was found capsized on the kuskokwim river up river from napakiak.

william and norman paul were aboard an 18 foot blue and white vessel 'delight.' on 05-25-1997, a cooler that was identified as belonging to them was located approximately 10 miles southwest of sitka between st. lasaria and biorka island. norman's body was located later that evening. numerous searches were conducted, but neither william or the vessel were ever located.
virgil was last seen on 07/02/1979 on the copper river near o'brien creek in glennallen, ak.
augustine was last seen on 03/17/1990 in anchorage, ak. augustine speaks in soft spoken, mumbles.

martin left his summer home in haines heading for seattle. he was flying a single engine beechcraft bonanza with tail number n4479d. parts of the plane were found in juan de fuca straits, washington. martin is presumed to have drowned.
peter was last seen on september 7, 2014.
julia was last seen on 08/07/1985 during a boating accident, 55 miles northwest of cold bay on the fishing vessel, sea dancer. she is presumed deceased.
toshiro was last seen on 09/26/1988 during a boating accident in the area of marka bay near the south end of afognak island. he is presumed to be deceased.

robert was last seen on 08/12/1989. he was one of four onboard an overdue cessna n1211v coming from the caribou creek, king mountain area. wreckage from the crash was found on 08/16/1990 in a ravine approximately one mile southwest of hicks lake. he is missing with edgar mccrary (mp #67045), james slaybaugh (mp #67069), and richard floyd (mp #66863).
george was last seen near mile 20 on nabesna road.
wilfred fell overboard and is presumed to have drowned in the tanana river near the nenana bridge.
stephen was last seen on 08/13/1975 in tustumena lake near moose creek. he is presumed to have drowned.
zenon was last seen on 11/08/1995 when he fell from the fishing trawler, stanovlenie, in unlaska bay. he was not located after searches.

charles was last seen on 05/01/1989 during a boating accident on the 40-mile river, 15 miles below o'brien creek, south of eagle, ak. another person aboard the boat was able to make it to shore and he last saw charles disappearing in the rapids approximately 30 feet from shore.

crew member missing aboard the f/v "st. george" which sank 152 nautical miles north of unimak pass. also missing is kevin clark, george dahl, terry james, sean mcwethy, and david parkes. neither the vessel or the crew members were ever located despite numerous search efforts. the empty life raft was located 01/05/1992.
mark was last seen on 05/09/1992. his skiff was found near akutan with no one inside. he was not wearing a life jacket and is presumed to have drowned.
heather is presumed to be deceased after the fishing vessel, sea note, rolled and sank outside of yakutat. her body was never located. debris located extending 5 miles along the beach near awke river
adam went missing after an aircraft accident near gustavus along with 3 others. he is presumed to be deceased.
alexie was last seen on 12/01/1986 while traveling via snow machine from bethel to kwethlik. snow machine tracks were found leading through ice on the kuskokwin river at straight slough.
theordore was last seen on 09/21/1987. his boat was recovered, swamped, two miles downriver from pitka's point on the yukon river. it was washed up in heavy surg. he is presumed to have drowned.
missing from a boat that was found by midway rock in peril straits on fire at 3:30 pm on 06/19/1989. also missing is joseph detemple.

stephen was aboard the fishing vessel "pacesetter" which sank 60 miles southeast of st. george island. also missing is stanley eftestad mp67159, michael ericson mp67022, bryon koesterman mp66818, richard anderson mp66995, elias pena mp66770, and matthew pope mp67277.

richard was last seen on 08/12/1989. he was one of four onboard an overdue cessna n1211v coming from the caribou creek, king mountain area. wreckage from the crash was found on 08/16/1990 in a ravine approximately one mile southwest of hicks lake. he is missing with edgar mccrary (mp #67045), james slaybaugh (mp #67069), and robert horn (mp #67216).

marion parker was last seen on 09/17/1978 when he was on a flight from king salmon to kodiak. the plane may have gone down in shelikoff straits. he is missing with james madsen jr (mp #66638) and nekita katelnikoff (mp #67157).

jack went missing after falling overboard on the f/v "platonida" while running to free two tangled crab pots. a rescue swimmer from the f/v was able to get a hold of jack after he went overboard, but while waiting to be retrieved a large wave pulled jack away and he was never seen again. there were high winds and high seas. jack was not wearing a life jacket.
frank was traveling via boat from quinhagak to eek and failed to arrive. his boat was found 10/18/1987 upside down on a sandbar near kipnuk.
moses was last seen on 09/10/1986 when he disappeared while boating on the kuskokwim river.
al went missing and is presumed to have drowned after a kayak accident in sumner strait near blind slough.

delbert kelley was last seen on 05/06/1978 and is presumed to have drowned while boating from hydaburg to craig, ak. he went missing with verne edenshaw jr (mp #66955), glenn cook (mp #66786), victor (jay) burgess (mp #66676), and william hamilton jr (mp #67265). they were last seen at waterfall resort approximately 15 mi from craig. one skiff was found submerged near cruz island in san alberto bay, and the other was found tied to a rock in canoe pass.

john went missing when the snowmachine he was on fell into an open hole in the ice at the junction of the koyukuk river and the yukon river. he is presumed to have drowned. searches in the area were unsuccessful in locating him.
missing from plane crash in knik arm west of birchwood airport. seth was last known to be standing on the aircraft floats. plane was recovered approximately 1.3 miles north of beach lake.
laura was last seen on 03/28/1986. she is missing under suspicious circumstances.
mark was last seen on 08/11/1991. he went missing from the fishing vessel, arctic trawler. attempts to locate mark were negative.
ronald is believed to have drowned in a kayak accident near ednabay on prince of wales island.
kevin was last seen boating wales to diomede. he was traveling with 5 adults.
erik went missing in an aircraft in the area of barnanof island near sitka, ak. aircraft pilot and four passengers are missing.
crew member aboard the f/v "northwest mariner" that capsized in the bering sea. also missing is bruce forde, lawrence johnston, and robert olson.

tony was last seen on 10/09/1996 when he went out alone by boat for a day hunting trip. he was reported missing when he failed to return. searches of the area were conducted. a thermos bottle with tony's name and a gas tank were found floating in the area of mahtkwingak slough. his boat was never located. he is presumed to be deceased.
george was last seen on 08/12/1987 when he jumped overboard after throwing in a duffel bag and white survival suit.

mark and 4 others were aboard a plane that went down in johnstone lake. the 4 others were able to swim to an iceberg and were rescued. mark attempted to swim to the iceberg, but didn't make it and disappeared under water. several searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

robert and tina young (mp #66763) were last seen on 12/23/1989 traveling to anvik from grayling on a snow machine. a snow machine track was located that ended at open water on the yukon river, 5 miles below grayling. searchers in the area recovered helmets and personal possessions from robert and tina from the open water. divers located the snow machine in 30' of water but could not locate either of them.
leon was a victim of a boating accident near angoon at kootsnahoo inlet. his body was never found and he is presumed to be deceased.
james was last seen on 01/25/1987 during a boating accident 10 miles southeast of sitkalida island near kodiak. he is presumed to be deceased.
victor was last seen on 07/22/1990 when he fell overboard off of the fishing vessel, lori dee. searches were conducted for several days with negative results.
albert left akiak on 04/10/2020 at approximately 1000 hours and was traveling to togiak via a black/green/yellow snow machine pulling a plastic sled. he has not been located despite several searches.
daniel went missing on 09/02/1980 during a boating accident between old harbor and sitkalidak island. he is missing with peter ignatin (mp #66495) and both are presumed deceased.
thor was last seen on 03/05/1991. he is missing from the vessel, betty b, and was lost while attempting to swim to the rescue boat after being stranded on sand point at umnak island.

chong was a crewman aboard the cruise ship, s.s. universe, when he fell overboard in glacier bay. he was not wearing a floatation device or life line at the time of the incident. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating his remains, and he is presumed to be deceased.
kenneth fell overboard from his fishing boat approximately 1 mile outside the mouth of monti bay near yakutat. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him. he is presumed to have drowned.

shamalee and 3 others left auke bay boat harbor near juneau for a day fishing trip on 07/23/1995. the boat never returned to the harbor. the bodies of two others were later located, but shamalee and daniel arleth, mp #66954 were never recovered and they are presumed to be deceased.

stanley was aboard the fishing vessel "pacesetter" which sank 60 miles southeast of st. george island. also missing is richard anderson mp66995, michael ericson mp67022, bryon koesterman mp66818, stephen mack mp66970, elias pena mp66770, and matthew pope mp67277.
angela was last seen in selawik, ak. she had been talking about walking to noorvik to see her boyfriend.

annabelle was last seen 09/09/1986 aboard the fishing vessel, normar ii, which sank in the bering sea, 70 miles northeast of the pribilof islands. she is missing with kenneth ridgley (mp #66794), richard bennett (mp #66888), and fred halsworth (mp #67232)
james left sitka on a 27ft by 8ft sailing vessel tachyon (ak5603k) to elfin cove. he never arrived. hull number ctyl3012m77b
anthony was reported missing after falling overboard from a fishing vessel in waters off of nome.

bryon was aboard the fishing vessel "pacesetter" which sank 60 miles southeast of st. george island. also missing is stanley eftestad mp67159, michael ericson mp67022, richard anderson mp66995, stephen mack mp66970, elias pena mp66770, and matthew pope mp67277.

james was attempting an emergency landing in a helicopter near rapid island in sergius narrows when it capsized in the water. two passengers swam to shore, but james was caught in the tidal current and carried away from the island. he was last seen clinging to one of the helicopter floats.

randall went missing from fishing vessel alaskan beauty. he fell overboard after getting entangled in ropes six miles southwest of kiska island. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.
harry went missing and is presumed to be deceased from a boating accident in route from kodiak to togiak on fishing vessel evanick.

steven and william kent watkins, mp#67267, were aboard the private vessel loose goose too. they purchased fuel in seldovia on the afternoon of 10-21-1997. the uscg searched all of kachemak bay and the lower cook inlet, but no trace of the vessel or the two men were ever found.
michael went missing from fishing vessel arctic rose which sank 205 miles northwest of st. paul island.
carlos was last seen on 03/23/1996. his 13-foot boston whaler was recovered, swamped, near the inner part of kruzof island. carlos is presumed to be deceased but his body has never been found.
roger fell overboard off the f/v dru-drop in the cook inlet about 2.5 miles off anchor point. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

brian was last seen on 05/03/1992 in a twin-engine cessna 340, tail number n69469. he was on a trip from yakutat to anchorage. the last report to the faa air-traffic controllers was that the plane was at 12,000 feet and heading on instruments to anchorage. he is missing with jeffrey roth (mp #66877), timothy thornton (mp #67047), kent roth (mp #66733), and scott roth (mp #66846).

evan was last seen on 06/02/1990 in a boat on the holitna river below kashegelok. per media, his abandoned boat was found on the holitna river, 75 miles southeast of aniak near taylor mountain. evan had been hunting with another man when the pair separated and evan took his boat upriver to visit some friends. he failed to return so his hunting partner and several other boaters searched the area which is when his boat was found.
walter was last seen on 06/26/1986. it is believed that he drowned in the tanana river but he was never recovered.

dylan and another male were crewmembers aboard the fishing vessel pacific dynasty. they left on a skiff on the afternoon of 07/02/2020 and were supposed to return for dinner. the uscg located a skiff on the beach of tugidak island with two survival suits left on the shore. the other crewmember was located deceased. search efforts have not been successful in locating dylan.
zefeino was a crew member who went missing from motor vessel seledang ayu when the vessel ran aground after engine failure off spray cape unalaska in dutch harbor.
william and nichol silas, mp #67004 are missing in a plane that departed anderson bay at 1610 hours on a 20-minute flight to dutch harbor. part of plane was found on the beach in constantine bay.
manuel was last heard from in december 1999.
john's last known location was at beluga point where his truck was located unoccupied.
samuel was last seen in september of 2019 and has not been heard from since.
steve went missing on a caribou hunting trip in deadhorse. his backpack and walking poles were located, but extensive searches of the area have been unsuccessful in locating him.

shane was last seen around late june or early july near thorne bay on prince of wales island. he was reportedly going to hitchhike to craig. storage unit auctioned off and numerous reported sightings.
christopher was last seen at his job at walmart in fairbanks.
peter was riding a snowmachine that went into an open hole on the kuskokwim river down from tuluksak.

dennis and james tikiun were last seen at the old abandoned school building in chevak. on 03/08/2021, the school was reported to have burned to the ground. searches of the village have been unsuccessful in locating them.

michael, chad chadwick, neal gutleben, alexie nose, bernice waska, elizabeth wassillie and wilson wassillie were traveling by boat from quinhagak. their boat was last seen near the mouth of the eek river on 10/20/2020. numerous searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.
david departed from eielson bluffs in denali national park for a day hike to the red mountain area and never returned. multiple searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

willis has not been seen or heard from since 11-10-2020. he came to fairbanks from huslia and had a hotel room at the extended stay off old airport way. his direction of travel is unknown. there have been multiple reported sightings of willis around fairbanks, however none of them have been confirmed.

donald was last seen on 02/10/1991 aboard the 98 foot steel crab fishing vessel, barbarossa, which was lost in the bering sea about 30 miles west of st. george island. the coast guard received a distress call from the boat around 1:00am but searches did not locate the boat or the crewmen. it is presumed that the boat capsized and sank. donald is missing with five other crewmen including george brandenburg (mp #67271), dennis olberding (mp #66824), timothy schmitt (mp #67212), darrell gross (mp #66865), and brian mcpherson (mp #66996).
michael is presumed to be deceased from a boating accident in shekikof strait on fishing vessel ocean hope ii. also missing is dennis frye, daniel tullar and jack white.

on 07/27/1990, laura and isaac kayutak (mp #66671) left barrow on an outing that was to have lasted about 10 days. they were visited at their camp on 08/04/1990 by barrow residents seeking directions to a fishing camp on the chipp river. this was the last time they were seen. on 08/08/1990, searchers found the pair's 18 foot skiff overturned and stuck on a sandbar in admiralty bay, about 45 miles southeast of barrow, the northernmost community in the united states. a sleeping bag and laura's dog, which had drowned, were found as well. searchers later found canvas bags containing camping gear and medication owned by the pair. it is presumed that isaac and laura were headed back to barrow when their skiff capsized.
kenneth was a passenger in an aircraft overdue between melozi hot springs and fairbanks. missing with pilot william robideau and second passenger susan edmondson (mp66547).
harold was last seen on 03/27/94. he may be with nancy bellamy (namus mp#61353).

john koezuna was reported missing by a family member. he had left a note at the family cabin indicating that he was going to walk to nome, ak from cape wooley. john is known to go on long walks and is familiar with the area, but extensive searches could not locate him.
richard left his residence on laurene street in fairbanks and has never been seen since.
demetri was last seen walking on the beach near three falls outside of akutan. witnesses reported that he was depressed and had a hand gun with him.
alfred was seen on 9/7/16 at 0100 hours outside the tribal building in shageluk. extensive searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

missing aboard f/v destination when it sank approximately 4.4 nautical miles northwest of st. george island. also missing is jeffrey hathaway, charles jones, lawrence o'grady, darrik seibold and raymond vincler.
fishing on a boat out of homer harbor to the area of flat island in the lower cook inlet. it is believed the boat capsized due to rough water conditions. also missing is jay cooke, namus mp #19178.

victim was last seen in anchorage doing repair work. he left in the afternoon to buy a part and never returned. known to be driving to seward to obtain motor part from a boat and hasn't made contact since.
charles brennan fell off a tanker ladder anchored in kachemak bay.
missing on board a guardian king air 200, n13ly. last known coordinates are 57.1.45 n, 134.49.88 w. debris located in frederick sound. also missing are margaret langston and patrick coyle.
roy was last seen in anderson when he was going for a walk. he was possibly seen near the clear sky lodge on 05-21-2023.
robert is missing after the f/v awakin capsized near low island in sitka sound. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

james was last seen leaving nenana in the morning hours headed down river on the tanana river. he was expected to spend the night in swanneck slough before continuing to his fish camp near the kantishna river with plans to return to nenana on the evening of 09-10-2023. his boat was located completely submerged, but james was not inside. searches of the area have been conducted and have been unsuccessful in locating him.

paul was last seen walking toward mendenhall glacier. his kayak was located on 07-11-2023 on mendenhall lake. a helmet with a go-pro camera was located and confirmed to belong to paul. a review of the video determined that paul drowned on 07-11-2023 after his kayak overturned. searches of the area have been unsuccessful in locating him.

shirley was last seen at her apartment by her landlord and stopped answering the door. she was possibly seen at fairbanks airport boarding a flight to seattle but alaska airlines was unable to confirm if she had flown. she has not replied or read multiple messages sent via facebook messenger.
derek is missing after a landslide occurred at approximately mile 11 of the zimovia highway.
thomas was last seen in seward. he departed on foot without shoes in a blizzard.
ronald is a transient and hasn’t been seen since 06-01-2022 at a residence on the glenn highway near kepler park.

george was the co-pilot of a douglas c-47 skytrain (dc-3) with tail number n41748 when it crashed on the southeast slope of mt. crillon sometime after 1147 hours when it last gave its position. wreckage was located from the air on 01-13-1952 but was not visible the next day due to being buried in an avalanche or new storm.
phokham was last seen near the 4400 block of parsons avenue. there is a concern for his wellbeing, and he doesn’t speak fluent english.
kris has not contacted family since 04-01-2024. he is currently experiencing homelessness.
missing and lost at sea from the area of point couverden when the f/v wind walker capsized. also missing are: emilio celaya-talamantez, mp#134410 michael brown, #mp134409

robert was last known to be at doroshin bay cabin on skilak lake on the kenai peninsula. searches of the area have been unsuccessful in locating him. his backpack was located in a log jam near where the upper kenai river meets skilak lake.
benjamin was last seen on 06-22-2025 in the early morning hours in juneau walking by front street.
candace left a family member's residence stating she was going for a walk downtown, but never returned.
crystal was last heard from via text message on 01-06-2026. she is currently transient in anchorage.
family members haven't heard from elijah since 01-25-2026. he has been homeless since december 2025.

hari last spoke to his friends on 12-30-2025 at 2030 hours. he checked out of the aurora denali lodge on 12-31-2025 around 1000 hours. he flew from houston, tx to fairbanks on 12-22-2025 and was supposed to return on 01-04-26 or 01-05-2026. he is traveling alone without a vehicle.
kevin left his residence around 1000 hours and hasn't been seen or heard from since.
julian was last seen on 01-23-2026 in anchorage.
andrew was last seen at the school in russian mission. searches of the area have been unsuccessful in locating him.
kelly was last seen on foot in the area of 32nd avenue and oregon drive around 0600 hours.

missing after leaving back beach in sitka on 12-13-2025 around 2300 hours in a 14’ lund skiff with plans to travel to camp coogan bay but never returned as planned on 12-14-2025. also missing is josiah bracken, mp153682.
jonnie was last seen on july 19, 1998.

washington was last seen leaving his family's residence in st. michael, alaska on may 19, 1998. he had a .20 gauge winchester pump-action shotgun, a blue tarp and a camouflage tarp with him at the time.
last seen leaving a residence at mile marker 25 on chena hot springs rd in fairbanks.
theresa johnny has been missing from whitehorse, yukon territory, canada since march 1998. she was last seen in anchorage, alaska in july 1998. she may possibly be living on the streets.

thomas nuzzi was reported missing june 21, 2001. his vehicle was found parked in the alpenglow parking lot of the chugach state park located 12 miles north of anchorage. a three day search of the area failed to located him.

on 9/13/1976, at approximately 9:55pm, kenai flight services received a mayday call from an aircraft in the lake clark pass area between drift river and the west forelands. the pilot and lone occupant of the single-engine aircraft (red and white citabria with tail number n5vb) presumably crashed in the lake clark pass area. search efforts failed to locate dr. james harbin.

roy banhart was reportedly last seen by his cousin leaving the 49'er bar. his car has not been claimed from the impound lot after it was towed. local police indicate his cell phone was last used on 12/29/14.
mp last seen hitchhiking northbound on the sterling highway.
jack conright left his home in the early morning hours of may 28, 2011, possibly riding a mountain bike. he has not been seen since.

ms. altiery was reported missing by her girlfriend on 12/2/1981. the claimant advised that ms. altiery worked as an exotic dancer in downtown anchorage, and was last seen going to meet an unknown male for a photo shoot, and ms. altiery never returned home. she was last seen taking a checker cab to the boniface mall around 11:00pm in anchorage, alaska. ms. altiery was also known by her stage name, “enchantment” and by a nickname, “fish”. ms. altiery was described as a white, female adult with a medium complexion, between 23 to 25 years of age. she was reported as being between 5’4” to 5’6” tall, and between 115 to 125 pounds. ms. altiery had medium to long brown hair that she wore straightened, and had brown eyes. ms. altiery was last seen wearing a black leather jacket, red sweater, blue jeans, brown cowboy boots, and may have been carrying a small, flowered make-up bag and black zipper purse. ms. altiery was also reported to have been wearing a golden-colored ring with one pearl, a golden-colored ring with two pearls, an antique wedding band set with a rose-set top, and a custom made golden necklace shaped like a salmon with a diamond set as the eye. further investigation has revealed several pieces of ms. altiery’s jewelry was recovered from serial killer robert c. hansen’s home during a search warrant executed in 1983. it is believed that ms. altiery could be a victim of robert c. hansen.

missing aircraft, white and orange cessna h1812h, overdue from anchorage to juneau. last known position in area of malaspina glacier in the wrangell-st. elias mountains. also missing are nicholas begich, thomas boggs sr and russel brown.
last seen with moses maxie (mp #68215) at the wild goose in bethel. maxie's boat was found drifting in the upper mouth of the straight slough.

dervish adili's wallet, checkbook, and various camping supplies were found at a campsite off the taylor highway in june 2000 (reference ast case 000043685). the wallet contained his drivers license, illinois identification card and a receipt that showed a small purchase for food in tok, alaska, on august 13, 1992. in october 2006, a relative contacted the alaska state troopers reporting that adili was missing.

scott coville went missing in april 1988 from sitka, ak. his mother reported him missing in may after several attempts to contact him following his 26th birthday. at the time he was living with his wife of just under a year. in 2010, she was charged with first-degree murder and tampering with physical evidence. she pleaded guilty to a lesser charge of second-degree murder and admitted to shooting her husband while he was in bed asleep, cutting the body into pieces and disposing of the body.

family has not heard from victim since april 2005. his last banking account activity was on 05/27/2005 when he withdrew money from at an atm in fred meyers in soldotna. on 08/29/2005, family members went to his residence and found his belongings packed and his vehicles were located in the driveway.
last seen in galena, alaska.

last communication with fiala was in 1982 when he was 23 years old. he gave his family an address of "general delivery, foxhole, alaska." he stated he was moving to the fox area to build a cabin and was working for the highway department in fairbanks. since then, family members have lost contact with him.
travelling via boat between brevig mission and point clarence with archie olanna. boat was found abandoned on a beach near port clarence coast guard station.
travelling via boat between brevig mission and point clarence with fanny olanna. boat was found abandoned on a beach near port clarence coast guard station.

gerald was on a search and rescue with family members in the white mountains about 70 miles north of fairbanks. his yamaha kodiak four-wheeler was found about a year later stuck in the tundra near faith creek mine, off 69 mile of the steese highway.
karen evan was last heard from in may of 1980 in anchorage, alaska. karen faithfully spoke with family members several times a week and was looking forward to a visit from a sister living in canada.
eli sharclane got into a fight with another man, peter castillo. castillo threw sharclane off the juneau douglas bridge and was later convicted of the murder. no remains were found.
david george was reported missing by family as missing in 2007 after not being seen for two years.

david allen was last seen by the central peninsula general hospital emergency department staff on 03/27/2005. on 07/28/2005 the pickup david was last known to be driving was located abandoned in a pull-out at mile 52 of the sterling highway. search efforts were met with negative results.
blake kepley was last seen in the early morning hours on the cruise ship oosterdam sailing from sitka to ketchikan on july 22, 2011.

joseph balderas was reported missing in nome, alaska on 6/27/16 after failing to report for work. his vehicle was located at mile 44 of the nome-council highway where he was believed to be hiking. extensive searches of the area were conducted, but joseph was never located.

brandon peterson was last seen in the early hours of 12/13/2015 in the vicinity of thomas place near wrangell, ak, where he has a cabin. fire service volunteers were contacted to check on him that evening and found peterson on foot at the roadside. when responders were called to check on peterson again on dec. 17th, he was not found at the cabin. a thorough grid search of the area was unsuccessful.

robin webster was last seen early in the morning of december 6th, 2007, walking down the docks toward the fishing vessel he was working on, the f/v provider, docked at the transient float in the kodiak harbor. later that morning, webster`s hat was found on the deck of the vessel.
victim of kodiak western airlines gumman goose plane crash in water near cape chiniak, off kodiak island. also missing are robert hall, larry carr and alex inga, sr.
last seen walking towards sawtooth mountain from mile 86 elliot highway.

tom grissom was last seen on 07/23/2006 near st matthew island traveling in a skiff with three other people. the skiff overturned and the other passengers were able to swim to shore, but tom was never found.
jesse mills was reported missing after he did not return from a solo kayaking trip on 04/06/2016. his kayak was recovered on 04/08/2016 overturned on kasiana island wedged between rocks.

eric traveled to nome from st lawrence island to visit his pregnant girlfriend and cash his permanent dividend fund check. he planned to return to his home village a few days later but was never heard from again.

cameron carter was reported missing monday, dec. 3, 2007, when the lifeguard helicopter he was working on as the flight paramedic was reported missing in prince william sound near whittier, ak. debris located across from whittier ferry terminal in passage canal. an extensive 7 day search found no survivors. also missing are lance brabham and gaye mcdowell.
