charles thompson last checked in with friends the morning on 09/06/2008 near necker bay where he was reportedly beachcombing in the areas around seven fathom bay. his skiff was later found on the rocks with the motor down and in gear near yamani island south of sitka, ak. several searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

jason harper hasn't been seen since he set out alone may 4, 2004 to climb 16,237-foot mount sanford in the wrangell-st. elias national park. harper was dropped off at windy ridge on mount sanford by a pilot. the area is about 3,000 feet high and about 20 miles northwest of the summit. when the pilot returned may 9th to pick him up, he was not at the designated spot. a base camp harper had made during his summit attempt was found, including most of his camping gear. search and rescue efforts were unable to locate harper.
jurgen was last seen near the yukon river in circle, ak prepping for a canoe trip to twelve mile bluff. his canoe was later found near a sandbar 50 miles down river from circle.
victim believed to have drowned crossing tustamena lake between nicoli creek and moose beach.

ms. easland was reported missing by a friend on 7/2/1980 under the alias karen lee baunsgard. the claimant advised that she and her friends had not heard from or seen ms. easland since the afternoon of 6/28/1980, when ms. easland was supposed to meet an unknown male on 4th avenue in downtown anchorage. ms. easland had been staying at the budget motel on spenard road in anchorage with her boyfriend for the previous two weeks. ms. easland was described as a white female adult, between 23 to 25 years of age. she was reported as being between 5’2” to 5’4” tall, and between 90 to 105 pounds, with medium complexion, shoulder-length straight brown hair and brown eyes. she has a birth mark on the top of her right thigh, and a birth mark on the top of her shoulder. she was reported to occasionally wear wire-framed glasses. ms. easland was last seen wearing a short, brown leather coat with a fur collar, pants, and black high heeled boots. it is believed that ms. easland is a victim of serial killer robert c. hansen.
lee schlosstein is believed to have been the sole occupant of the floatplane that crashed into knik arm close to point woronzof near the anchorage international airport.

andrew left ruby on a snowmachine going to galena, but never arrived. searchers found tracks going into an open hole 2 miles above the yuki river on the yukon river. his snowmachine was recovered out of the open hole.

missing from f/v fierce competitor enroute from warrenton, or to king cove, ak. also missing are keithly young (#mp41723), gordon young (#mp50287), vicki rowe-simonsen (#mp50289) and robert simonsen (#mp50288).

ralph aiken was one of three people on board the blue and white aero commander four-seat plane that was making the 65-mile flight between kenai and anchorage on 07/28/2006 when it disappeared. also missing are ricky posusta mp #36464 and ian beer mp #36466.
overdue flight from anchorage to spot moose with no flight plan. aircraft was a yellow piper pa-12 with floats and tail number n3751m. also aboard was charles middleton, mp #42746.
missing with aircraft 8648n in lake clark area with 3 passengers on board. also missing is scott blom, zachary blom, and kyle longerbeam.

departed merrill field in anchorage aboard a yellow/white cessna 182, n3186u. last known location was in denali national park. no sign of plane has been located. also aboard were: donald johnston, mp #42586 karen johnston, mp #42587 linda parrish, mp #42589
tuck was last known to be traveling from brevig mission to teller.
robert was in a car with a family member and stated he wanted to get out of the car. when the family member pulled over, robert got out of the car and went into the woods.
john fell overboard on a fishing vessel near main bay and hasn't been seen since.

gaye mcdowell was reported missing monday, dec. 3, 2007, when the lifeguard helicopter she was on was reported missing in prince william sound near whittier, ak. debris located across from whittier ferry terminal in passage canal. an extensive 7 day search found no survivors. also missing are lance brabham and cameron carter.

departed merrill field in anchorage aboard a yellow/white cessna 182, n3186u. last known location was in denali national park. no sign of plane has been located. also aboard were: donald johnston, mp #42586 karen johnston, mp #42587 monte parrish, mp #42590
lawrence was last heard from july 18, 1982 and was living in juneau. he had called his family saying that he was leaving juneau and would be taking the next ferry home to hoonah.
victim fell overboard while attempting to untangle fishing lines. the vessel moored near middle rock between potato point and sawmill bay.
overdue flight from anchorage to spot moose with no flight plan. aircraft was a yellow piper pa-12 with floats and tail number n3751m. also aboard was roy pedersen, mp #42744.

reported overdue on flight from merrill field in anchorage to whitehorse, yukon territory. the last radio contact was 10 miles from the canadian border. the plane is a orange/white pa-28 with tail number n56877.
missing aboard the f/v advantage after a boating accident.
samuel has been missing and not heard from since july 5, 2018 when he went to alakanuk to visit friends. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

suspected homicide victim of michael silka. marshall's body has never been located and may have been placed in the tanana river at manley hot springs. also missing is roger culp, albert hagen and joyce hefnerklein.
matthew dean has not been seen since late january 2019. his last known address is in anchorage, but he has been known to move around the state.

matthew was in a canoe 1/4 mile upstream on the big susitna river, above the parks highway bridge, when the canoe capsized as it neared the bridge. he was last seen still holding onto the canoe, 1/4 mile downstream from the bridge. the canoe was sighted drifting about 20 minutes later, 1 1/2 miles downstream and he was not on it. a search using boats, airplanes and helicopters was conducted, but he was never located.

victim was seen jumping into talkeetna river from under the alaska railroad bridge. he was last seen near the confluence of the talkeetna and susitna rivers. despite an extensive search, jacob was never located.

pilot of a pa32 white with blue stripe, tail # n393hm, when there was a mechanical failure and smoke being reported in the cabin near the knik glacier. on 09/10/1990, a wing portion of the aircraft was located on the northwesterly shore of glacier island. on 09/11/1990, the passenger’s body was located washed ashore on the south shore cove at granite point.
boat capsized in the copper river near haley creek with six people on board. three people survived. also missing are monte kosa and harry rocheleau.
victim was last heard from in march 2011 and was last know to be in anchorage staying at the brother francis shelter. he was reported missing on may 27, 2014.
boat capsized in the copper river near haley creek with six people on board. three people survived. also missing are loren kosa and monte kosa.
victim fell overboard a skiff near columbia bay, ak and has never been located.

missing aboard f/v destination when it sank approximately 4.4 nautical miles northwest of st. george island. also missing is jeffrey hathaway, charles jones, kai hamik, darrik seibold and raymond vincler.
edward was operating a bulldozer that went into a pond at fort knox mine. a search of the equipment underwater indicated that he escaped from the enclosed cab, but he has never been located.
missing from a rafting accident on the klutina river 6 miles west of copper center. four people were recovered in good condition. after an extensive search, he was never located and presumed drowned.
two japanese climbers were caught in an avalanche on the northwest face of mount blackburn and swept approximately 3,200 feet. also missing is toshiaki mashiko.

victim entered the yukon river at buckeye creek to show his friends he was a good swimmer. he was caught in the fast current and taken into deep water. he was swept 150 yards downstream and then disappeared under water. attempts were made to reach him with a reach pole, but they were unsuccessful. search efforts after three days were also unsuccessful.
michael fell into troublesome creek near knik glacier area.
two japanese climbers were caught in an avalanche on the northwest face of mount blackburn and swept approximately 3,200 feet. also missing is shigeo ogawa.
ronald was last seen leaving a dormitory room at the university of alaska in fairbanks. believed to be a victim of homicide.

missing from skiff that capsized near eastern channel in aleutkina bay. one person was able to swim to a rock off boidarkin island and was picked up by a passing boat. also missing is kenneth osbakken.

janelle was last seen on 06/16/1989 and is missing from a plane crash into the cook inlet. the plane was returning from a bible camp at port alsworth and ran out of fuel over water. she is missing with passengers tara wetzel (mp #66498), william johnson (mp #67025), and michele green (mp #66510). a few items from the plane were found but the passengers were never located. all four are presumed to be deceased.
victim's canoe was found capsized on the big susitna river. he was known to travel the susitna river from chase to talkeetna from his cabin at mile 235 along the alaska railroad.

victim was flown out to lake creek in the shovel lake area on 07/07/85 with another person, michael schertz. they were to be picked up on 07/14/85. michael was located on 07/17/85 and indicated he didn't know where francis was. multiple searches of the area were done, but francis was never located.

presumed to have floated down the nenana river from the anderson campground on a twin air mattress. arthur can't swim and does not have a life vest. despite search efforts, arthur has not been located.
missing on board a guardian king air 200, n13ly. last known coordinates are 57.1.45 n, 134.49.88 w. debris located in frederick sound. also missing are patrick coyle and stacie morse.
overdue from a canoe trip from 6 mile creek. canoe was found floating upright and unoccupied near miller's creek east of cook inlet. also missing is claude chivers.

missing aboard f/v destination when it sank approximately 4.4 nautical miles northwest of st. george island. also missing is kai hamik, charles jones, lawrence o'grady, darrik seibold and raymond vincler.
aboard gray and blue cessna 207 tail #n9941m enroute kenai to kokhanok. went down in the cook inlet 11 miles northwest of nikiski. the plane was recovered, but randy wasn't located.

linda was reported missing by her husband who said she hadn't been seen since new year's day 2016. he reported that she walked out of the residence after a verbal altercation. linda's husband was charged and acquitted with her murder.
missing from f/v hellion. also missing are aaron goin and ronald hoffman.
allan was last seen on 10/16/1980 southwest of the sitkalidak strait. he is presumed deceased.

wesley departed kenai on the morning of 12-03-1994 piloting a 1965 cessna 206, blue and white in color with tail #n5282u. he was the sole occupant and was transporting mail and freight from kenai to homer. a radar reading indicated that the missing plane was flying the coastline between kenai and homer and a last point or radar contact was south of ninilchik and approximately 2 miles offshore. the weather in this area was extremely bad at the time. there was heavy snowfall in the ninilchik area, and it was raining in homer. authorities searched for wesley but found no sign of him or the aircraft.

wayne and another subject left ruby in route to galena on a snowmachine. they hit open water and sank approximately 4 miles west of ruby on the yukon river. the snowmachine was located approximately 30 feet from where the tracks end. the other subject was located deceased. searchers dragged the open area for 24 days without success in locating wayne.

lynn was last seen on 05/15/1981 in the kenai lake area near the ship creek area. he is presumed to have drowned. property belonging to him was found in the lake. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

michael was last seen on 12/07/1980 when he was knocked overboard of the fishing vessel gold n star at 2.5 miles north of the northeast point of sanak island. he was in the process of being hoisted back onto the vessel.
jose is presumed to have drowned in icy straits off fishing vessel crist point.
bill was last seen on 07/16/1982 during a boating accident near duck bay on afognak island.
christina was last seen in anchorage, ak. she is possibly from oregon.

matthew and his twin brother were anchored aboard f/v grayling approximately 8 miles from akutan. when his brother woke up the following morning, matthew was no longer aboard the vessel. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

stanley’s snow machine was found submerged in the kobuk river approximately 1.63 miles west of kobuk. there were only one set of snow machines tracks going into open water. the area was dragged and searched by an underwater camera. despite numerous searches, stanley was never located.

robert and crewman were aboard the f/v "cape alava." the crewman reported that he went to sleep and when he woke up, robert was no longer on board. the last known location was near knight island, yakutat. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.
michael was pulled overboard by fishing gear onboard fishing vessel western queen, approximately 15 miles southeast of st. george island in the bering sea. he is presumed to have drowned.
edward was last seen on 12/09/1989 on a skiff between soda bay and guide island. it is presumed that he fell overboard and drowned.

david was traveling via boat from koyuk to unalakleet with his girlfriend and 2 dogs. several searches of the area were conducted after they were reported overdue. the boat, his girlfriend and the dogs were located deceased, but david was not located.
christopher went missing from fishing vessel jamie lynn which sank while being towed to dutch harbor from st. paul. also missing is anton kochergin and isaac zacharof.
kim was last seen on 04/02/1980 when he was in a boating accident near sutwick island on fishing vessel, cloverleaf. he is presumed to have drowned.
giau went missing from anchorage, ak on 11/30/2011. she had only been in america for a couple of months and did not speak english.
marc fell during a mountain climb on devils thumb near petersburg, alaska.

judy was last seen on 07/18/1981. she was aboard an aircraft that was overdue from port walter to port lucy. she is missing with randall riddell (mp #66815), norman riddell (mp #67073), and rob mourant (mp #67097). all are presumed deceased.
donald was involved in a boating accident in chandler lake and is presumed to have drowned.
jay was last seen on 11/27/1979 at the southern tip of chenega island in prince william sound. he is presumed to have drowned.
carl went missing and is presumed to be deceased from a boating accident in route to togiak from kodiak on fishing vessel evanick.
raymond fell overboard while setting crab pots at 56.40.33n x 168.27.03w near pribilof islands, bering sea.

david was last seen on 09/13/1987. his riverboat was found unoccupied, running in circles 15 miles south of tanana on the yukon river. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him. he is presumed to be deceased.

olen and 3 others were aboard the f/v becca dawn when it sank in the fairweather grounds about 70 miles off the coast of alaska near yakutat. olen was last seen tethered by rope to the becca dawn swimming for a life raft that had come loose. the other 3 people were rescued by the coast guard, but olen was not located. he is presumed to be deceased.

gregory was last seen on 03/10/1993 when the fishing vessel, lady of good voyage, along with her crew members went missing. gregory is missing with glenn hoover (mp #67084) and jeremy hunter (mp #67019).
fell overboard from f/v 'westpoint' in bering sea 30 miles southeast of st. george island. despite search efforts, vongsa was never located.

gerry was last seen on 06/01/1990 on the 44 foot fishing vessel, dreamer, in between seward and chignik. per media, the fishing vessel departed seward but gerry was nowhere to be found when it arrived the chignik area.
walter was last seen in kotzebue, ak on 10/01/1998. he was enroute to buckland when his skiff disappeared. debris was found washed up on the shore between cape blossom and riley wreck.
william is presumed to have drowned from an anchored fishing vessel near cape fox island. it is assumed that he fell overboard.
seymour was last seen on 12/04/1989 on a black yamaha snow machine traveling from kivalina, ak to point hope, ak.
william was last seen on 09/16/1988 when he was attempting to cross the chena river at fort wainwright around 2000 hours.
silberia was last seen in anchorage, ak on 02/10/2012.

james madsen jr was last seen on 09/17/1978 when he was on a flight from king salmon to kodiak. the plane may have gone down in shelikoff straits. he is missing with nekita katelnikoff (mp #67157) and marion parker (mp #66726).

nicholas went missing and is presumed to have drowned after a boating accident near horse and colt islands near juneau, ak. also missing is james charles metlicka mp #66856. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.
brian is presumed to have drowned after the fishing vessel tamra dawn was reported to be sinking near clarence strait, 2 mi from pt mccarty and south of ketchikan.
john was in an aircraft that went missing near the airstrip at bernard glacier and failed to return to jakes bar airstrip to pick up a passenger.

seth was last seen on 12/12/1992. he, and three others, went missing from bucareli bay after the fishing vessel, sea castle, overturned. the four missing individuals were not wearing life vests or survival suits at the time of the accident. four additional people survived the accident. searches by the coast guard found pieces of wood, some styrofoam, and a jacket belonging to one of the missing children. seth is presumed to have died from hypothermia and washed off the boat by waves along with barry ritter (mp #66707), aaron castle (mp #66476), and sean castle (mp #66474).
marc went missing from fishing vessel crabber lin j, 8 miles northwest of st. paul island. marc is presumed to have drowned. the boat sank due to heavy sea icing.
christopher was last seen on 11/16/1986 when he was retrieving buoy bags. he was hit and knocked overboard. unfortunately, rescue efforts were unsuccessful.
christopher went missing after falling overboard from fishing vessel frances lee. body was never recovered.
michael and john spear (mp #67042) were on board the fishing vessel, berta j, when it sank about 50 nautical miles south of yakutat.

erik and charles johnson (mp66793) went missing and are presumed to be deceased after the skiff they were on was located upside down near yakutat. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.
samuel fell while goat hunting on a mountain near haines, ak. his body was unable to be retrieved due to dangerous conditions.

aboard fishing vessel "vestfjord" that sank about 30 miles south of the trinity islands just west of kodiak island with 6 crew members. two crew members were located deceased. also missing are richard kristovich mp 60768, daniel mcdonald mp66777, and kevin melnick mp67269.

darrell was last seen on 02/10/1991 aboard the 98 foot steel crab fishing vessel, barbarossa, which was lost in the bering sea about 30 miles west of st. george island. the coast guard received a distress call from the boat around 1:00am but searches did not locate the boat or the crewmen. it is presumed that the boat capsized and sank. darrell is missing with five other crewmen including donald bright (mp #66651), george brandenburg (mp #67271), dennis olberding (mp #66824), timothy schmitt (mp #67212), and brian mcpherson (mp #66996).

greg was aboard the vessel 'katrina' near heceta island when he reported having mechanical difficulties, going aground, and abandoning ship. the us coast guard discovered a debris field that included debris from the 'katrina.' searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

jeremy was last seen on 03/10/1993 when the fishing vessel, lady of good voyage, along with her crew members went missing. jeremy is missing with glenn hoover (mp #67084) and gregory schwindt (mp #67020).
shawn was last seen on 09/19/1988 when he fell out of a boat in packers creek lake in kalgin island.
robert was last seen on 05/18/1989. he is missing from the fishing vessel, snow king. area waters were searched but robert was not located.

eric and renee odegaard (mp #66635) went missing from fishing vessel mistress that left petersburg for a trip to seymour canal. debris was located around seymour canal and gambler bay area. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them. their father, james odegaard was located deceased on 11-05-1999 in the surf near twin point.

subject missing and presumed deceased after his f/v "miss dee dee" was found run aground with the engine running, lights on and no one onboard. searches of the air and water were conducted, but michael was never located.

jason went missing while tending a subsistence fishing net on the chilkat river near haines. his fishing net, boots and backpack were found on the river bank. several searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

kenneth was last seen on 07/06/1984 during a boating accident near guide island by sitka. kenneth and another individual were on a skiff when it caught fire and they both jumped overboard. the other individual was rescued, but kenneth was never located. he is presumed deceased.
darlene and michael jaussaud, mp #67111, went missing after an aircraft crashed on knik glacier.

thomas was last seen on 08/26/1994 in a boat with five passengers en-route to napaskiak from bethel. the boat hit a big wave and overturned. all passengers had been drinking. two were rescued and two bodies were recovered but thomas has not been located.
ignatius was last seen on 05/07/1989 when his snow machine went through the ice on the yukon river south of holy cross.
shaun was a crew member on fishing vessel evanick which overturned in route from kodiak to togiak. shaun is presumed to be deceased.

anna was last seen on 09/13/1984 during a boating accident near yakutat. her skiff was found abandoned in the alsek river 3 miles below her cabin. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating her. she is presumed deceased.

faisal was a seaman serving as a member of the engine room crew on the vessel ss northern lights which was traveling in good weather and calm seas from anchorage, ak to tacoma, wa. he was last seen in the afternoon or early evening of 06/25/1997 when he left the lower engine room. faisal was never seen again and he is presumed to have gone overboard and drowned.
robert was last seen on 12/08/1991 aboard a snow machine that went through the ice in the arctic ocean. he is missing with lawrence ahmaogak jr (mp #66555).
jan was last seen on 11/19/1989 after he was knocked overboard the fishing vessel flying cloud when a cable broke 100 miles east of st paul, alaska.
arthur was last seen on 11/12/1989. he was riding on a snow machine on kuskokwim river went it went through the ice 3 miles up river from bethel. he is presumed to have drowned.
on 03/07/1985, antonio fell overboard the fishing vessel, ocean bounty, near unimak island.
daniel is presumed to have drowned near sheldon point.

clarence and a companion fell overboard from a skiff on the yukon river approximately 1 mile up from nulato. the companion floated down river and was pulled from the water unharmed. he was last seen swimming towards shore. neither were wearing life vests. the boat was located, but despite numerous search efforts, clarence was never found.

gregory and two other people were floating down the gulkana river from paxson lake in a rubber raft. near falls canyon he lost his balance and fell out of the raft. he was not wearing a life jacket. the other two people survived the incident. a search of the area resulted in negative results.

christine and her mother dianna (mp #61351) were aboard a vessel which caught fire and sank 30 miles nw of sitka near sinitsin island in approximately 450 feet of water. a dive of the area and a ground search of the surrounding beaches failed to find any trace of them. they are presumed deceased and robert j. meyer was convicted of their murder.
presumed drowned in the six mile creek in the hope area.
joe was last seen on the steps in front of residence in council, ak on 9/29/1992. his hat was found 100 feet west of his residence.
john corbett was aboard the "nannie d", a 32 ft boat which left seward, ak enroute to three hole bay, and has not been seen since. also missing is k'lynn love and newell noyes.
clinton was last heard from in mid april 2011. his residence was searched with no leads and no sign of foul play was observed. his wallet and two cell phones were located inside the residence.
shawn was last seen in soldotna, ak on 01/29/2013.
joseph slipped and fell into the tanana river near tanana bridge at mile 275.5 of the richardson highway.

emmanuel was last seen in delta junction, ak on 07/08/2012. his car was located parked at a local bluff overlooking the tanana river on the evening of 07/09/2012. he is known to climb the cliff and adjacent bridge crossing the river. searches of the area resulted in negative results.

miguel was last seen drinking and fishing from the rear of a boat that was docked in roosevelt harbor on zarembo island. he was last seen by his co-workers between 1800-1900 hours on 08/04/2007. search efforts were concluded with no sign of miguel.
thomas was last seen on 05/06/1990 during a boating accident in the yakutat bay. he is missing with randy ely (mp #67024). both are presumed to be deceased.
reid fell in a crevasse on mt. st. elias at the 17,200 ft. level.
dennis is presumed to be deceased from a boating accident on fishing vessel ocean hope ii in shelikof straits. also missing is daniel tullar, michael wheeler and jack white.

sveinn was a crewman on a fishing vessel on 02/14/1985 when it was reported missing between uganik bay and alitak bay. he is missing with shawn heaney (mp #66821), ray basel (mp #67230), melvin wick (mp #67035), and paul rowe (mp #67034). no debris from the boat or bodies have been found.
gregory was a crew member on fishing vessel uyak ii that sank 20 miles south of sitkalidak island near kodiak alaska. he is presumed to be deceased.

frank was returning to nenana from fairbanks when he stopped to look for firewood somewhere between ester and nenana. his vehicle was located unoccupied on standard creek road near old nenana hwy. several searches have been conducted, but frank has not been located.
cassandra has not had any contact with family members for several years. her last contact with law enforcement was 08-07-2019.
william is missing from a boating accident on the tanana river. searches of the river and area were met with negative results.

elizabeth, chad chadwick, neal gutleben, alexie nose, michael sharp, bernice waska and wilson wassillie were traveling by boat from quinhagak. their boat was last seen near the mouth of the eek river on 10/20/2020. numerous searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.
family hasn't spoken to raphael since november 2022.
eli and nafiun awal (mp104176) are both missing after they attempted to summit the west ridge of moose's tooth in denali national park. searches of the area have been unsuccessful in finding them.
cynthia voluntarily ceased contact with her family around 2018. she was last known to be living in chugiak.

kelly was last seen fishing with her uncle near suzie creek on the nushagak river before departing alone in her uncle’s boat. the boat was located swamped near lewis point on the nushagak river on 10-07-2023. searches of the area have been unsuccessful in locating her.
keith was last seen in anchorage on 10/11/2023.
brian was reported missing by a family member after not being able to get in contact with him.
mason left his residence on 05/18/2024 at approximately 0530 hours. security cameras caught him breaking his cell phone at the corner of venus way and gwenn drive where he was last seen.
family has not seen or heard from sonya since 11-01-2019.

robert was aboard a white with red trim grumman mallard amphibian, n2965, that was reported overdue on a flight from anchorage to kodiak. also onboard and missing are jay haddock (mp 81045), robert bergman (mp 81040) and leonard boughton (mp 81044). extensive searches were conducted but were unsuccessful in locating the plane or the passengers.
jorden was last known to be in anchorage. his family has not heard from him since 12-09-2020.

lorenzo went overboard from the cruise ship koningsdam that was located in the gastineau channel, across from the 430 block of egan drive. initial reports from cruise ship passengers reported hearing screams from a person in the gastineau channel. cctv from the cruise ship confirmed a person climbed over the ships railing and never returned. passengers from a nearby cruise ship reported seeing something fall from the cruise ship koningsdam and then call out for help. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.
jeremy went missing after a boating accident on iliamna lake. extensive searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

leonard was aboard a white with red trim grumman mallard amphibian, n2965, that was reported overdue on a flight from anchorage to kodiak. also onboard and missing are jay haddock (mp 81045), robert bergman (mp 81040) and robert johnson (mp 81042). extensive searches were conducted but were unsuccessful in locating the plane or the passengers.

james and dennis slats were last seen at the old abandoned school building in chevak. on 03/08/2021, the school was reported to have burned to the ground. searches of the village have been unsuccessful in locating them.

robert was aboard a white with red trim grumman mallard amphibian, n2965, that was reported overdue on a flight from anchorage to kodiak. also onboard and missing are robert johnson (mp 81042), jay haddock (mp 81045) and leonard boughton (mp 81044). extensive searches were conducted but were unsuccessful in locating the plane or the passengers.
arne fell overboard f/v randi jo after it sank near west rock, on the northwest corner of prince of wales island. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

yoshiko and her daughter, shima funakoshi mp #98456, were aboard a 406 caravan airplane with tail number n6591l that left barrow heading for wainwright when it crashed. debris and oil slick were found 10 miles northeast of wainwright in an area of the ocean with a depth of 75 feet. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.

daniel possibly drowned in kachemak bay in homer, ak. reported overdue from canoeing. also missing are robert gershbein (mp #67213) and melvin mestre (mp #67205). searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.

jeffrey was last seen on 03/22/1990 when the 162 foot fishing trawler, aleutian enterprise, capsized and sank in the bering sea with the crewmen aboard. he is missing with nelo marciel (mp #67109), joseph alaimo (mp #66746), matthew schneider (mp #66931), javier valenzuela (mp #66739), david jefferies (mp #66724), john dieterich (mp #67278), robert mccord (mp #66701), and robert davis jr (mp #67158).
ray went missing and is presumed to be deceased after an aircraft accident in tongass narrows in ketchikan, ak.

lanny was last seen on 02/02/1997. he is presumed to have drowned after a skiff accident at hobart bay. his skiff was located and recovered, but searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

william (aka scott) was last seen on 10/30/1986 during a boating accident on the f/v danube near juneau in the gastineau channel around marmion island. he is missing with tom kelly (mp #66835) and william tugman (mp #66808). wreckage was found on douglas and admiralty island. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them. they are all presumed deceased.
ricardo is a u.s. forest service employee and is missing and presumed to have drowned at bakewell lake drainage near ketchikan, ak.
milo and another crew member were aboard the fishing vessel "active" when is sank 18 miles south of stephen's passage near grand island. the other crew member was located deceased on 06-20-1992.
timothy was last seen on a polaris 500 rmk short track in selawik. his direction of travel is unknown. several searches of the area and other local villages were unsuccessful in locating him.
daniel fell overboard from fishing vessel clipper express approximately 90 miles south of st. paul island, ak. he did not have a personal flotation device. daniel is presumed to have drowned.
daniel is presumed to be deceased from a boating accident near portage bay near shelikof strait from fishing vessel ocean hope ii. also missing is dennis frye, michael wheeler and jack white.

philip was last seen on 09/30/1984 during a boating accident off of the southeast tip of atkins island near koniuju island. he is missing with geoffrey odonoghue (mp #67152) and david miller jr (mp #66959). all three are presumed deceased.
durg was a crew member who went missing from motor vessel seledang ayu when the vessel ran aground after engine failure off spray cape unalaska in dutch harbor.
gerald was last seen on 10/15/1995. he failed to return home from a hunting trip on prince of wales island. he presumed to be deceased.

mickey was last seen on 02/27/1990 when the boat he was on, sank. he is missing with tracy hill (mp #67259) and david strom (mp #66868). the vessel was traveling from blaine, wa to king cove, ak. search efforts were hampered by 60 knot winds and seas up to 27 feet. all that was found was a life raft, an epirb, and one survival suit. the raft was found 70 miles southeast of cordova near cape suckling. the three men are presumed to be deceased.
dale fell overboard off the f/v miss molly at the false pass dock. the area was searched, but no sign of dale was ever found.

william was last seen on 06/16/1989 and is missing from a plane crash into the cook inlet. the plane was returning from a bible camp at port alsworth and ran out of fuel over water. he is missing with passengers tara wetzel (mp #66498), janelle gerlitz (mp #66493), and michele green (mp #66510). a few items from the plane were found but the passengers were never located. all four are presumed to be deceased.

emil went missing on a snowmobile trip from dillingham to clark's point. when he failed to show up at his residence in clark's point a search was activated. his tracks and shoe prints were located on a sand bar in the nushagak river below lewis point. the snowmobile tracks led to an open water area and his shoe prints led away from the same area, but then came to a stop in another open water area.

michele was last seen on 06/16/1989 and is missing from a plane crash into the cook inlet. the plane was returning from a bible camp at port alsworth and ran out of fuel over water. she is missing with passengers janelle gerlitz (mp #66493), william johnson (mp #67025), and tara wetzel (mp #66498). a few items from the plane were found but the passengers were never located. all four are presumed to be deceased.
peter went missing on 09/02/1980 during a boating accident between old harbor and sitkalidak island. he is missing with daniel ignatin (mp #66496) and both are presumed deceased.

petr was last seen on 08/01/1988 when he fell overboard while on the fishing vessel, yarmon, near the kalgin islands. he is missing with antip kuzenetsov (mp #66822) who also fell overboard. both are presumed to be deceased.

stanton shelton went missing approximately 10 miles down river from alakanuk on the yukon river. he was traveling with three others from emmonak toward their home village in a 18-foot lund skiff when the boat sank. of those on board, one survived, two died and shelton was never located. he is presumed deceased.
moses was last seen early morning hours on 08/26/2011. he is believed to have fallen overboard from fishing vessel antoinette renae.
lawrence was last seen on 12/08/1991 aboard a snow machine that went through the ice in the arctic ocean. he is missing with robert neakok (mp #66633).

antip was last seen on 08/01/1988 when he fell overboard while on the fishing vessel, yarmon, near the kalgin islands. he is missing with petr reutov (mp #66485) who also fell overboard. both are presumed to be deceased.

michael crawford was last heard from via text message on april 22, 2020. he had been camping and recreating in the area of hidden creek trail, which is off skilak lake road between sterling and cooper landing. his backpack, fishing poles and dog were found on the trail by a passing hiker the next day, april 23.

victor was last seen around midnight on a boat in surprise cove in prince william sound near whittier. he was discovered missing around 0600 hours. searches of the area have been unsuccessful in locating him.
roman and 4 other crewmen were aboard the f/v "amber dawn" when it sank 6 miles north of atka in the bering sea. three men were rescued, but roman and douglas rowe, mp #67100, were not located.
lawrence is missing and presumed to be deceased when f/v tonquin sank 30 mi e of sitkalidak island. last seen on deck of the vessel.
john was last seen departing pilot station enroute to the mouth of the atchuelinguk river via the yukon river. he was riding on a blue and black skandic ski-doo snowmachine.
wassilie was last seen in a boat on the kuskokwim river. he is presumed to have drowned.

media reports that dwight florin and kaino dixon (mp #67115) were crewmen on the fishing vessel, cougar. they left the cougar in a 12' aluminum fishing skiff, dawn, late on thursday, 11/12/1981 to hunt on kodiak island. the men apparently were stranded by increasingly bad weather which churned up to 6-8' breakers near the beach. as night fell, they flashed an sos to the cougar and later fired a distress flare. then later, they fired a non-distress flare. crewmen from the fishing vessel tried to reach the island thursday night but were turned back by rough seas. when the crewmen finally reached shore on friday, 11/13/1981, they found no sign of the men or the skiff. both men are presumed deceased.
daniel is presumed to have drowned after the skiff he was travelling on was found beached on san bautista island. he is presumed to have fallen overboard near toti island.
randy was last seen on 08/04/1984 when he went ashore in a skiff which was later found adrift 30 yards offshore in harbor point in port moller.
naomi was lost in a canoeing accident in katmai national park where naknek lake and iliuk arm converge.
paul is presumed to have fallen off p/v coastal star and drowned in port moller.

renee and eric odegaard (mp #67118) went missing from fishing vessel mistress that left petersburg for a trip to seymour canal. debris was located around seymour canal and gambler bay area. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them. their father, james odegaard was located deceased on 11-05-1999 in the surf near twin point.
aaron went missing from fishing vessel arctic rose which sank 205 miles northwest of st. paul island.

brian, an assistant hunting guide, was reported missing when he failed to arrive at the village from camp upstream on the nushagak river. murray was last seen departing a beach near the camp and operating a small skiff , which was later found adrift with the key on and the throttle in the open position. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.
alejamvro went missing from fishing vessel arctic rose which sank 205 miles northwest of st. paul island.
robert was last seen in july 2012.
edward was last seen when f/v northern aurora capsized in resurrection bay near seward due to heavy icing.
marvin is presumed to have drowned out of sheldon point.
david went missing and is presumed to have drowned after a tug boat rolled over and sank in farragut bay in fredrick sound.

lorence was gold panning at portage lake near whittier. the canoe he was in floated offshore and he made attempts to retrieve it. he is presumed drowned. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

james was aboard a skiff with 3 other people when the skiff sunk in hoonah sound while setting shrimp gear. two survivors were located and the other person was located deceased. search efforts were unsuccessful in locating james.

belinda and garrett saccheus (mp66601) left golovin to travel to elim on two snow machines. tracks led from golovin out onto the ice and into the open water. extensive searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.

douglas and raymond brown (mp#66981) went seal hunting via snow machine in the kotzebue sound on the morning of 05-20-1999. they were reported overdue on 05-22-1999. an extensive search was conducted, and snow machine tracks were found going into an open lead of water. searches were unsuccessful in locating them.
arnold was last known to be at his residence. his new .243 rifle was missing from his residence.
last seen with alfred olick (mp#29053) at the wild goose in bethel. maxie's boat was found drifting in the upper mouth of the straight slough.
charles was last seen on 09/08/1982 during a boating accident three miles downriver from the yukon river bridge.
john godfrey is from sitka but had recently been in pelican, gustavus and juneau prior to going missing. family hasn't heard from him since late june 2019.

scott went missing and is presumed to have drowned in a boating accident near kizhuyak bay on fishing vessel sea wolf. the vessel was spotted adrift with the lights and engine running outside anton larsen bay. the uscg later spotted debris from the sea wolf in kizhuyak bay.

tyler was a crew member aboard the f/v pacific apollo 50 miles west of st. paul island. he was inside a crab pot fixing a wire tie when it was launched accidentally. he was able to get out of the pot, and several attempts at throwing a life ring to him were made. a crewmember was able to reach him but he became listless and slipped out of grip. despite search efforts, he was never located.

william (aka bill) was last seen on 10/30/1986 during a boating accident on the f/v danube near juneau in the gastineau channel around marmion island. he is missing with william scott lewis (mp #66891) and tom kelly (mp #66835). wreckage was found on douglas and admiralty island. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them. they are all presumed deceased.
richard was last seen on a canoe trip on kenai lake in seward, ak on 06/26/1977. also missing is keith zimmerman.
maureen is presumed to have drowned while boating from protection point around cape constantine.
timothy was last seen on 12/27/1986 during a boating accident in sharatin bay near kodiak island. he is missing with stephen swartout (mp #66708). they are both presumed to be deceased.
brian was last seen on 09/02/1996 when he was swept off the deck of the 165' longline halibut fishing vessel, yukon queen. he became entangled in the longline gear end anchor and was lost.
mark was last seen early february 2008 by friends and family.
mark fell overboard from crabbing vessel bering empire near the attu island.
greg is presumed to have drowned in icy straits from fishing vessel crist point.

vern was involved in a hit and run accident in anchorage on the evening of 11/06/1961. a witness reported that vern was seen in his vehicle in the ditch near the portage bar on 11/06/1961 between 10:00 and 10:30 p.m. on 11/06/1961. he appeared to be intoxicated and laid down in the front seat of his vehicle and apparently went to sleep. at approximately 9:00 a.m. on 11/07/1961, the witness saw the vehicle still in the ditch, but vern was no longer in it.

anchorage police are asking for the public’s assistance in locating 67-year-old amiri yamani. yamani was last seen where he was staying near e 11th avenue and gambell street during the first week of december 2021. officers’ efforts to locate yamani have been unsuccessful. it is unknown if yamani has any family in the area; it appears he lived alone.
missing and lost at sea from the area of point couverden when the f/v wind walker capsized. also missing are: michael brown, #mp134409 alex ireland, #mp134412
missing aboard a 1948 silver beechcraft bonanza a35 aircraft with tail number n410b that left gustavus enroute to yakutat. also missing is tanya hutchins (mp 128301) and hans munich (mp 128304).

missing from fishing boat uf 22 near kodiak island. remains of the 34-foot boat were found by the fishing vessel columbia near the south end of kodiak island on aiaktalik beach on march 2, 1978. also missing is charles taylor, mp #134267.
missing and lost at sea from the area of point couverden when the f/v wind walker capsized. also missing are: emilio celaya-talamantez, mp#134410 alex ireland, #mp134412
holly has not been in contact with family since 12-16-2024.
family members reported christopher missing on 02-27-2025. he was last seen on 01-01-2021 and hasn't been seen or heard from since.
peter was last seen at his residence on kanakanak road in dillingham. several searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.
missing after a polaris ranger utility vehicle broke through the ice at the confluence of fish creek and the susitna river. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.
michael has not been in contact with family. he may have possibly gone to las vegas.
jiri was dropped off at the anchorage ted stevens international airport on 08-12-2024 and planned to fly to chicago.
jon was last heard from via text message around 2300 hours indicating he was going to be up on flattop mountain. no one has seen or heard from him since.
connor was last heard from over social media on 08-01-2025.
emmery was last heard from via telephone on the evening of 11-02-2025.
riccardo went missing after falling through a hole/moulin on mendenhall glacier.
mairenn left her residence and never returned.

cora andersen was last seen leaving the eureka lodge, mile 128 glenn highway, on july 16, 1979. her abandoned vehicle was found on july 25, 1979, in the moose creek campground, mile 58 glenn highway, north of palmer, alaska.

curtis left place of employment by taxi and stated he was "going north". employer assumed this meant he was going home. he had a paycheck in his pocket which was never cashed. he left tools and personal items such as 4 wheeler and snowmachine at job site and has not returned.
victim's family reports they have not heard from their daughter, kelly dunn, since 1998.

kristopher was last seen leaving his residence in fairbanks, alaska on may 16, 2004 with his father robert kelly sr, mp #2936. on may 29, 2004 the victim's older brother robert kelly jr, stopped by to visit and found the residence unlocked and the family dog unattended. on june 1, 2004, the family's vehicle was found parked at the bentley mall in fairbanks, alaska.
amy and her brother scott (mp # 6050) were last seen at their trailer home. amy was wearing a sweater, a red and blue vest and striped jeans. scott was wearing a striped t-shirt and jeans.
virgil was last seen on a boat at chichagof island located across from pelican, alaska. the abandoned boat was discovered later, but virgil has not been found.

hiroko nemoto, a japanese national studying english at michigan state university, lived in east lansing, michigan when she traveled to alaska. she had just finished the spring semester and only 10 credits away from earning her bachelor's degree. nemoto told a friend she intended to stay in alaska for a month, but she purchased only a one-way ticket from northwest airlines. nemoto spent her first night in alaska at the denali windsong lodge. the next day, she traveled to anchorage and spent the night at a hostel at 700 h street. nemoto had made reservations june 6 for the ferry from whittier to valdez and had a reservation at the westmark hotel in valdez. both tickets were used, but she never showed up either at the ferry or the hotel. local police tracked her to the windbreak hotel in wasilla on june 8, 1998. nemoto's mother, who lives in ibaraki, contacted the japanese consulate in michigan about a month after her daughter arrived in alaska. the japanese consulate then called east lansing police. apparently nemoto, a straight-a student, was depressed after receiving a b in a class.
davis went for an after dinner walk at approximately 19:00 in her hometown of chugiak, alaska on august 30, 1974. she never returned home and has not been seen since.
cynthia was last heard from on 02-27-1995 via a phone conversation with her mother.

pavel and another crew member were aboard the f/v 'sunrise' when they were washed overboard in breakers in strawberry channel east of cordova. the other crew member was located alive. despite search efforts, pavel was never located.
layla may be in the company of a non-custodial family member. she is believed to be mexico. she has a small superficial hole on the outside of her left ear. her nickname is laylee.
sharon buis was believed to be hiking on mt. roberts. her vehicle was found in the parking lot of the mt. roberts trailhead on basin road.
scott was last seen by his parents and friends on october 31, 1990 in kenai, alaska.
thomas was last seen on march 1, 2000.

hugh nadeau started to walk to his cabin located on square lake from wien lake in march 1974. the distance between these two points is an estimated 15 miles. he has not been seen since he departed wien lake. air search was made of the area between square lake and wien lake with negative results.
mp was hunting with some friends and when they awoke the mp was not at the campsite. all of his gear had been left behind.
robin "lynn" vansickel worked as a dancer in anchorage, alaska. she was last seen sometime in 1988 (the date of her disappearance is an approximation) and has never been heard from again.

sondra was last seen at approximately 7pm on november 4, 1993 in the spenard area of anchorage. her truck was found abandoned in the parking lot of a 7-11 at the corner of arctic and international airport rd the morning of november 5, 1993.
was sitting on a bench at the top of the mt. roberts tram, outside the restaurant where last seen by his wife. mitsuo has alzheimer's and has gone missing once in the past for eight hours.

jan was reported missing by out-of-state relatives on january 6, 1988. it was reported that he lived and worked in juneau for about 2 years up to october 10, 1985. his vehicle, personal possessions and financial holdings were left behind. jan had not been heard from since 1985.
friends and family have not seen her since her disappearance.
victim of grumman goose plane crash in water near cape chiniak. also missing are larry carr, frank rodman and alex inga.
dennis pungowiyi and his hunting partner's boat was found swamped near a cabin in southeast cape, saint lawrence island.

brandon was last seen in the village of akhiok on kodiak island when he left on an atv to go hike buck cove mountain. his atv was found parked on a trail from akhiok to the entrance of little narrows. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.
jeri brommels was last seen in the mountain view area of anchorage, alaska.
leonard was last seen watching the 4th of july parade in fairbanks. he was reported missing on 09/23/1995. leonard had not picked up his last 2 months of checks from the post office.
aboard f/v "addington" which sank in the shelikof strait near cape uganik. also missing is clarence "john" chepak.

thomas was last seen at a fish camp in the ambler, alaska area on september 29, 2012. his last known journal entry was on october 7, 2012. his plan was to hike more than 25 miles to kobuk, fly to fairbanks by 11/15/2012 and return home to wisconsin. he never arrived. it has been reported that he departed the camp possibly by canoe, which was later located on the west side of the ambler river. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.
robert christopher mark was last seen during september 1993 at a fish camp near aniak, alaska.
curtiss weller was last seen leaving bunkhouse and walking towards room in false pass, alaska on the evening of march 23, 2001.
aboard f/v "addington" which sank in the shelikof straight near cape uganik. also missing is melvin torsen.

maclin was last seen leaving the fishing vessel, zolotoi, at the unisea docks in unalaska, alaska on november 29, 1997. he had gone to the local bars that night and never returned to the vessel. he also fished commercially in kodiak, alaska.
walter hawk was last seen in the village of tuluksak, ak on 07/12/2016 and is considered a vulnerable adult. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him

ricky posusta was one of three people on board the blue and white aero commander four-seat plane that was making the 65-mile flight between kenai and anchorage on 07/28/2006 when it disappeared. also missing are ralph aiken mp #36459 and ian beer mp #36466.

ian beer was one of three people on board the blue and white aero commander four-seat plane that was making the 65-mile flight between kenai and anchorage on 07/28/2006 when it disappeared. also missing are ricky posusta mp #36464 and ralph aiken mp #36459.

charlie chocknok sr. was last seen on foot at the new stuyahok airport, alaska, on july 21, 2000. he had talked about visiting dillingham, 43 air miles to the south, but he never made it on any flights.

gilbert ungott was last seen at a party in the early morning hours on 09-08-2007. searches by atv, boat, aircraft and on foot did not discover any sign of gilbert or his green honda foreman four wheeler.
melody and her husband, norman kassahn, are presumed drowned when their skiff was found on a mud flat about a half mile from shore in hartney bay.
justina was last seen on 11/18/90 in nome, ak.
richard ward was last seen in kodiak, alaska on may 3, 2005 on the m/v tustemena.
victim's boat was found at the end of chelatna lake near snowslide creek with all of his gear in it.
victim was involved in a boating accident in the skwentna river at the mouth of the talchulitna river. he was not wearing a life vest and was last seen going under in mid-stream.
norman and his wife, melody kassahn, are presumed drowned when their skiff was found on a mud flat about a half mile from shore in hartney bay.

missing in an overdue aircraft from wolf lake in palmer, ak enroute to whitehorse, canada. aircraft was a red/white/gold v tail bonanza aircraft, n7062n. last seen on radar at middleton island, another pilot saw the aircraft heading ne through nizina valley. also aboard the aircraft is the missing person's wife, ingrid patigler, namus mp #42492.

missing from commercial fishing vessel, the st. patrick, off the southeast end of marmot island. there were 12 people on board. two people were recovered alive and eight were located deceased. missing are gary stallings and clifford stigall.
lorraine was last seen in fort yukon on 10/04/18 at approximately 1700 walking near her residence. multiple searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating her.

victim fell into the copper river near chitina above the mccarthy bridge while dip net fishing. his body was observed floating by family members. aircraft searches were conducted, but the victim was never located.
missing from overdue aircraft from king salmon to anchorage. last heard from west of moose point.
helicopter crash in the waters of kachemak bay off anchor point, alaska.
overdue from climbing the north face of mendenhall towers near juneau. also missing is george ryan johnson, mp #42606.

john went missing after an attempt to climb solo on mount mckinley. he left the mountain house in the sheldon amphitheater heading for the nw fork of the ruth glacier and the east buttress. a climber in the area contacted him as he headed up the glacier. john told the climber that he had 14 days of food consisting of powdered milk, honey, sugar and flour, a bivi sack, snowmobile suit, no tent or sleeping bag, vb boots, a red plastic sled, snowshoes, blue pants, blue jacket, and approximately 20 wands for marking trails. he was last seen heading up the nw fork between peak 11,300 and mt. dan beard taking a beeline course through the crevasses. several searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

virginia sacco and gary love departed the east river at dry bay in a cessna 170, n8190a. they were going to fly to yakutat for supplies and return to the east river. they did not return and were reported overdue on 07/31/93. a search of the flight route and area turned up a landing gear and wheel assembly from aircraft, which was located approximately 4 miles offshore near dry bay. a survival pack and shaving kit from the aircraft was located along the beach.
overdue from hunting at icy bay. last seen in icy bay climbing a mountain and walking westward from a ridgespur west of carson creek. has never been located.
william was last known to be in the area of the badger gas, located at 2004 badger road in north pole, alaska. he is a local transient and known to stay in abandoned vehicles and vacant buildings.
harry pitka was last seen traveling via boat from nulato to ruby. also missing with him are claude demoski, bertha demoski, leo demoski and emmett nollner.
earl ashworth was last seen 08/10/18 at 1700 hours near mile 56 of the seward highway. several searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.
last seen on 11/01/17 at about 1356 hours walking on south alaska street in palmer.
left anchorage for cantwell in a white with green and gold trim cessna 401b, n7984q, and never arrived. also missing on board are jack dickey, donald gabbert, gordon newstrom and john murphy.

john squires last seen rafting the american creek in katmai national park on 6/20/2018, when the raft he was in hit a sweeper, throwing him and the other occupants on board in the fast flowing creek. he was last seen swimming down river, attempting to reach the shoreline.

roland was seen in egegik on his f/v ketivik getting fuel. he was headed towards ugashik. three of the fuel drums were located 25 miles sw of ugashik bay. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.
skiff swamped east of cape alitak in alitak bay.

missing from commercial fishing vessel, the st. patrick, off the southeast end of marmot island. there were 12 people on board. two people were recovered alive and eight were located deceased. missing are clifford stigall and gary stallings.

loridee was placed into a treatment facility named rainforest recovery center in juneau, alaska on 3/21/2016. loridee left the treatment center on 3/24/2016 against medical advice and has not been located since.

missing from f/v fierce competitor enroute from warrenton, or to king cove, ak. also missing are keithly young (#mp41723), gordon young (#mp50287), robert simonsen (#mp50288), and larry jones (#mp42381).
no contact with daughter for three years prior to being reported missing. usually called every 6 months.
missing on board a guardian king air 200, n13ly. last known coordinates are 57.1.45 n, 134.49.88 w. debris located in frederick sound. also missing are margaret langston and stacie morse.
victims 4-wheeler and trailer were found abandoned at 4 mile road in willow, ak.

pamela bealer and eric bealer were both reported missing on 10-05-18 and have not been seen since 09-12-18 when they were going to their cabin at green top, which is a rural residence located near pelican bay.
victim fell into the copper river approximately 5 miles south of chitina on the river's west bank while dip netting. despite search efforts, he was never located.
last seen by family on february 14, 2019 in juneau, alaska.
left anchorage for cantwell in a white with green and gold trim cessna 401b, n7984q, and never arrived. also missing on board are gerald dalrymple, jack dickey, donald gabbert and gordon newstrom.

overdue from a fishing trip in china poot bay with his son, christopher. the canoe was located capsized on 08/10/79 and christopher's body was located on 08/11/79. thomas was never located during any of the searches.

victim departed a base hunting camp at iniskin bay in a 14-foot skiff to attempt to pick up two stranded hunters. a witness observed him enter a channel in the main part of iniskin bay having trouble fighting the tide and observed him go out of sight towards cook inlet. on 05/13/1980, the skiff was discovered west of shore, approximately six miles into iniskin bay and there was no sign of crossan. despite numerous search efforts, he was never located.

missing person did not pick up friend from airport on 08-31-1985. they were scheduled to go on a hunting trip on 09-01-1985. at the time of his disappearance, he had been in alaska for approximately 6 months and was doing business as the ivory runner.

alexie, chad chadwick, neal gutleben, michael sharp, bernice waska, elizabeth wassillie and wilson wassillie were traveling by boat from quinhagak. their boat was last seen near the mouth of the eek river on 10/20/2020. numerous searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.

neal, chad chadwick, alexie nose, michael sharp, bernice waska, elizabeth wassillie and wilson wassillie were traveling by boat from quinhagak. their boat was last seen near the mouth of the eek river on 10/20/2020. numerous searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them.
doren was last seen on airport road in fairbanks.
florence was last seen on west beach in nome coming out of a tent at approximately 1-2 mile on 08-31-2020 at 1600 hours.
david and jenae larson (mp 76235) are missing after a landslide in haines, ak on 12-02-2020.
michelle hasn't been in contact with her family since december 2019.

jay was aboard a white with red trim grumman mallard amphibian, n2965, that was reported overdue on a flight from anchorage to kodiak. also onboard and missing are robert johnson (mp 81042), robert bergman (mp 81040) and leonard boughton (mp 81044). extensive searches were conducted but were unsuccessful in locating the plane or the passengers.
gabrielle was last heard from in april 2017. she has erased her social media profiles and canceled her phone service.
missing after fleeing into the woods near the end of glacier highway.
lauren fell overboard from the f/v faithful in the area of idaho inet near elfin cove. she was not wearing a life jacket, and searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating her.
missing after vessel overturned in aialik bay. also missing is caleb green (mp #123059).
selena went overboard from the m/v celebrity solstice in lynn canal. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating her.

anchorage police are asking for the public’s help in locating 31-year-old jan hagen. jan travelled via airplane from kenai to anchorage on march 14, 2022; family have not had contact with jan since. apd was able to confirm that jan did arrive in anchorage. attempts to locate jan have been unsuccessful.
missing after skiff overturned in khaz point area 40 miles north of sitka. also missing is sayer tuzon, mp #114712. unable to recover due to weather conditions. vessel later washed up on beach.
last seen at his residence on candlelight drive in kenai. his direction of travel is unknown.

missing after a piper pa-18-150 aircraft, n4481z, was destroyed when it was involved in an accident about 60 miles northwest of skwentna. wreckage was located at the bottom of an estimated 500 to 600 ft ravine of the west fork of the yentna river, also known as shellabarger pass in denali national park and preserve. missing with nicolas blace, mp #107642.
linda walked away from a meeting at st. michael's church in anchorage on 05-01-2022.
marcus has not contacted family since october 2022 when he was living in anchorage. his building manager advised he moved out in april 2022 and did not leave a forwarding address.
missing in cessna 206, tail #n9975, on flight from nondalton to kenai. plane or occupants have never been located. also missing are dewey bailey, sheila cella and john cushman.

frank was last seen in in the hollis area on prince wales island on 08/08/1992. he failed to show up at work on 08/10/1992. when his residence was checked, it was discovered that his vehicles were at home, his house was unlocked, the keys and wallet were on the table and the power was shut off outside the house. an intensive ground search near his home failed to provide any leads.
newell noyes was aboard the "nannie d", a 32 ft boat which left seward, ak enroute to three hole bay, and has not been seen since. also missing is john corbett and k'lynn love.
ralph treffers, jr. was last seen in the bering river area in prince william sound on f/v hideway, which is also missing. the vessel was a 28 foot sternpicker with a black hull and gray cabin.
michael and his companion, richard mason (mp #61329), were last seen in dillingham, ak on 08/22/1984. kenneth hunter was convicted of their murder.
overdue while traveling by boat from seward to driftwood bay. an extensive search was conducted but had negative results. also missing is jesse davidson and carolyn davidson.
missing in cessna 206, tail #n9975, on flight from nondalton to kenai. plane or occupants have never been located. also missing are dewey bailey, john cushman and hunter wells.
overdue while traveling by boat from seward to driftwood bay. an extensive search was conducted but had negative results. also missing is jesse davidson and john davidson.
michael was last seen in the lower yukon river village of kotlik on 10/02/1988.

crew member missing aboard the f/v "st. george" which sank 152 nautical miles north of unimak pass. also missing is kevin clark, george dahl, terry james, david parkes and brian schouten. neither the vessel or the crew members were ever located despite numerous search efforts. the empty life raft was located 01/05/1992.
john was last seen on 11/01/1987 during a boating accident 9 miles southwest of sitka. per online resources, an empty life raft and some debris were all that was found. he is presumed to be deceased.
todd was aboard fishing vessel sea venture which capsized in rough seas approximately 6 miles southwest of point pogibshi, kachemak bay.
victor was last seen on 06/29/1984 when he went overboard between gilmer bay and hill island near sitka. he is presumed deceased.
dominador was last seen in anchorage, ak on 08/02/2005.
lee is presumed to have drowned after the fishing vessel tamra dawn was reported to be sinking near clarence strait 2 mi from pt mccarty and south of ketchikan.
eugene's vehicle was located at mile 87.5 of the seward highway with his cell phone inside the vehicle.

norman last had contact with his family in october 1982. his vehicle was abandoned on october 31, 1982 in a parking lot of consolidated freightway and later disappeared from there. the vehicle was recovered on june 21, 1983.

donald hussen was last seen on 08-02-2019 around 2200 hours at his residence near 134 mile elliot highway in manley hot springs. donald’s direction of travel and destination are unknown. a game camera in the area captured photos of donald shortly before he was reported missing on 08-03-2019. based on the game camera photos, donald was wearing a dark baseball cap, camouflage outer jacket with a dark hooded jacket underneath and dark pants.

steven was last seen near kotlik slough. he is presumed to have drowned. white sneakers later identified to be his were located in an overturned kayak that steven and another boy were seen playing in.

peter went missing after fishing vessel, nettie h, was lost at sea approximately 10 miles north of otter point on unimak island. missing with daniel soileau (mp67285), david soileau (mp66833), and blake grinstein (mp66855).
missing from m/v "alaska packer" that was anchored in akutan bay and is presumed to have drowned. despite search efforts, russell was never located.
eric was last seen on 08/15/1994. he failed to show up for work and his truck was found in the parking lot at byron glacier. searches of the area were met with negative results.

gary and his son were traveling via boat on the goodpaster river when the boat hit a log jam and started taking on water. they both made it on top of the log jam, but gary fell into the water and was never located.
angela was on board a boat that sank in the mouth of goodnews bay. two others were recovered deceased.
earston "ernie" shaw was last seen in ketchikan, ak on 01/11/1989. john wulf and john mcclelland were charged with his murder in 1989.
alejandro went missing from fishing vessel arctic rose which sank 205 miles northwest of st. paul island.
jason was last seen boating wales to diomede. he was traveling with 4 other adults and 1 child.

ronald was last seen on 09/02/1989. per media, he was canoeing with four other nikiski residents from mckinley village to riley creek in two canoes lashed together catamaran-style. the group reached riley creek late saturday and was taking the canoes out of the river when they were swamped by a wave. the other individuals made it to shore but ronald went back to the canoes to save equipment. he was last seen floating down the river with the canoes and he was going under. the canoes were found on sunday wrapped around an abutment at jonesville bridge, the first bridge north of the entrance to denali national park. ronald's body was never found.

nghia and kurt langer (mp #66518) went missing from fishing vessel louise. they departed dutch harbor on october 28, 1991 and were due to return 5 days later. searches of the area did not locate the vessel or the crewmen.
george was last seen on a raft on 05/18/1973 on wild river, north of koyukuk river.

timothy was last seen leaving mountain point boat launch in a skiff headed to metlakatla. skiff was located capsized and unoccupied 100 yards north of blank island. debris was located in the same area. also missing is troy smart (mp 67091).
jerry went missing from fishing vessel galaxy which sank 30 miles south southwest of st. paul island, ak. he is presumed to have drowned.

verne edenshaw jr was last seen on 05/06/1978 and is presumed to have drowned while boating from hydaburg to craig, ak. he went missing with victor (jay) burgess (mp #66676), glenn cook (mp #66786), delbert kelley (mp #66740), and william hamilton jr (mp #67265). they were last seen at waterfall resort approximately 15 mi from craig. one skiff was found submerged near cruz island in san alberto bay, and the other was found tied to a rock in canoe pass.
aaron went missing from fishing vessel big valley which sank 60 miles west of st. paul in the bering sea.
jeffrey is presumed to have drowned in a boating accident on fishing vessel mary may in sitka sound near biorka island.

troy was last seen leaving mountain point boat launch in a skiff headed to metlakatla. skiff was located capsized and unoccupied 100 yards north of blank island. debris was located in the same area. also missing is timothy staples (mp 67054).
james was last seen near the bear glacier in resurrection bay in a small boat. he is presumed to have drowned.
randal went missing after a canoe accident in the upper chilkat river. the accident was witnessed by his son.

ray was a crewman on a fishing vessel on 02/14/1985 when it was reported missing between uganik bay and alitak bay. he is missing with shawn heaney (mp #66821), melvin wick (mp #67035), paul rowe (mp #67034), and sveinn adalsteinsson (mp #67238). no debris from the boat or bodies have been found.

daniel jones was last seen on 09/09/1989 during a boating accident near st lazaria island by sitka. he is missing with daniel novcaski (mp #66748). per media, daniel jones' 13' boston whaler was found not long after the search for the two men began. the boat was anchored just offshore from st lazaria and had food, gas, and some halibut on board. the two men are believed to have left the smaller boat there and continued fishing from daniel novcaski's larger 17' fiberglass shift. the two men did not return when expected and the wife of one of the men reported them missing. both men are presumed to be deceased but their bodies have never been found.
michael was last seen on 12/01/1980 during a boating accident in kizhuyak bay on a fishing vessel named lucky island.

thomas saccheus was last known to be in the village of golovin on 09/23/2019 and may have attempted to walk from golovin to elim where he resides. several searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

katherine went missing with her two sisters, mp66482 jesse davis and mp66487 samantha davis, after the aircraft piloted by her father flew into lake clark into the ice. she was unable to get out of the aircraft before it sank. her mother and father survived the crash.

tara was last seen on 06/16/1989 and is missing from a plane crash into the cook inlet. the plane was returning from a bible camp at port alsworth and ran out of fuel over water. she is missing with passengers janelle gerlitz (mp #66493), william johnson (mp #67025), and michele green (mp #66510). a few items from the plane were found but the passengers were never located. all four are presumed to be deceased.
justino went missing from fishing vessel arctic rose which sank 205 miles northwest of st. paul island.

dominic and another crew member were aboard the fishing vessel aleut and were last seen on 11/27/1992. when they were reported overdue, the coast guard searched the area and located the vessel and the other crew member deceased. dominic was never located during the search efforts.
phillip was last seen attempting to swim ashore in iliamna bay after float plane went down.
lamont is presumed to have drowned while boating from protection point around cape constantine on 09/11/1987. missing with adrien olsen (mp67137).
david went missing and is presumed deceased after failing to return from a 14 mile hike in harriet hunt leask wolf lakes and lunch creek. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating him.

daniel novcaski was last seen on 09/09/1989 during a boating accident near st lazaria island by sitka. he is missing with daniel jones (mp #67223). per media, daniel jones' 13' boston whaler was found not long after the search for the two men began. the boat was anchored just offshore from st lazaria and had food, gas, and some halibut on board. the two men are believed to have left the smaller boat there and continued fishing from daniel novcaski's larger 17' fiberglass shift. the two men did not return when expected and the wife of one of the men reported them missing. both men are presumed to be deceased but their bodies have never been found.

rodney was last seen on 02/18/1996 when he fell overboard a fishing vessel, bluefin, while setting crab pots 60 miles west northwest of st paul island in the bering sea. it's reported that he was not wearing a survival suit at the time.
douglas was lost from f/v arlene gale in onion bay near raspberry island near kodiak on 04/27/1971.
on 09/06/1967, kenneth was on board a cessna 172 (tail #n3789l) when it went missing enroute from northway to juneau.
mevlin was last seen boating wales to diomede. he was traveling with 4 other adults and 1 child.

daniel and 3 others left auke bay boat harbor near juneau for a day fishing trip on 07/23/1995. the boat never returned to the harbor. the bodies of two others were later located, but daniel and shamalee taylor, mp #66480 were never recovered and they are presumed to be deceased.

larry was last seen on 05/19/1996 when he set out at 6pm in his boat. shortly after he left, winds kicked up to about 20 mph and bethel was pelted with rain and snow. his boat, with one occupant, was seen heading upstream by campers. the occupant was then seen walking on the beach. six minutes later, the boat was observed spinning tight circles at a high rate of speed, empty. it's reported that larry did not have a life jacket on when he left the harbor.

anthony was aboard the freight vessel 'president madison' that was traveling from seattle to dutch harbor. he was knocked overboard approximately 300 miles west of queen charlotte islands, bc. he was thrown a life ring, but it nor anthony was ever seen again.
mark is presumed to have drowned in the mouth of iliamna bay.
satoshi is missing at sea and presumed deceased from fishing vessel, alaska ranger.

yamada went missing after falling overboard from fishing vessel heather sea in the gulf of alaska approximately 300 mi s of kodiak in the gulf of alaska. had been complaining of sea sickness and headaches 24 hours prior.
kimberly is missing from anchorage, ak.
randall is presumed to have drowned in a boating accident near lisianski pennisula.

tom was last seen on 10/30/1986 during a boating accident on the f/v danube near juneau in the gastineau channel around marmion island. he is missing with william scott lewis (mp #66891) and william tugman (mp #66808). wreckage was found on douglas and admiralty island. searches of the area were unsuccessful in locating them. they are all presumed deceased.

crew member missing aboard the f/v "st. george" which sank 152 nautical miles north of unimak pass. also missing is george dahl, terry james, sean mcwethy, david parkes and brian schouten. neither the vessel or the crew members were ever located despite numerous search efforts. the empty life raft was located 01/05/1992.
guy went missing from a climbing expedition on the devil's thumb outside of petersburg, ak. he is presumed to be deceased.

on 05/24/1989, michael and his brother were aboard their parents boat. michael's brother awoke and found michael to be missing. they were in a boat in new stuyahok slough at the time. all search efforts were met with negative results.

su and another companion were sport fishing in a skiff in cold bay on the aleutian chain near the town of cold bay. the skiff veered sharply to one side and threw both occupants overboard. the other occupant was rescued, but su was not located. he was not wearing a floatation device.
wassilie was last seen at a fish camp near oscarville on the kuskokwim river. his boat was located unoccupied on the bank.
ephrem last contacted family in kodiak, ak in october 1976.
robin is presumed drowned while enroute kodiak to ouzinkie via skiff. also missing is philip balluta (mp #66849) and emanual charliaga (mp # 66583)

victor (jay) burgess was last seen on 05/06/1978 and is presumed to have drowned while boating from hydaburg to craig, ak. he went missing with verne edenshaw jr (mp #66955), glenn cook (mp #66786), delbert kelley (mp #66740), and william hamilton jr (mp #67265). they were last seen at waterfall resort approximately 15 mi from craig. one skiff was found submerged near cruz island in san alberto bay, and the other was found tied to a rock in canoe pass.
