deiby left his residence and was never seen since then.
joseph hankerson was last seen by a female friend on 07/15/1998 around 4pm.
mp was last seen in hinesville, ga around w. 15th street.
cheryl brown was last seen around 1200 hours at her home in atlanta, ga.

in the spring of 1985, 15 years old, betty "ann" holt was at a relative's residence. betty ann got into an argument with the relative and was told to leave the residence. betty ann was last seen leaving the residence on foot, walking towards highway 92. there are no reports of her bring seen or heard from again.
unknown. grongie was last seen at approximately 3:00pm in the vicinity of the 2800 block of springfield ct. in atlanta, ga.

mary was last seen at approximately 10:00pm dropping off an acquaintance in the vicinity of the 1500 block of olympia way sw in atlanta, ga. her purple, four door, 2000 saturn ls was later located at her residence in the vicinity of the 1700 block of northside dr. in atlanta, ga.

williams was living with boyfriend in sandy springs, georgia in 1988. williams's family has not heard from her since march 1988. her family says it is uncharacteristic of her to be out of touch with them for so long.
brandon and his mother, paula ann wade (namus # 484), were last seen at their home on october 14, 2002. they have not been seen or heard from since and are believed to be endangered.
orlando jordan has been missing since roughly august 19th of 2008. the circumstances around his disappearance are still unknown. mr. jordan's vehicle was located unoccupied in a neighboring county.
derrick last known to be in or near gainesville, ga. he had worked temporarily at a mcdonald's in june 1996. he did not have transportation.
per law enforcement - mr. dix was taken away at gun point by unknown persons.
on 05-25-2002 at approximately 1800 hours, wanda was last seen entering a white "sporty" vehicle with a spoiler on the back. the vehicle was driven by an unknown male.

susan left washington and returned to georgia in 1975. she was last seen by family at her mother's home and there is no information to indicate she went back to washington state. she was last heard from when she called her mother and grandmother’s homes in the mid-1980s, prior to her father's death in 1987.
ernest johnny ward was last seen near his home in lafayette ga in september 1981.
april 2004, moved from nj to new double-wide mobile home in chatsworth, ga. reported missing by sister may 1, 2004. her disappearance is suspicious.
he may have been traveling (probably hitchhiking) across the south and southwestern us. last thought to be in boulder, co in december 2016.

tommy dean wampler previously lived in fernandina beach, florida and st. simons island, georgia. he also has family ties to arkansas. he was last seen in marietta, georgia, and last contacted family in november of 1984.

between the hours of 10:00 p.m. on 5/9/2004 and 5:00 a.m. on 5/10/2004, sonya tukes left the residence in tennille, georgia never to be seen again. tukes had gone to bed at this residence around 10:00 p.m. on 5/9/2004. her family woke up at 5:00 a.m. to find sonya tukes gone and never heard from again.

brenda went missing on january 12, 1987, in athens georgia. the facts related at the time were that brenda edmondson was living in athens, ga. brenda got up one morning and reportedly told the family that she was going to buy cigarettes. she has not been seen since. brenda was last seen wearing blue jeans and a t-shirt and had her purse with her.
charles was last seen around may 30, 2016. not long after he went missing two unidentified males came looking for charles but did not disclose how they knew him or why they were looking for him.

joseph taylor was last seen at friend's residence located on wexler st savannah ga around 1200 hours on 7/16/19. he last spoke with a family member around 1000 hours on this same day and he was leaving to meet with his family at their residence located on waldburg st for dinner, but never showed up or called. all calls were going to voicemail. it was later learned that a family member had spoken with mr taylor around 8:00 pm on 7/16/19 and it sounded as if he was traveling in his truck but no mention of his location or where he was headed. he did mention he had wanted to travel to south carolina. mr.taylor was driving his 2016 toyota tacoma silver in color truck that was later found abandoned in millen ga on june 18, 2019 but spd learned that mr taylors' s vehicle was spotted in millen ga on june 17,2019. mr taylor was last seen wearing a long sleeve white shirt, dress pants, and brown shoes and possibly wearing a hat. press release done and jenkins co sheriff office as well as gbi and spd have conducted searches in millen ga and savannah ga and vicinity but joseph taylor could not be found.

missing person (mp) was last seen by family on the 1900 block of lexington avenue, east point, ga on 10-9-2019. mp was known to work at various krystal's locations throughout metro atlanta. none of his friends or family have heard or seen him. mp was known to apparently owe at least one person money who had recently made threats against him. at this point foul play is probable.

on monday, december 30, 2019, logan rode along with his father on his regional truck route, and arrived at 750 progress industrial blvd, lawrenceville. at approximately 8:15 am, his father went inside for a few minutes for the delivery, but logan was gone when he came out. some of logan's belongings were still in the truck and his wallet was located on the ground near the roadway. surveillance video showed logan walking through a lone puddle in the parking lot. a local search was conducted, but he was not located. there have been possible sightings in lawrenceville, ga in 2019, and yemassee, sc in 2020, but logan has yet to be located.

the last contact paul billings had with his family was in august of 1986. paul called his mother’s home and told her he needed $100 to pay a fine he had been issued for speeding. paul never called back, and the family has never heard from him again. it is uncharacteristic of paul to fail to call home on a regular basis and the family believes the lack of contact is suspicious. paul has ties to galena, illinois; chicago, illinois and california
tauquia stallings was last seen getting in to a burgundy in color vehicle with a male on 12/11/1998. she has not been seen by her family since then.
last seen being dropped off at a family member's house after a funeral in lagrange, ga in january 2020. he was last seen wearing black pants, white shirt, black tie, and black shoes.

was last seen walking into the wood lines behind several businesses in richmond hill. the clothes he was wearing were discovered along with his flashlight. he left his bag, clothes, and phone in a hotel room at the red roof inn in richmond hill ga.

a family member/reporting party was with damian monds at the shell gas station located at 1338 virginia avenue on 11-5-2019 at 1800 hours. the reporting party went in the location to purchase an item and when he came back out the damian was gone. after searching for damian for several days, a family member reported him missing on 12-06-2019.

on march 11, 2022, jesse had left the residence for a walk and had not returned. police searched the area for hours with negative results. jesse was last seen wearing a brown leather coat, white shirt, blue jean pants, black sandals and walking with his cane. if you have any information on the whereabouts of mr. dillard, please contact with the clayton county police department at 770-477-3550.
the last time anyone has heard from dustin was august 1st, 2021
gabriella dixon was last seen on 10/27/23 in macon, ga.
aka "jose velasquez centeno" voluntarily left his family's residence in atlanta, ga. last seen wearing red shirt and blue jeans

ann taylor dorminey was last seen late in the night on friday, october 2nd, 1981, and early morning (a.m.) on saturday, october 3rd, 1981. dorminey's pocketbook and vehicle were found at her residence. a window of dorminey's residence was found to be broken out upon a search conducted for dorminey's well being. dorminey has not been seen or heard from since october 3rd, 1981

several witnesses saw banks being dragged by a male. he threw her into his pickup truck and left the apartment complex. he returned several hours later with blood on him and scratches. he told a witness that banks had jumped out of his truck and left walking. he reported her missing on 07/04/1987. carolyn banks has not been seen or heard from since.
blaine oliver was last seen walking near lewis road and highway 93 s in grady county, georgia.
mr. mims is undomiciled and was reported missing after a family member had not heard from him in approximately 1 week.

on october 14, 2024, mr. mckay was reported missing from his residence in stone mountain, ga. he had been living with 3 roommates. he last had personal contact with anyone on october 2, 2024. notably, mr. mckay is missing a portion of his right arm below the elbow. as of now, mr. mckay remains missing, and his family has not received any updates regarding his whereabouts.
last seen in the area of e 4th avenue in cordele geogia.

last known contact with angela freeman was by her husband on 4/2/2014 at 0533 hours and then at 0900/1000 hours via phone. when her children returned home from school that day, they discovered that their mother and her vehicle were not home.
last known location was in griffin, georgia on 11-25-2025.

lamar was last seen leaving her boyfriend's house on october 26, 2024. family advised that the last communications they received from lamar were by text around thanksgiving 2024, with no subsequent voice calls. she was reported missing on january 2, 2025, after she failed to contact her family over the holidays. despite extensive efforts, kerri lamar remains missing and the investigation continues to be treated as a suspicious disappearance with potential foul play.
austin was last seen leaving a friend's car 0.5 hours from home.
cronin was last seen in tamuning, guam in early march of 1995. she was supposed to meet some friends at the tropicana hotel on march 6, but never arrived there. she has never been heard from again.
ssgt st amand was last seen on 17 mar 1981, swimming at tarague beach on andersen air force base, guam. it is presumed he drowned.

on 04/19/2025, gabriel holt missed telephonic muster during a port visit to guam and attempts to locate him met with negative results. holt's last known whereabouts are from a security video from hotel nikko in guam that revealed holt exited the hotel, walked towards the beach alone wearing water shoes, shorts, and a tank-top shirt he then turned north towards gun beach and walked parallel to the ocean along the sand at 0006hrs, out of view of the cameras. his cellphone, wallet and contents, hotel key card, and belongings were found in his hotel room.
last seen on november 3, 2008 near the 400 block of apusento garden or route 14 by ypao beach, tamuning, guam.
greg entered the water at tarague beach on anderson air force base in guam after hours of darkness and has never been found.

tomoko ioh was last seen on sunday october 18, 2009 around 10:30 a.m. leaving her home. her vehicle is described as a green and silver 1999 suzuki grand vitara. at 6 p.m., her vehicle was located at the natural energy laboratory of hawaii but she has not yet been found.

gilbert caravallo was reported missing on 10-15-2004 after not being seen or heard from since 10-6-2004. gilbert was known to frequent the mountains above royal summit. an extensive search of the mountains was conducted, negative findings.
dan and his wife arrived to church on saturday night, 1-30-2010, in separate cars. after the service, they decided to meet back home for dinner. dan never returned. car found abandoned 3 days later.
the child was last known to be in hawaii in september 1997.

he was last seen at a friend’s home in the fern acres subdivision on aug. 12, 2007. at the time he was believed to be shirtless and wearing either white shorts or blue flannel pajama bottoms. police said ryan suffers from a medical condition that requires medication. he is described as 5-foot-10 and 160 pounds, with short blond hair. when last seen he was not wearing the eyeglasses depicted in the photograph.

samuel was last seen sailing out of honokohau harbor at 10:30 a.m. on wednesday december 2, 2009 near the pine trees surfing area. samuel had rented a 21-foot watercraft leaving the honokohau boat harbor, kailua-kona, hi. he hasn't been seen since.

was visiting his family in maui and went for his dally swim around 5:00pm. his usual routine was to swim for 10-15 minutes on keawakapu beach at or near the kilohana st. walkway area in south kihei near the mana kai resort. his shirt and goggles were found on the beach. tony enjoys swimming, woodworking, tinkering and repairing things. watching professional boxing and baseball teams (mainly la dodgers & anaheim angels) are his favorite sports. he has maintained a healthy lifestyle by eating right and exercising regularly.

steven branston was diagnosed with a medical condition and living with his parents in lakeport, california. steven left a note for his parents, who were on vacation elsewhere, stating that he was going to hawaii, and arrived in honolulu on 8-5-1996. steven opened a bank account on 8-12-1996, and has not been seen or heard from since.
unknown. jeffrey has not been collecting his social security benefits since he disappeared.

unknown. carlos was last seen at the evolution waikiki nightclub located on ena rd., and kalakaua ave. a female acquaintance stated that he was last seen having an argument with one of the employees at the nightclub.
subj last seen at poipu shores bar; never returned to his condo or made contact with family or friends.

subject related to his wife he was going hiking in the kahili mountain area and would return on 6/9/83 at 10:00am; he needed some time and space for himself to think; he was always punctual when he returned home in previous hikes. fire, state land & natural resources and police responded.

on 06-27-13 karen wycoff f-59 reported her husband steven wycoff m-66 missing after his kayak was found empty and floating north of the kawaihae small boat harbor. steven went fishing this morning at 0600 hours and his kayak was found at 1050 hours.

she was last seen at a friend's house. he says she left around 10 or 10:30 p.m, she apparently left her car there and he dropped it off the next morning at a car repair shop. she did not make any phone calls to anyone to pick her up.

last seen at an army duty station in hawaii in 1992. last seen 9 p. m. november 5, 1992 carrying a compact disc player walking away from barracks or walking from mail room to barracks or walking toward the base exchange wearing cut off shorts a t-shirt and rubber slippers or sandals

on 08-09-2015 at 1830 hours,a witness observed gregory voight enter the water at pahoehoe beach park, in a kayak, load with a large backpack. u.s. coast guard was informed of the situation on 08-11-2015, after the concerned witness called them to report that the missing man's car had not be moved from the beach park parking lot. hawaii police department was contacted to conduct an investigation. voight's family had not heard from him since june, 2015, friend's had not heard from him since 08-09-2015.

noah montemayor was initially reported as a runaway, which later was reclassified to a missing persons based on information that noah may have been emotionally unstable. noah's belongings were found abandoned at the makapuu lighthouse trail. extensive island wide searches were conducted, negative findings. nothing suspicious, and no foul play involved.
missing since april 6, 2016 from the eastside of kauai reported by his children . he is possibly depressed and suicidal. if located contact crime stoppers 808-246-8300 or dispatch at 808-2411-1711

after more than 40 days of rain, the ka loko dam breached in the early hours of march 14, 2006 unleashing an estimated 400 million gallons of water, sweeping away homes. remains of mp have not been recovered.
glenn oyama reported missing by his brother lyle oyama who also resides at the same address.

yorck kenneth woita was reported missing by his family after learning that he possibly was involved in an argument with his marijuana business partner, gregory awana. woita's vehicle was found burned in waimanalo the night he went missing. through investigation, awana was convicted in the murder of woita. awana later admitted that he dumped woita's body in kaneohe bay. woita's body has never been found.

robert mcdonald was last seen leaving his residence on may 20, 1976 in his vehicle. mcdonald related to his roommate at the time that he was going to visit a friend. rumors surfaced that mcdonald was possibly murdered by two acquaintances over drugs.
david gardner has not been seen or heard from since 11-14-2011. gardner's work truck was found abandoned along the like like highway.

ryan buckley was reported missing after leaving the mental health kokua residential treatment home at 139 amau road, in hilo, buckley was seen running from the home into the heavy brush behind the property. extensive searches, including the use of a k9 track resulted in no sign of him.

simon owen was visiting from texas, and was initially last seen at his residence on 6-28-1994 at 0730 hours. on 6-29-1994, at about 1215 hours, a witness reportedly spoke to owen near the pond area within the manoa falls trail. owen failed to show for work and return home thereafter. on 7-3-94, owen's bicycle was found still locked to a tree at the entrance to the manoa falls trail. an extensive search was conducted for owen, but he was never located.
katherine schmittler was last seen at her residence on 2-1-2008 at about 0900 hours. schmittler apparently left home for an appointment at kaiser hospital, and has not been seen or heard from since.

roselina was 40 years old when she vanished from hilo, hawaii on march 4th, 1999. she was seen last during the evening hours at her home on wainaku street in hilo that day. her pager and wallet were later found on the waikanu bridge but there was no sign of her.

loida wideman was last seen leaving her waipahu residence for work in her vehicle at about 2130 hours on 5-13-12. loida never showed for work, and failed to return home the next morning. loida's vehicle was later found unoccupied in the pearl city area.

steven white was reported missing after his backpack was found floating in the ocean near la perouse bay. steven also failed to return on his flight to north carolina. he had sent an email to his daughter indicating that he would be kayaking and solo diving off maui for a few days prior to disappearing.
solomon aki failed to return home from his normal daily routine of working on his 10 acre property.

marianne waters was last heard from by her mother in oregon on 7-18-2008. marianne failed to meet her mother in oregon as planned on 8-21-2008. information received indicated that marianne disappeared under suspicious circumstances.

on 10/03/19, the harbor master turned personal effects belonging to carl steffler into police found at the end of the cat walk at the kaunakakai pier at approximately 0600 hours. police then received a call from steffler's social worker advising that she has not seen him all day and there is growing concern for his safety. checks at his residence revealed it was intact. a neighbor reported hearing steffler moving around up stairs at approximately 0100 hours. checks of kaunakakai harbor surveillance camera revealed on this day at approximately 0330 hours a man matching steffler's physical description walks to the end of the cat walk, sets items down, gets into the water and swims (south) toward the harbor opening until he is out of camera view. the cameras do not show him returning. items set on the pier was the same location his personal items were recovered at 0600 hours. steffler was possibly wearing a bright green shirt and unknown color shorts.

scott was last seen in lihue on 04/25/2019. he usually resides on the west side of the island. he does not have a phone or vehicle. usually wears hair in bun with a baseball cap. last seen wearing a blue t-shirt, board shorts and slippers.

feliciano was reported missing after not being located after a check by adult protective services. feliciano suffers from seizures and has mental issues. follow up checks on feliciano have had negative results and feliciano has never been located.
roxanne lacson was last seen around noon on august 26, 2007 when her daughter dropped her off to meet her boyfriend in the makakilo area of honolulu, hawaii. lacson has not been or heard from since.

victim gary hoffman was last seen on august 19, 2019 when he parked his van on the side of the road near mile marker 20 of kula highway and walked off into the field heading down the mountain. there has been no contact or sightings since then and he failed to show up for a court appearance. there is no information to suggest hoffman used commercial transportation means to leave maui at this time.

khiara came to maui on vacation and was staying at a hotel in kihei. on july 21st at 2pm, khiara rented a car for one night to visit hana's waianapanapa state park. khiara has not been heard from since that day. on july 25th khiara's rental car was noticed and called into maui police department as abandoned by park officials. khiara's luggage, credit card and id were all found inside the vehicle. her cell phone, small back pack and car key were not in the car and has not been located. khiara was scheduled to fly home on july 29, but did not appear for her scheduled flight.
aidan was last seen in wailuku, hawaii on 11/07/2019.
ikaika was last seen january 16, 2019 in kahakuloa, hawaii.

roque rivera suffered from the onset of dementia and was last seen at this residence by a friend on 03/17/2008. there were possible sightings of rivera shortly after he went missing , however he was never located.

gary ota was last seen sitting in his vehicle in the driveway of his hawaii kai home at 5:30am on 3-3-1979. there were two sightings of ota in the days after, the last on 3-12-1979. he has not been seen or heard from since.
john harrison suffered from mental illness, and was last checked on by a friend at his residence on or about 10-1-2002. harrison has not been seen or heard from since.
derick endo was reported missing after he was not seen or heard from by his family since on or about 3-1-2003.

kon wai young went fishing alone on his 16' boat, and launched from the boat ramp at maunalua bay beach park. young failed to return, and his truck and empty trailer was found unattended within the parking lot. an extensive ocean search was conducted however, young and his boat were never found.
mike last contacted family via telephone on 07/23/2019. his family has not heard from him since and are concerned for his welfare.

masumi watanabe was a victim of a homicide, and her body has never been recovered. watanabe was a visiting japanese national who was staying with a host family, and had failed to return from a routine walk in the neighborhood.
tini agatonu has not been seen or heard from since 5-4-12.

matthew leathers was an active duty so1 navy seal when he went missing while on a breath hold training dive in the waters off kaena point. leathers was diving in approximately 25 feet of water, approximately 150 yards offshore. an extensive search was conducted however, he was never found.

michele hahn was living on a makeshift raft secured within a drainage runoff when a storm surge due to heavy rains swept her into a raging stream at the liliuokalani botanical gardens. an extensive search was conducted however, hahn was never found.

jeffery popa and his father set out on an overnight fishing trip on their 14 foot boat off the waianae coast, and failed to return. a search was conducted and debris was found approximately 15 miles offshore however, jeffery was never found.

robert arvin set sail from sand island with the intention of sailing to san diego, california on his 30' sailboat. on 9-14-2008, a matson container ship reported seeing arvin's boat at sea. per the matson crew, as arvin's boat passed by, a male was onboard waving, and did not appear to be in distress. arvin has not been seen or heard from since.

notified family he was taking a spontaneous trip to hawaii. he called when he landed in september and then again on october 4th when he told him he would be "off the grid" for a bit. family and friends have not heard from him since.

niles was reported missing by his family who indicated he had returned to maui sometime in august 2017 from california. niles was known to frequent the upcountry area but has not been seen since returning to maui.
daniel smith was last seen on 09/10/1977, following a party he attended the previous night in waianae, hawaii.
kenneth yoshida has not been seen or heard from since 1-28-2020. investigation revealed that he may have paddled out to sea on a surfboard from the keehi boat harbor.
betty shigenolived alone, and suffered from a mental illness. she left her apartment without notification on 4-7-1985, and has not been seen or heard from since.

isabella kalua was initially reported missing by her adoptive mother after isabella apparently wandered away from home during the overnight hours as everyone was asleep. investigation later revealed that isabella was murdered by her adoptive parents who were arrested and charged for murder 2. as of this writing, after extensive searches, isabella's body was never found.
kelly was last seen in the pahoa village area around 05/12/2023.

manuel baptist left his home on 7-18-80 to run errands as normal, but failed to return home, and has not been seen or heard from since. baptist was confirmed to have visited his doctor's office the day he went missing. baptist was not reported missing until 7-21-80. the reporting person in this case reported that baptist was 80 years old at the time, but did not have a date of birth for him.

on 11-27-1983, crispin asoy was last seen on an oahu transit service (ots) bus travelling on south king street at bishop street. at the time, crispin was travelling with his brother, but failed to exit the bus after his brother exited. crispin has not been seen or heard from since.

on 8-16-1972, arthur allen and his friend, moses kahiapo (mp132889), failed to return from a fishing trip, and both have not been seen or heard from since. allen and kahiapo launched their 17' boat from the heeia kea pier in kaneohe, and planned to troll for aku 15-20 miles offshore. an extensive search was conducted, and on 10-3-1972, the united states coast guard recovered their abandoned boat at sea.

on 8-16-1972, moses kahiapo and his friend, arthur allen (mp132888), failed to return from a fishing trip, and both have not been seen or heard from since. kahiapo and allen launched their 17' boat from the heeia kea pier in kaneohe, and planned to troll for aku 15-20 miles offshore. an extensive search was conducted, and on 10-3-1972, the united states coast guard recovered their abandoned boat at sea.

antone toutaiolepo was last seen on 11-17-23. there was a possible sighting of toutaiolepo by a friend on 11-22-23 at a honolulu park, however this information could not be confirmed. he has family on lanai.

on may 6, 2022, kainalu higbee argued with his wife at their paia home. he was then asked to stay with his mother in lahaina. he left in his white toyota tacoma (hi plate lka 038). kainalu stayed at his mother's home in lahaina until may 7 at 11:30 pm, when he left. he abandoned his cell phone and drove away. between may 8–12, his unattended truck was found a few blocks from his mother's residence and eventually towed away. there was a "free" cardboard cut out left on the front grill. an all-points bulletin was issued. higbee has not been seen or heard from since.

ripplinger was last seen surfing near lahaina, hawaii on november 21, 2003. the surfing conditions that day were very rough, and he never returned to shore. his vehicle was found parked in a parking lot near the 500 block of front street in lahaina, and his white surfboard with three skegs washed up on shore. he has never been heard from again.

molly parker warnock flew from norfolk, va through detroit, mi to honolulu, hawaii on november 30th. from there she went to rural hilo, hawaii to stay with friends that she has stayed with previously. she did not give her family the names of the man/wife couple (her friends) she was staying with. the last she has been heard from was by brief text to her family on 12/25/2024 and her phone # has since been suspended.

khilye hamadani arrived on oahu from north carolina on 6-2-25. prior to her flight, khilye left behind some of her personal belongings. on 6-3-25, some of her belongings were found on the shoreline of china walls. an extensive search of the water was conducted, however khilye was not located.

torey newlin was last seen by his friends at a "string cheese incident" concert at the lahaina civic center on 02/16/2002. he left the concert on foot, paranoid and disoriented, and was observed by law enforcement walking near the beach on honoapiilani highway. he was never seen or heard from again. his personal belongings, including his wallet were left behind.

michael ng left home in his mother's vehicle relating that he was going to the movies with friends, but never returned. ng's mother's vehicle was later found abandoned on the side of the road near the halona blow hole.
dean stone has not been seen or heard from since 9-15-01.

on 6-9-90, at about 1830 hours, erich kraemer left his residence to go on his nightly swim at a beach located at the end of kaalawai place in kahala. kraemer failed to return home, and his robe and towel were found on shore. search efforts for kraemer produced negative results.

martinez was last seen on april 21, 2002 at honokowai beach, in honokowai, hawaii, near the maui kai apartments where she was staying with a friend. she may have had camping and snorkeling equipment with her at the time. martinez never returned to her friend's apartment. she was supposed to meet a friend in oahu, hawaii but never kept the appointment. she has never been heard from again. she is from california and was vacationing in hawaii when she vanished.
unknown. christopher was last seen at approximately 11:30pm at his residence in the vicinity of the 1900 block of leleiona st. in lihue, hi. he has a medical condition.
unknown. john was last seen at approximately 5:00pm in a small village just a few miles from paia, hi.
amaral is of hawaiian, chinese and portuguese descent. amaral was last seen on july 29, 2005 in lanai, hawaii. he may have wandered from his residence.

daniel santiago was abducted with his brother, noel (11), by their biological father, victorio santiago, from their mother's home on pearl harbor. victorio showed at the residence in violation of a protection order his wife was granted by the courts. victorio and his wife got into an argument and then fled with daniel and noel in a rental vehicle. victorio possibly took daniel and noel to the philippines.
astara was last seen on 01/10/04 at about 10:45 pm at the pauwela lighthouse area where she was camping with friends. she was observed talking on a cell phone near the cliff face over the ocean.

melanie was last seen on october 20, 1999 at about 2130 hrs. up at kokee; her car was stuck in someones yard; the neighbor tried to get her car out but was unable to; the last time melanie was seen,was on the day that her vehicle got stuck.

john and cordelia told family they would be leaving hawaii in may 1976 on their 25 ft trimaran, the drum. the couple planned to sail from hawaii to washington state. neither have been seen or heard from since.

subj was staying at kiahuna plantation, building 38 rm 301, vacationing. subj went out for a swim at 1530 hours and failed to return. last seen wearing a light blue t-shirt with a plaid print and black and white floral print shorts, knee length, barefoot.
carly scott was last seen in maui, hi on february 9, 2014. the suv she was driving that evening was later found at a popular surfing area.

last seen 09/26/15 believed to gone exploring in caves ast larson's beach, his personal belongings and vehicle have been recovered, search and rescue efforts to no avail contact kauai crimestoppers at 808-246-3800 if seen
kenny was visiting hawaii from port townsend wa. she was last seen leaving for the movies on 8/30/08. she has not been seen or heard from since.

aaron bustamante was transient in the waimanalo and kailua areas, and suffered from schizophrenia for which he refused to take medication for. bustamante was last seen by his father on 5-24-2011 in the area of the former blockbusters in kailua.
mp last seen leaving his residence in kailua on 6/12/2012, and has never been heard from again. he was known to frequent the nuuanu and kapolei areas at the time of his disappearance.
michael was last seen on 10/13/15 and has not been heard from since.
melissa estoy was last seen at nanakuli beach park in the area referred to by the locals as zablan beach on 1-16-2018. estoy has not been seen or heard from since.

rick calhau was last seen leaving his kaneohe residence on 11-18-1996, relating to his wife that he was going to visit 2 friends, the latter in kalihi. calhau failed to return home, and his 1992 brown ford pickup was found the following day in aiea at the intersection of moanalua road and koauka street fronting our savior lutheran church.

david alex was reported missing on 11/09/2016 by co-workers from office max after he failed to show up to work. david moved to maui on 11/01/2016 from crystal lake, illinois. according to his mother, she had not heard from david since 11/05/2016. david was last seen by officers of the maui police department on 11/08/2016 after he was involved in a moped accident. david informed the officers at the scene that he was not injured. david was last seen wearing a long sleeve, blue colored t-shirt, grey surf shorts, black tennis shoes, and a green colored baseball cap. david was also operating a black and silver colored moped. david is believed to be homeless and it is unknown where he may be staying.

david janatka was reported missing by his girlfriend who had been unable to get a hold of him for several weeks. according to his girlfriend and cousin, janatka flew to maui to get away from everything and clear his head. janatka last contacted his girlfriend on 02/19/2014 which was the last contact he had with anyone. janatka's rental vehicle was found unattended at the end of ulaino road in hana on 02/22/2014. janatka's wallet, identification cards, cash, passport, suitcase, and cellular phone was found undisturbed within the vehicle. searches conducted throughout the area did not result in locating janatka.

cochran was reported missing in lahaina. cochran is described as being homeless. he failed to call his mother and twin brother on their birthdays which was normally his custom prior to going missing. cochran has never been located.

paul blackburn was reported missing after disappearing while snorkeling with his son off of molokini crater. blackburn was observed by his son going under the water on the north side of the crater but never coming back up to the surface. a search conducted by the coast guard did not result in locating blackburn

wynn lindsey was emotionally distraught when he left his residence in his vehicle. his vehicle was later found abandoned along the mountainous area of tantalus drive. an extensive search of the area for wynn turned up negative.
william oliver went missing from honolulu, hawaii in november 2016,.

bryan adona was last seen in the water, with his boogie board, at a surf spot known as leftovers on the north shore of oahu. adona failed to return home, and a friend located his vehicle and belongings in the area later that night. the next day, adona's boogie board was found washed ashore with what appeared to be a large shark bite. an extensive search was conducted of the area, however adona was never found.

cobler was an oregon state university scientist and phd candidate. he was last seen aboard the wecoma shortly after it left harbor at 8:35am. at 9am, after traveling about 5mi in a southwest direction, crew members called a life boat drill at which cobler failed to appear. the coast guard was called but a search did not find him.
fathi was last seen swimming at polihale beach. he was observed going underwater and did not resurface. several sharks were spotted in the immediate area.
darall was laying net at marine camp in wailua and was last seen attempting to retrieve the net from the ocean.
ruben saenz is believed to have gone camping in kalalau on 06/21/1989. searches conducted in the area for ruben were unsuccessful. ruben has not made contact with family or friends since this time.

noemi alcotas and her boyfriend went to a scenic spot known as rock bridge adjacent to hanauma bay. both noemi and her boyfriend were apparently swept into the water by a wave. an extensive search of the area was conducted however, noemi was never found.

charles wilson set sail on his 25 foot sailboat from the keehi boat harbor with the intent of moving his boat to the waianae boat harbor. on 10-17-2007, the u.s. coast guard was conducting training exercises approximately 25 miles off the waianae coast when they spotted wilson's boat adrift. the coast guard boarded wilson's boat however, no one was onboard and the sail was determined inoperable. a search of the area was conducted for wilson however, he was never found.

rainer klimek, originally from germany, disappeared from his host family's residence. he went for a walk and never returned. his personal possessions including his backpack and journal were left at the residence. his wallet and passport were not located at the residence. he has never been seen or heard from again.

matthew moribe was fishing on his 18 foot boat approximately 24 miles south of oahu, when he was witnessed falling overboard while trying to reel in a fish. he submerged underwater and after an extensive search, moribe was not located.
clare was last seen on surveillance camera walking the shoreline with dive fins on sunday in kailua-kona around 9:30am. she has not been seen since.

shirley browning suffered from mental illnesses, and was last seen at her residence by her neighbors on 11-19-2004. on 11-22-2004, browning's case manager conducted a welfare check of her residence, and discovered browning had not returned home. she has not been seen or heard from since.

kenneth abell was an active duty marine when he and two fellow soldiers paddled out to the mokulua islands approximately one mile offshore from lanikai beach. once on the island, abell was navigating over rocks near the water's edge, was swept off by a wave into the ocean, and never resurfaced. an extensive search was conducted however, he was never found.

kytana ancog was dropped off by her biological mother to her supposed biological father, travis rodrigues, aka travis heffelinger on february 3, 2021. a missing persons report was generated for baby kytana on february 10, 2021, after her mother could not locate her and travis. investigation reveals that baby kytana was murdered by travis, and her body disposed of at an unknown location by travis' friend, scott carter. travis and carter were both arrested, however baby kytana remains missing.

ikaika rivera was last seen when his father sent him to live with his grandmother. upon checking in on rivera, it was learned that he had left his grandmother's residence, and his whereabouts remain unknown.
myron was last known to be in wailea-makena on 06/24/2006.
randall went paddle boarding at a spot called "plenty kiawe" and never returned.

dennis roberts disappeared after he was dropped off at the kahului harbor on 10/23/2012 at around 1000 hours to pick up his jeep. his jeep was later located on 10/24/2012 at about 1130 hours, in the area of mp # 27.5 on piilani highway along cliffs approximately 100 to 150' above the ocean,

yosuke haga was last seen walking towards the maui prince hotel to view the sunset on 08/21/1991 at around 1630 hours. haga failed to contact the resort later that evening for a shuttle ride back to the hotel.
blaise lewis left home to meet with friends on 6-2-23, and has not been seen or heard from since.

on 9-11-76, ronald choo left home for a shoreline fishing trip somewhere in the pupukea area. ronald failed to return home, and on 9-12-76, his wife located his vehicle parked unattended on ke iki road in haleiwa. ronald's wife conducted a search of the beach area nearby, and found ronald's tackle box on the beach with his keys inside. the honolulu fire department was notified and conducted a search for ronald, and they were only able to locate one of his slippers on the beach.
julian wandered away from his home in waipahu on 6/01/1995. he has not been seen or heard from since.

gloria brewer was reported missing on 05/28/2024 by her mother who had not seen her in years. the last time gloria had phone contact with her mother was sometime between october-november of 2023. she was last seen by her former roommate on foot around october in the pukalani area. she has not had any definitive sightings or contacts since.

ryuzo ogata was taking care of his wife, and was last seen at his residence on 5-9-24. ogata's son in the mainland was informed that he was missing on 5-11-24. ogata has not been seen or heard from since.

roger brittain was last seen at pohaku beach park (also known as s-turns beach) in napili-honokowai, hawaii at 6:00 p.m. on may 21, 2004. he went snorkeling in the pacific ocean that day and was never heard from again.

the federal bureau of investigation in honolulu is seeking information regarding abigail bernstein (namus #mp146719) and her two children, koa (eliav) bernstein and kush nelson (bernstein) (namus #mp146720). the family was last seen at the ala wai boat harbor in honolulu, hawaii in october 2022.

stephen kennedy was camping at makapuu beach park with friends. on 8-4-1972, stephen was discovered missing from the campsite. stephen left all of his belongings behind, and has not been seen or heard from since.
on 4-22-87, tsuneko yamauchi left her waipahu care home without notification to her caretaker, and failed to return. yamauchi was never located.
kang sik om left his mother's residence on spencer street on 11-3-80, and failed to return to his residence thereafter. om possibly went hiking in the pali highway area.
deborah lopes wandered away from her waipahu care home on 8-6-88. she was never located.
cleta tabag wandered away from home on 1-24-86. she has never been located.

greg, or gregg, as he called himself, was last known to be alive in maui, hi. he called family in june 1983 asking for money to get back home to the wrightwood, ca area. his family wired money for his return home, but he was never heard from again.

roberts was last seen near his kalapana home. a canine search of the area around his home failed to turn up any clues to his whereabouts. police said roberts had previously lived on the island of maui, where he ran a business in the paia area. while living on maui, roberts frequented the paia, haiku and makawao areas during the late 1970s and early 1990s.

according to marlo's family, she was last seen at her home by her boyfriend and 2 year-old daughter. her boyfriend stated that on that day he went home for a lunch break at approximately 11:30 am. marlo needed to go to the store and wanted to take her daughter. her boyfriend told her to leave the daughter home, go to the store and come back. marlo left and never returned.

bradford was last seen at approximately 10:00pm in kauai, hi where he rented a white 2004 jeep mpvh. the car was located on the north shore trail near the kalalau bridge and the ke'e beach in kauai, hi on january 27th. a t-shirt from duke university, which bradford attended, was found submerged in hanakapi'ai stream. it is unknown whether the t-shirt belonged to him. bradford has a medical condition.
elenes was last seen on march 25, 2004, in puako, where he had been picking up his mail. he has no permanent address, but reportedly frequents puako and waikoloa in south kohala.
subject went surfing in 12-15 ft waves at a surfing spot called crack 14 in anahola; surf board located, body not found.
unknown. daniel was last seen at approximately 3:00pm in the downtown area of pahoa, hi. he has a medical condition.
robert's photo is shown age-progressed to 44 years. he was last seen around 6:30 a.m. on december 2, 1981 at the wheeler army air field in schofield, hawaii. robert may go by the nickname bobby.

jeffrey was last seen at approximately 8:45am hiking in wailua valley in the island of molokai. he was possibly sighted on july 28, 2001 near a homeless shelter in the vicinity of nimitz hwy and sumner st. in honolulu, hi. if you have any information regarding jeffrey's disappearance, contact police.
francesca was last seen at approximately 9:30am at her residence in the vicinity of makamae st. in pohoa, hi. she has a medical condition.
sequoya was last seen on august 22, 1993 in pahoa, hawaii.

flora joram reported that her husband, mack kilion left their residence located at 78-6725 makolea st, kahaluu apartments #1g, on 04-20-2015 at 1000 hours, after an argument and joram has not heard from him since. joram related that kilion left in his gmc yukon, hawaii license nre806, which was located at opolu airport in north kohala on 04-26-2015. extensive area checks were conducted around the airport met with negative results. kilion does not take medication and has no known medical or psychological condition.
richard was last seen by family in eleele. reported sightings from the westside of the island to the north shore-hanalei.
adam is missing from her home in south kona since june 13, 1998. she drove away in her 1997 toyota celica. two days later the car was found in the hawaiian ocean view estates subdivision of ka’u.
was night diving with a friend.

mp lived in hilo hawaii at the time of his disappearance. he was last seen entering his vehicle at a store in puna. mp did not own a vehicle, and frequently got rides from others. he used his cell phone that evening, but has never been seen or heard from again. he was known to frequent the hilo and kona areas.
last seen on hualalai street in hilo. is on foot and has a medical condition requiring medication.

after more than 40 days of rain, the ka loko dam, in kauai hawaii, breached in the early hours of march 14, 2006 unleashing an estimated 400 million gallons on the peaceful country community below, sweeping away homes and taking the lives of seven people. remains of mp have not been recovered.

after more than 40 days of rain, the ka loko dam, in kauai hawaii, breached in the early hours of march 14, 2006 unleashing an estimated 400 million gallons of water, sweeping away homes. remains of mp have not been recovered.
in january 2014, daniel moved from sacramento, ca to hanalei on the island of kauai. his family has not heard from him since he landed in hawaii.
on 09/17/17, perry was reported missing by a family member. he went out snorkeling and did not return.
patricia lopaka, a known transient in the honolulu area, was last seen by family in january of 1983.
oye has been missing from her moiliili home since january 25, 1982. she is believed to have walked to the shopping area near university ave., king st. and beretania st.
alexander was last seen at the international hostel in kapaa, hawaii on 02/22/2018. he has not been seen or heard from since.

robert rumburg was visiting from colorado, and is presumed to have gone surfing at sunset beach. the surfboard robert was presumed to be using was found abandoned off shore. an extensive ocean search was conducted however, robert was never recovered.
hanna wanerskog was swept out to sea while near the shoreline at the waimea bay beach park. hanna could not be located despite an extensive multi-agency 3-day search. no foul play involved.

robert lefevre left work at office depot, and apparently went for a hike at the wahiawa hills loop trail without notifying anyone of his plans. robert's vehicle was found days later at the trailhead. an extensive search of the trail was conducted with negative findings.
su chi lam, aka su chi lin, suffered from a mental illness and left her residence without notification to her daughter. she failed to return home, and has not been seen or heard from since.
winston was last seen leaving a home in makawao with two other males. he has not been seen or heard from since 02/02/2010.
johnathan fraser was last seen at home in honolulu, hawaii on 07/30/2016. his vehicle was found abandoned near his home a few days later. his whereabouts remain unknown.

alec cooke was an experienced surfer, and was last seen entering the water at waimea bay beach park for dawn patrol. swells were 30 plus feet at the time, and cooke failed to exit the water. his surfboard was later found ashore broken in half. an extensive ocean search was conducted however, cooke was never recovered.

matthew curley signed up for a dive tour with a private vendor catering to tourists. curley and other divers were taken to a location approximately a half-mile offshore off waialae beach park in depths of 60 to 80 feet. curley was last seen entering the water, but he failed to surface. an extensive search was conducted however, he was never found.

gregory stephanoff set sail alone in his 42' sailing vessel from the ala wai boat harbor. on 10-7-2013, stephanoff's vessel was found abandoned, floating approximately 500 miles south of midway island. no signs of foul play.

ruth molitoni lived with her husband, who passed away on 5-16-1993, in waikiki. she last spoke to by her family on 5-17-1993, and when her son arrived in honolulu on 6-14-1993 to bring her to live on the mainland, he could not locate her. ruth has not been seen or heard from since.

eugene ambard was last seen at his residence in hawaii kai on 8-24-2000 by his wife upon her leaving for work. upon returning home, eugene's wife discovered eugene and his boat gone from their backyard dock. on 8-25-2000, eugene's wife was notified that eugene's boat was found abandoned approximately 13 miles offshore off diamond head. a search was conducted however, eugene was never found.

valerie had been secured in her unit in a facility in hana, hawaii on 11/05/2020. her unit door was found to be pried open from the inside and it was found she had gone missing from this location. valerie not been seen since.

stanga was swimming and spearfishing with his cousin and friend on the above date near mama's fish house in paia. the cousin and friend returned to shore and lost sight of stanga. stanga was never seen again.

rakeem malik estrella-clark was at makapuu beach park with family and friends when he was swept off the rocks by a large wave. estrella-clark was unable to make it back to shore, and was swept out to sea by strong currents. an extensive search was conducted , however he was never found.

joseph was last seen leaving his residence on 02/03/22 at about 1745 hours to go camping. when he failed to return home, his girlfriend reported the incident to the police. his vehicle was located parked unattended at nakalele point, where his dog was also found. his vehicle was found intact and undisturbed. attempts to locate him by police, fire, coast guard, and volunteer search parties were all unsuccessful.

david loasby disappeared on 12/14/2021 at approximately 12:30 p.m. while snorkeling at the south end of chang's beach in makena, on the island of maui, hawaii. david was last seen swimming south around a rocky point along the shore.

on november 12, 1976, david porter was reported missing after his family had not seen or heard from him in several days. porter, an avid bodyboarder who spent much of his time at the beach, was last seen on the afternoon of november 3, 1976. weeks later, his vehicle was located, unattended, near kaumoku street, but porter was never found.

wade yamamoto was last seen leaving his pearl city residence in his vehicle on 3-12-2020. on 3-18-2020, his vehicle was located parked unattended in mokuleia area. yamamoto was an avid fisherman and diver, and may have entered the water and failed to return to shore. extensive searches were made in the area but he has not been located.
fran uilani kaniho was last seen at her home on wright road in volcano, hawaii some time in august 1988.

christian wayne rice was last seen when he moved out of his last known address in hawaii kai. his vehicle was found abandoned two days later near his residence, and he has not been seen or heard from since.

susan was last seen at her ewa beach residence on march 21, 2024. no one had contact with susan for about a week, and she was reported missing on march 27, 2024. during the search for susan, clothes possibly belonging to susan were discovered along the shoreline behind her residence indicating she may have entered the water and perished.

roy takatsuki was participating in an offshore fishing tournament when he failed to return to the haleiwa boat harbor at the end of the day. takatsuki's 18 foot boston whaler was found adrift approximately 10 miles off kauai, and it appeared that he was possibly fighting a fish and fell overboard. an extensive search was conducted of the area however, takatsuki was never found.
mark panela was last seen entering the water at kahana bay with his diving gear, and has not been seen or heard from since.
douglas mantei was last seen leaving the wailuku police station on 10/02/2020. he may be experiencing homelessness.

michael ballesteros was being cared for at a private care home in the kalihi area. on 3-4-1990, ballesteros left the care home without notification to his caretaker, and has not been seen or heard from since.
neil figueroa was last seen by his family on or about 1-1-2010. figueroa had police contact on 10-16-2016. he has not been seen or heard from since.

juan was last seen walking on foot towards lihue upon release from kauai community correctional facility on 05/03/2018 at around 1500 hours. he has not had any contact with family, has no financial resources, and does not own a phone.

francisco i. pangelinan, age 85 at the time of disappearance, arrived at the home depot store in kapolei, hawaii mid-afternoon on may 15, 2023. he entered the store on one end and exited from another end. it seems that he may have forgotten where he parked and could not find his car in the parking lot. he then walked across the street to costco kapolei and through its parking lot; then crossed the street to the star advertiser building. he was not shown on any surveillance cameras after that and we have no idea where he went or what happened to him. at the time he went missing, he was becoming a bit forgetful, but was otherwise of sound mind.

nola was last seen dropping her son off at her parent's residence on university avenue on 6-18-1992, at about 1600 hours. on 6-19-1992, at about 0200 hours, nola's vehicle was located in the parking lot of the halona blow hole. on 6-19-1992, nola's parents received a suicide type letter in the afternoon mail in nola's handwriting. on 6-21-1992, nola's sandals were found in a cave at the same location, and the honolulu fire department (hfd) conducted a search of the area. nola was declared deceased in june of 1997.

on 6-12-95, adrian cheong was last seen boogie boarding in the waters off kuhio beach park in waikiki in 6 to 8 feet surf. cheong was seen having trouble returning to shore and never exited the water. an extensive search was conducted. on 6-18-95, cheong's boogie board was recovered after washing ashore at mokuleia beach park.

samantha chun went out on a date on 1-17-25 with her boyfriend to ke iki beach, and both failed to return home. on 1-18-25, samantha's boyfriend's vehicle was located in the area, and personal belongings of her and her boyfriend were found on the beach. an extensive search was conducted, and remains were found about 200 yards offshore, which was later positively identified as samantha's boyfriend. samantha was never found.

jenna braden was reported missing by her adoptive mother in maui after not hearing from her since 7-25-20. computer checks showed that braden had contact with a honolulu police officer on 7-30-20 in the kaimuki area. there has been no documented activity from braden since. braden is known to use the alias angel martinez.

the federal bureau of investigation in honolulu is seeking information regarding abigail bernstein and her two children eliav (koa) bernstein (namus #mp146720) and kush nelson (bernstein) (namus #mp146722). the family was last seen at the ala wai boat harbor in honolulu, hawaii in october of 2022.
subject last seen on april 5, 2015 near his residence. subject has not made contact with anyone since.

sjoberg was serving as a united states navy hull technician third class in 1996. he was last seen aboard the uss harper's ferry (lsd-49) at approximately 11:00 p.m. on october 18, 1996. the ship was reportedly passing between the hawaiian islands of kauai and niihau at the time, coming as close as 2000 yards from shore at one point during the evening. sjoberg disappeared from the ship and has never been heard from again. he is originally from st. louis county, minnesota.

subject was dropped off at edmonton airport , canada on september 1, 2006. he indformed a friend he was going tocatching a delta airlines flight to hawaii and intends to go hiking in the mountains and visit the volcano; also related that he was returning to canada on september 8, 2006. piotr hasn't beeen seen or madecontactsince then. it was learned that piotr purchased a one way tickrt and boarded an inter-island flight from honolulu to lihue,kauai on september 1, 2006.

subj visiting with a tour group; went hiking to hanakapiai became distressed while swimming in the ocean; tour companion tried to bring him to shore but failed in trying, he swam to shore; when companion looked back he could not see subject; subj has not been located.

therese rose vanderheiden-walsh was abducted by her biological mother, merle vanderheiden, from her summer program she was attending at the kokokahi ywca in kaneohe. merle was charged with custodial interference in the first degree, and a warrant was issued for her arrest however, she has never been arrested. at the time of her her abduction, therese was under the full legal custody of her biological father. merle may be using the alias last names of smith, doherty, hamm, johnson, or cochran.

victorio showed up at his wife's residence on pearl harbor in violation of a protection order. victorio and his wife got into an argument and victorio left the area in a rental vehicle with their 11 year old son noel and 7 year old son daniel, and possibly fled to the philippines.

after more than 40 days of rain, the ka loko dam, in kauai hawaii, breached in the early hours of march 14, 2006 unleashing an estimated 400 million gallons of water on the community below, sweeping away homes. remains of mp have not been recovered.
goodwin was reported missing after he failed to return from diving off the shores of hana, maui. goodwin's body was never found.
kevin was last seen on video using a first hawaiian bank atm on 09/03/2021 in lahaina, hawaii.

ho ae foster last spoke to her daughter in new york on 10/1/2003, and was last seen at her residence in waipahu, hawaii on 10/2/2003 by a neighbor. on 10/6/2003, foster's vehicle was found abandoned at yokohama bay beach park with her personal belongings contained within. she has not been seen or heard from since.
diaz had sent a text to his father stating, "goodbye" and "thanks for everything", on the above date. diaz was never seen again. his father believes diaz was in hana at the time of the text.
lawrence koscho was estranged by his family, and was last seen on or about 1-1-2000 by a late uncle who used to reside in pennsylvania.
charleen milner was last seen via video surveillance at the king-liliha branch atm of first hawaiian bank. milner was residentially challenged, and has not been seen or heard from since.

kenan knieriem was fishing on his boat approximately 13 miles south of waikiki when he fell overboard while trying to land a fish. witnesses onboard jumped in to save him however, they could not bring knieriem back into the boat and he submerged underwater. an extensive search was conducted however, knieriem was never located.
bernadette rosa is residentially challenged and has not been seen or heard from since february of 2018.

stanley chen was observed fishing at the waters edge at a fishing spot known as bamboo ridge. the witness who observed chen was at the top of the ridge, and briefly left the area. upon his return, the witness did not see chen, but observed chen's fishing gear still on the ledge. an extensive ocean search was conducted however, chen was never found.

the federal bureau of investigation in honolulu is seeking information regarding abigail bernstein (namus #mp146719) and her two children, koa (eliav) bernstein and kush nelson (bernstein) (namus #mp146722). the family was last seen at ala wai boat harbor in honolulu, hawaii, in october of 2022.

joshua departed his family residence in naugatuck, connecticut in january 2025, stating that he intended to be away for a few days. joshua did not return home. on may 7, 2025, joshua contacted his mother by phone and stated that he was in hawaii and would not be returning home. joshua has a documented history of leaving home for extended periods and living transiently in various locations. records indicate that joshua took multiple inter-island flights within hawaii through december 2025. around this time, joshua was officially reported missing and entered as a file 6 in collect.

on the morning of july 9, 2023, ogata-staudinger was reportedly picking opihi with a relative in the area of kahakai boulevard and papio street in pāhoa, at a spot commonly known as “hau bush.” ogata-staudinger became separated from her relative and failed to return to their prearranged meeting spot later that day. she has not been seen or heard from by her family since. emergency personnel conducted an extensive area search, including police with a scent discriminating canine, the hawai‘i fire department’s helicopter, and the united states coast guard; however, ogata-staudinger was not located. police have continued to follow up on tips and have interviewed many known associates, friends, and family of ogata-staudinger. ogata-staudinger is described as local with a medium build, 5 feet 2 inches tall, 150 pounds, with brown hair and hazel eyes. she has a dollar sign symbol tattoo on her left cheek.
beverly chandler was reported missing on 2-14-08 after she had not been seen or heard from since 1-29-08. a neighbor reported that she had spoken to chandler on 3-23-08 while in the kahana bay area.
thomas hanson left home in his vehicle on 8-1-1988, and has not been or heard from since.

on the afternoon of february 21, 2010, laura spent time at a friend’s house before leaving later that day. she informed her friend that she planned to camp under the stars near the pauleheh lighthouse, located on the north end of the island. at 8:20 p.m., laura sent a text message stating that she was camping near the birthday pools and had met some locals. this was the last known communication from her. she has not been seen or heard from since. during the investigation, it was discovered that laura’s cell phone made two brief, 30-second calls later that evening to an individual who records indicate that laura had no known prior contact or connection with. at the time, he was homeless and living in a van near the area where laura had planned to camp. additionally, the individual had a documented history of sexual assault and aggressive behavior. if you have any information regarding laura’s disappearance, please contact maui county pd. any detail, no matter how small, could be crucial in helping to bring answers to her family and loved ones
annad arkangel was last seen on august 15, 2008.

on august 7, 2015 family members reported tristan postadan m-20 missing in the area of kaawaloa trail, captain cook. that hawaii police & fire department's conducted extensive search on the trail down to the captain cook monument (ocean), however, proved futile.
last seen in honokaa, hi on 05/13/2013.

charles locklar was last seen by his uncle, swimming towards the shoreline near lapakahi state park after the boat they were fishing on had capsized and sank in the ocean. his uncle stated that the last time he saw his nephew he was swimming ahead of him and he was approximately 200-300 feet from the shoreline. when his uncle reached the shore he made attempts to locate his nephew, who he figured would have reached shore before him; but charles locklar was not found.

in 1980, karen koppel was in a relationship with ben stein, a 67-year-old married man known around town as the “king of the janitors” and had ties to organized crime. the relationship began to sour after koppel realized that stein was not truly estranged from his wife and had no intention of marrying her. it was during this period that koppel became pregnant and was coerced to undergo an abortion. shortly afterwards, koppel began making wild accusations about stein, and demanded a large financial settlement to let things drop. stein asked a long-time friend – then-chicago cop richard "rick" simon, who moonlighted for stein’s firm – to help amicably resolve things, according to police records and interviews. simon met with koppel at flapjaw's saloon, 810 n. wabash avenue, the night she disappeared. according to published reports simon offered koppel $10,000 and the free use of a lake shore drive apartment in return for her agreement to exit quietly. koppel has never been seen since this meeting. there was speculation at the time that the woman was murdered and dumped in the middle of lake michigan. simon said in an interview he doesn’t know what happened to koppel, but doesn’t buy that she was murdered. rather, he suspects she’s still alive with a new identity, having left chicago because she was mentally unstable and horribly "humiliated" at being spurned by stein.

sherman was last seen on august 2, 1995 at her home in indianapolis. in august of 1995, peggy sherman lived with a friend in the 4500 block of grace street on the city's east side. the night before she went missing, peggy talked on the phone with two people - her mother and another man. the next morning, peggy left the house to have her car repaired. when peggy didn't show up for work at national city bank in downtown indianapolis, her parents filed a missing person report. her vehicle, a 1990 white chevrolet lumina; 4 door was recovered in greenwood, in 1st week in august 1995. peggy kept $50,000 hidden in a freezer, but when police came to peggy's house to investigate, the money was gone. police found blood on a mattress that had sections cut out of it. dna tests revealed there was a 99.9 % chance it was peggy's blood. detectives found peggy's blood on all four walls, a bedpost, a lamp and the ceiling. cadaver dogs made a hit on the trunk of a disabled car parked in peggy's garage. detectives say a car cover was missing. police never found the car cover or peggy.

harker was last seen in sioux city, iowa on or about october 5, 1996. on this date, harker's 1977 white chevy suburban was tagged as an abandoned vehicle by the plymouth county sheriff's office while parked on a gravel road (k-42). its doors were open, tires were flat and it was out of gas. a search of harker's residence on colon street turned up no clues as to his whereabouts. harker's mother reported him missing on october 9, 1996. his dog was left at his house, and it hadn't been fed in four or five days, and he had left behind his medicine. harker's family are convinced kenny didn't get disoriented and wander off and die due to exposure, because someone out mushroom hunting or a farmer or another individual would have found him by now. and, kenny's close attachment to friends and family kept him from wanting to live elsewhere. foul play is suspected.
last seen between three and four pm while fishing at willow creek with family. presumed drowning victim.
aaron was last seen on march 16, 1992.
he reportedly left his rural home at 1 a.m. to visit someone and has not been seen since.

crystal was last seen at approximately 2:00am at knickers tavern in the vicinity of the 2000 block of central ave. in dubuque, ia. no one saw her leave the bar. she left her car, keys, and money behind. she did not show up for work on thursday morning.
william was last seen at approximately 10:30am at his residence in the vicinity of the 3000 block of pacific st. in woodburn, ia.

jodi huisentruit had left her residence at approximately 4:00am for her scheduled shift at a local television station where she anchored the morning news. when investigators arrived at her apartment complex they found her red miata convertible in the parking lot. personal items were scattered around her vehicle. witnesses indicate that they heard a scream that morning. investigators are looking for a white mid 1980s ford econoline van.
charles was last seen in iowa city, ia on 11/16/1979. his 1961 blue gmc van was located on 11/17/1979, parked in the university of iowa hydraulics laboratory storage lot.
last seen heading toward first avenue east in cedar rapids

roberto guerra was reported missing to the fort dodge police department, in fort dodge on october 16, 2007. he was last seen wearing blue jeans, a black jacket and a plaid long-sleeved shirt with a gray t-shirt underneath.
lc matlock was reported missing to the waterloo police department (319-291-4339), in waterloo on july 5, 2004.
matthew ferris was reported missing to the des moines police department (515-283-4800), in des moines on march 7, 1991. possibly headed to west coast.
john hefty was reported missing to the webster county sheriff's office, in fort dodge on october 4, 2010. he may be in the mountainous area of arizona

riccardo bowers was reported missing to the des moines police department in des moines, iowa, on may 15, 2001. he was last seen jumping into the des moines river near locust st. if you have any information regarding the disappearance of this individual, please contact the missing person information clearinghouse iowa division of criminal investigation 1-800-346-5507.

sandra vanderhoef was reported missing to the webster county sheriff’s office in fort dodge, iowa, on september 22, 1986. the iowa department of public safety classifies vanderhoef’s disappearance as “endangered / physical,” which includes a person of any age who is missing under circumstances indicating his/her physical safety is in danger.
ronald e. westwick was reported missing on march 12, 1979 from ames, iowa.

james allan "jim bob" booher, 51, of marion, iowa, was last seen saturday morning, may 31, 2014, in the 5900 block of fourth street sw in cedar rapids. on june 3, 2014, his sister reported him missing to the marion police department, who issued an operation quickfind. on june 9, 2014, booher's truck -- a tan 1996 chevy extended cab with a topper and license plate number 447 zio -- was found abandoned in cedar rapids.

mervin walvatne was reported missing on december 16, 1990, by his sister who lives in spencer, iowa. she became concerned when she had no contact with him since july 18, 1990. prior to that time she had regular phone contact with mervin who was living in arizona.

linn allen snyder, 44, was reported missing to the pottawattamie county sheriff’s office in council bluffs, iowa, on september 9, 2006. snyder was last seen on his harley davidson motorcycle on september 3, 2006, and has not answered any calls to his cell phone since that date.

jade was entered as missing by law enforcement on june 10, 2016, and her date of last contact with family was on march 23, 2017. it was believed she was living in or around the dubuque, iowa area as of late march 2017. she had ties to phoenix, az, des moines, ia, dubuque, ia and decorah, ia.
darleen was last seen at her home in the 600 block of east pleasant view drive on the night of january 19, 1960. she hasn’t been seen or heard from since.
nimajapol was last seen on july 14, 2017. he was reported missing to the denison police department. the case is considered an involuntary disappearance.
the missing person, joseph gries, was last seen on 5/22/2020 in armstrong, iowa.
rachel was last seen leaving the super 8 hotel in urbandale, ia on 6/12/2021. no one has seen or heard from her since 6/12/2021.

jeffrey's vehicle was found unattended with keys in the ignition and still running at 5:50 am, 3/15/2019 on the great river bridge on highway 34 over the mississippi river. jeffrey was last seen wearing dark gray sweatpants and a gray jacket.

johnny joe shields, who lived with his mother in carter lake, iowa, was heard leaving the residence at 2 a.m. on thursday, december 15, 1988, and has never returned to his residence nor contacted his family. he was reported missing to the carter lake police department in carter lake, iowa, on friday, december 16, 1988.

fred was last seen in des moines, ia on 08/02/2013. he was living at a youth facility in des moines at the time. the facility reported his disappearance to law enforcement that same day. neither his family nor friends have seen or heard from him since. it is possible he may have gone to the newton, ia area.

at approximately 5:50 a.m. on 04/06/1985, south sioux city (ne) police located a 1984 chevy cavalier, registered to a ronald zellmer, age 31, parked on the south end of the veterans memorial bridge. the vehicle was left unattended with the motor running. sioux city police (ia) were called to check ronald's residence at 1003 pierce street, apt. b-3, and found it empty with nothing unusual within the apartment. later the following day, ronald’s family filed a missing persons report with sioux city pd (ia). according to family members, ronald was very depressed and had suffered from depression for years. a search of the missouri river proved unsuccessful in locating ronald.
helen kelly was reported missing to the sioux city police department (712-279-6353), in sioux city on may 18, 2005.

naomi was planning on getting gasoline for her car and to visit a woman she worked with. she was seen an hour later on the street and that was the last time that anyone saw her. the friend she was to visit reported that naomi never showed up. naomi's car, a 1978 white ford fairmont with license number doy 622, was found on tuesday april 14th in a kmart parking lot on 16th avenue se.
